title: IDENTIFICATION OF EFFECT PIGMENTS IN A TARGET COATING
abstract: The present invention refers to a computer-implemented method, the method comprising at least the following steps: 1) providing digital images and respective formulas for coating compositions with known pigments and/or pigment classes associated with the respective digital images, 2) classifying, using an image annotation tool, for each image each pixel, by visually reviewing the respective image pixel-wise, using at least one image segmentation technique and annotating each pixel with a pigment label and/or a pigment class label in alignment with the visual appearance and the formula associated with the respective image, 3) providing, for each image, an associated pixel wise annotated image, 4) training a first neural network (310), implemented and running on at least one computer processor, with the provided digital images as input and the associated pixel-wise annotated images as output wherein the first neural network (310) is trained to classify/correlate every pixel in a respective input image with a pigment label and/or pigment class label of a respective associated annotated image, 5) making the trained first neural network (310) available in the at least one computer processor for applying the trained first neural network to at least one unknown input image of a target coating and for assigning a pigment label and/or a pigment class label to each pixel in the input image, 6) determining and/or outputting, for each input image, based on the assigned pigment labels and/or pigment class labels, a statistic of corresponding identified pigments and/or pigment classes, respectively. The present invention further provides a respective device and a computer-readable medium.

title: IDENTIFICATION OF EFFECT PIGMENTS IN A TARGET COATING; IDENTIFICATION DE PIGMENTS A EFFET DANS UN REVETEMENT CIBLE
abstract:
The present invention refers to a computer-implemented method, the method comprising at least the following steps: 1) providing digital images and respective formulas for coating compositions with known pigments and/or pigment classes associated with the respective digital images, 2) classifying, using an image annotation tool, for each image each pixel, by visually reviewing the respective image pixel-wise, using at least one image segmentation technique and annotating each pixel with a pigment label and/or a pigment class label in alignment with the visual appearance and the formula associated with the respective image, 3) providing, for each image, an associated pixel wise annotated image, 4) training a first neural network (310), implemented and running on at least one computer processor, with the provided digital images as input and the associated pixel-wise annotated images as output wherein the first neural network (310) is trained to classify/correlate every pixel in a respective input image with a pigment label and/or pigment class label of a respective associated annotated image, 5) making the trained first neural network (310) available in the at least one computer processor for applying the trained first neural network to at least one unknown input image of a target coating and for assigning a pigment label and/or a pigment class label to each pixel in the input image, 6) determining and/or outputting, for each input image, based on the assigned pigment labels and/or pigment class labels, a statistic of corresponding identified pigments and/or pigment classes, respectively. The present invention further provides a respective device and a computer-readable medium.

La présente invention concerne un procédé mis en ?uvre par ordinateur, le procédé comprenant au moins les étapes suivantes : 1) la fourniture d'images numériques et de formules respectives pour des compositions de revêtement avec des pigments et/ou des classes de pigments connus associés aux images numériques respectives, 2) la classification, à l'aide d'un outil d'annotation d'image, pour chaque image, de chaque pixel, par examen visuel de l'image respective par pixel, en utilisant au moins une technique de segmentation d'image et en annotant chaque pixel avec une étiquette de pigment et/ou une étiquette de classe de pigment en alignement avec l'aspect visuel et la formule associée à l'image respective, 3) la fourniture, pour chaque image, d'une image annotée par pixel associée, 4) la formation d'un premier réseau neuronal (310), mis en ?uvre et en cours d'exécution sur au moins un processeur informatique, avec les images numériques fournies en tant qu'entrée et les images annotées par pixel associées en tant que sortie, le premier réseau neuronal (310) étant entraîné pour classer/corréler chaque pixel dans une image d'entrée respective avec une étiquette de pigment et/ou une étiquette de classe de pigment d'une image annotée associée respective, 5) la mise à disposition du premier réseau neuronal entraîné (310) dans le ou les processeurs informatiques pour appliquer le premier réseau neuronal entraîné à au moins une image d'entrée inconnue d'un revêtement cible et pour attribuer une étiquette de pigment et/ou une étiquette de classe de pigment à chaque pixel dans l'image d'entrée, 6) la détermination et/ou l'émission, pour chaque image d'entrée, sur la base des étiquettes de pigment et/ou des étiquettes de classe de pigment attribuées, d'une statistique de pigments et/ou de classes de pigment identifiés correspondants, respectivement. La présente invention concerne en outre un dispositif respectif et un support lisible par ordinateur.

title: A METHOD OF BUILDING SURFACE CRACK DETECTION BASED ON U-NET; 一种基于U-NET的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于U‑Net的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法。首先使用相机和无人驾驶飞行器收集30张包含裂纹原始图像；然后在每个原始图像中标记裂缝区域并将注释保存为灰度图标签文件；之后对图像进行预处理后，选取其中的200张图像作为数据集，按比例随机分成训练集、验证集和测试集；采用数据增强方法对制作好的数据集进行处理，再将其送入U‑net网络进行训练，经过30轮迭代训练后，U‑net模型在测试集上的准确率为99.56%；最后利用训练好的模型进行裂纹检测。本发明能够适应不同条件下的裂纹检测，并且省去布置大量传感器的繁琐，能够自动准确的对裂纹进行识别检测，对于提升建筑物表面裂纹检测的准确率和效率有重要作用。

The invention relates to a method for detecting cracks on the surface of a building based on U-Net. First, use the camera and unmanned aerial vehicle to collect 30 original images containing cracks; then mark the crack area in each original image and save the annotations as a grayscale label file; after preprocessing the images, select 200 of them As a data set, the image is randomly divided into training set, validation set and test set according to the proportion; the data set is processed by the data enhancement method, and then sent to the Unet network for training. After 30 rounds of iterative training, The accuracy of the U-net model on the test set is 99.56%; finally, the trained model is used for crack detection. The invention can be adapted to crack detection under different conditions, saves the cumbersomeness of arranging a large number of sensors, can identify and detect cracks automatically and accurately, and plays an important role in improving the accuracy and efficiency of building surface crack detection.
claims:
1 .一种基于U-Net的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法,其特征在于，包括如下步骤： 步骤S1、图像采集:使用相机和无人驾驶飞行器收集30张包含裂纹的建筑物原始图像； 步骤S2、图像注释:使用支持语义和实例分割的图形图像注释工具LabelMe，在每个原 始图像中标记裂缝区域并将注释保存为JSON文件，然后将这些JSON文件转换为灰度图标签 文件，其中裂纹区域赋予像素值1，背景区域赋予像素值0； 步骤S3、图像预处理:将每个原始图像和对应的标签分别随机剪成100个，变成512 X 512像素分辨率的图片;选取200张图像作为初步数据集，按比例随机分成训练集、验证集和 测试集； 步骤S4、模型训练:采用Keras框架实现U-Net系统，并在Anaconda平台下，将制作好的 数据集送入U-Net网络进行训练，训练完成后将模型进行保存； 步骤S5、利用模型进行裂纹检测：使用改进的U-Net模型来进行裂纹提取任务，将待检 测的裂纹图片输入U-Net模型，输入与输出图像的像素大小为512X512,输出是显示每个像 素类别的掩模图像。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于U-Net的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法，其特征在于，在 步骤S1中，所述建筑物原始图像的分辨率为3024 X 4032像素或3456 X 4608像素。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于U-Net的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法，其特征在于：在 步骤S3中，在选取200张图像作为初步数据集前，需将边界模糊、标记错误的数据集删掉，而 后再选取200张图像作为初步数据集，其中，70%的数据集用于训练，15%的数据集用于验 证,15%的数据集用于测试。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于U-Net的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法，其特征在于：在 步骤S4中，通过自定义函数以预定概率对图像进行转换,并使用Keras框架为网络提供数据 时实现强大的实时数据增强功能，具体的采用旋转、翻转、缩放和移位导致裂缝的位移、剪 切，使得裂缝略微变形，并且通过伽马变换改变图像亮度，通过上述操作以提高网络的泛化 能力。 5 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于U-Net的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法，其特征在于：在 步骤S4中，在卷积层中使用零填充以确保卷积层的输入图像和输出图像的尺寸保持不变。 6 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于U-Net的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法，其特征在于：在 步骤S4中，通过反向传播更新模型参数时，利用Adam梯度下降优化算法提高模型的收敛速 度。 7 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于U-Net的建筑物表面裂纹检测方法，其特征在于：在 步骤S5中，通过设置阈值为0.5将输入图像转换为二进制图像,即将小于阈值的像素值设置 为0，否则,设置为1，输出时，将所有像素值乘以255即可获得可见的预测掩模。

1 A method for detecting cracks on the surface of buildings based on U-Net, which is characterized by including the following steps: Step S1, image acquisition: use cameras and unmanned aerial vehicles to collect 30 original images of buildings containing cracks; Step S2 Image annotation: Using LabelMe, a graphical image annotation tool that supports semantic and instance segmentation, mark the crack area in each original image and save the annotation as a JSON file, and then convert these JSON files into grayscale label files, where the crack area is assigned The pixel value is 1, the background area is assigned the pixel value of 0; Step S3, image preprocessing: each original image and the corresponding label are randomly cut into 100, into a 512 X 512 pixel resolution picture; select 200 images as The preliminary data set is randomly divided into training set, validation set and test set according to the proportion; Step S4, model training: adopt the Keras framework to implement the U-Net system, and send the prepared data set to the U-Net network under the Anaconda platform Perform training and save the model after the training is completed; Step S5, use the model for crack detection: use the improved U-Net model to perform the crack extraction task, input the crack image to be detected into the U-Net model, and the input and output images The pixel size is 512X512, and the output is a mask image showing each pixel category. 2 The U-Net-based building surface crack detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that, in step S1, the resolution of the original image of the building is 3024 X 4032 pixels or 3456 X 4608 pixels . 3 A U-Net-based building surface crack detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that: in step S3, before 200 images are selected as the preliminary data set, the borders are blurred and the wrong markings are required. The data set is deleted, and then 200 images are selected as the preliminary data set. Among them, 70% of the data set is used for training, 15% of the data set is used for verification, and 15% of the data set is used for testing. 4 A U-Net-based building surface crack detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that: in step S4, the image is converted with a predetermined probability through a custom function, and the Keras framework is used to provide the network Realize the powerful real-time data enhancement function when data, specifically use rotation, flip, zoom and shift to cause the displacement and shear of the crack, which makes the crack slightly deformed, and changes the image brightness through gamma transformation. The above operations can improve the network performance. Generalization. 5 A U-Net-based building surface crack detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that: in step S4, zero padding is used in the convolutional layer to ensure the input image and output image of the convolutional layer The dimensions remain the same. 6 A U-Net-based building surface crack detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that: in step S4, when the model parameters are updated by backpropagation, the Adam gradient descent optimization algorithm is used to improve the convergence of the model speed. 7 A U-Net-based building surface crack detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that: in step S5, the input image is converted into a binary image by setting a threshold value of 0.5, that is, a pixel value smaller than the threshold value Set to 0, otherwise, set to 1. When outputting, multiply all pixel values by 255 to get a visible prediction mask.

title: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR GRADING X-RAY WELD IMAGE DEFECT; 一种X射线焊缝图像缺陷定级方法及系统
abstract:
本发明公开一种X射线焊缝图像缺陷定级方法及系统，所述定级方法包括：获取X射线焊缝图像；根据所述X射线焊缝图像确定X射线焊缝图像缺陷的类型、位置以及大小；根据所述缺陷的类型、位置以及大小确定所述X射线焊缝图像的缺陷等级。本发明中的定级方法实现了X射线焊缝图像缺陷检测与定级的全自动化，避免了由人工评判带来了漏判和误判，提高了定级精度。

The present invention discloses a method and system for grading X-ray weld image defects. The grading method includes: acquiring X-ray weld images; and determining the type and location of X-ray weld image defects according to the X-ray weld images. And size; the defect level of the X-ray weld image is determined according to the type, location, and size of the defect. The grading method of the present invention realizes the full automation of X-ray weld image defect detection and grading, avoids missed judgments and misjudgments caused by manual judgment, and improves the grading accuracy.
claims:
1 .一种X射线焊缝图像缺陷定级方法，其特征在于，所述定级方法包括： 获取X射线焊缝图像； 根据所述X射线焊缝图像确定X射线焊缝图像缺陷的类型、位置以及大小； 所述根据所述X射线焊缝图像确定X射线焊缝图像缺陷的类型、位置以及大小具体包 括： 采用标签制作法对X射线焊缝图像进行标签掩膜制作，得到掩膜标签； 采用图像增强法对所述X射线焊缝图像进行扩充； 根据扩充后的X射线焊缝图像构建深度学习模型； 以所述获取的X射线焊缝图像作为输入，所述掩膜标签作为监督信息，采用基于随机梯 度下降的反向传播方法对深度学习模型进行训练，得到训练模型； 具体的，训练模型中，网络采取的是全卷积网络结构，对图像的输入大小不加限制，网 络结构是基于U-Net的改进模型，将原始U-Net的4次下采样中第二个和第四个下采样结构 变为不改变分辨率的卷积结构，将U-Net的4次上采样中第二个和第四个上采样结构同样变 为不改变分辨率的卷积结构，每个下采样结构包含2个卷积层； 获取新的X射线焊缝图像作为测试图像； 将所述测试图像作为输入至所述训练模型，得到所述测试图像的缺陷类别和掩膜； 通过连通域法将缺陷利用外接矩形框出，得到每个缺陷的位置以及大小； 根据所述缺陷的类型、位置以及大小确定所述X射线焊缝图像的缺陷等级，具体包括： 根据所述缺陷的类型、位置以及大小，采用缺陷点数计算标准确定每个缺陷的点数； 获取焊缝板的厚度； 根据所述厚度确定定级框的大小； 根据所述定级框的大小，标记定级框的位置； 根据所述定级框的位置和每个缺陷的点数，计算定级框内所有缺陷的总点数； 根据所述总点数采用焊缝缺陷定级标准对X射线焊缝图像进行缺陷定级。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的X射线焊缝图像缺陷定级方法，其特征在于，所述采用标签制 作法对X射线焊缝图像进行标签掩膜制作，得到掩膜标签具体包括： 在X射线焊缝图像中缺陷位置画外接矩形，并确定缺陷类别； 将缺陷类型以及外接矩形的左上角坐标和右下角坐标写入xml文件中； 在xml文件中读取X射线焊缝图像中缺陷矩形框的位置信息； 根据所述位置信息，采用图像分割算法，提取每个矩形框内的缺陷轮廓，形成掩膜标 签。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的X射线焊缝图像缺陷定级方法，其特征在于，所述根据所述厚 度确定定级框的大小具体包括： 根据所述焊缝板的厚度确定定级框外接圆形窗口的半径； 根据所述半径采用滑动圆窗方式，以预先设定步长为间隔进行左右上下移动，确定缺 陷密集区域； 根据所述缺陷密集区域确定定级框中心位置，以预先设定角度为间隔，以所述中心位 置为圆心对定级框进行旋转，并计算旋转框内缺陷点总个数； 选取缺陷点数总和最大的旋转框作为定级框。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的X射线焊缝图像缺陷定级方法，其特征在于，所述X射线焊缝图 像为RGB三通道彩色图像。 5 .一种X射线焊缝图像缺陷定级系统，其特征在于，所述系统包括： 图像获取模块，用于获取X射线焊缝图像； 缺陷确定模块，用于根据所述X射线焊缝图像确定X射线焊缝图像缺陷的类型、位置以 及大小； 所述缺陷确定模块具体包括： 掩膜标签确定单元，用于采用标签制作法对X射线焊缝图像进行标签掩膜制作，得到掩 膜标签； 扩充单元，用于采用图像增强法对已获取的X射线焊缝图像进行扩充； 深度学习模型构建单元，用于根据扩充后的X射线焊缝图像构建深度学习模型； 训练模型确定单元，用于以所述获取的X射线焊缝图像作为输入，所述掩膜标签作为监 督信息，采用基于随机梯度下降的反向传播方法对深度学习模型进行训练，得到训练模型； 具体的，训练模型中，网络采取的是全卷积网络结构，对图像的输入大小不加限制，网 络结构是基于U-Net的改进模型，将原始U-Net的4次下采样中第二个和第四个下采样结构 变为不改变分辨率的卷积结构，将U-Net的4次上采样中第二个和第四个上采样结构同样变 为不改变分辨率的卷积结构，每个下采样结构包含2个卷积层； 测试图像获取单元，用于获取新的X射线焊缝图像作为测试图像； 缺陷类别和掩膜确定单元，用于将所述测试图像作为输入至所述训练模型，得到所述 测试图像的缺陷类别和掩膜； 缺陷的类别、位置以及大小确定单元，用于通过连通域法将缺陷利用外接矩形框出，得 到每个缺陷的位置以及大小； 缺陷等级确定模块，用于根据所述缺陷的类型、位置以及大小确定所述X射线焊缝图像 的缺陷等级，具体包括： 根据所述缺陷的类型、位置以及大小，采用缺陷点数计算标准确定每个缺陷的点数； 获取焊缝板的厚度； 根据所述厚度确定定级框的大小； 根据所述定级框的大小，标记定级框的位置； 根据所述定级框的位置和每个缺陷的点数，计算定级框内所有缺陷的总点数； 根据所述总点数采用焊缝缺陷定级标准对X射线焊缝图像进行缺陷定级。

1 A method for grading X-ray weld image defects, characterized in that the grading method comprises: obtaining an X-ray weld image; and determining the type and location of the X-ray weld image defect according to the X-ray weld image And size; the determining the type, location, and size of the X-ray weld image defect according to the X-ray weld image specifically includes: using a label manufacturing method to make a label mask on the X-ray weld image to obtain a mask label; Use image enhancement method to expand the X-ray weld image; construct a deep learning model based on the expanded X-ray weld image; use the acquired X-ray weld image as input, and the mask label as supervision information , Using the back propagation method based on stochastic gradient descent to train the deep learning model to obtain the training model; specifically, in the training model, the network adopts a fully convolutional network structure, and the input size of the image is not limited. The network structure It is an improved model based on U-Net, which converts the second and fourth down-sampling structure of the original U-Net's 4 down-sampling into a convolutional structure that does not change the resolution, and the U-Net's 4 up-sampling The second and the fourth up-sampling structure in the second and fourth up-sampling structures also become convolutional structures that do not change the resolution, and each down-sampling structure contains two convolutional layers; acquiring a new X-ray weld image as a test image; The test image is input to the training model to obtain the defect category and mask of the test image; The defect is framed by a circumscribed rectangle by the connected domain method to obtain the position and size of each defect; the defect level of the X-ray weld image is determined according to the type, position and size of the defect, which specifically includes: according to the defect The type, location and size of the defect points are calculated using the defect points calculation standard to determine the number of points for each defect; to obtain the thickness of the weld plate; to determine the size of the rating frame according to the thickness; to mark the rating frame according to the size of the rating frame According to the position of the grading frame and the number of points of each defect, calculate the total number of points of all defects in the grading frame; according to the total number of points, use the weld defect grading standard to determine the defect of the X-ray weld image level. 2 The method for grading X-ray weld image defects according to claim 1, wherein the method for labeling the X-ray weld image to obtain a mask label specifically includes: Draw a circumscribed rectangle for the defect position in the weld image and determine the defect category; write the defect type and the coordinates of the upper left corner and the lower right corner of the circumscribed rectangle into the xml file; read the defect rectangle in the X-ray weld image in the xml file According to the position information, an image segmentation algorithm is used to extract the contour of the defect in each rectangular frame to form a mask label. 3 The X-ray weld image defect grading method according to claim 1, wherein the determining the size of the grading frame according to the thickness specifically comprises: determining the circumstance of the grading frame according to the thickness of the weld plate The radius of the circular window; a sliding round window method is adopted according to the radius, and the defect-intensive area is determined by moving left and right up and down at intervals of a preset step length; the center position of the grading frame is determined according to the defect-intensive area to preset Set the angle as the interval, rotate the grading frame with the center position as the center of the circle, and calculate the total number of defective points in the rotating frame; select the rotating frame with the largest sum of defective points as the grading frame. 4 The X-ray weld image defect grading method according to claim 1, wherein the X-ray weld image is an RGB three-channel color image. 5 A system for grading X-ray weld image defects, characterized in that the system comprises: an image acquisition module for acquiring an X-ray weld image; a defect determination module for determining according to the X-ray weld image The type, location, and size of the X-ray weld image defect; the defect determination module specifically includes: a mask label determination unit for making a label mask on the X-ray weld image by using a label manufacturing method to obtain a mask label; The expansion unit is used to expand the acquired X-ray weld image by image enhancement; the deep learning model construction unit is used to construct a deep learning model based on the expanded X-ray weld image; the training model determination unit is used to Taking the acquired X-ray weld image as input and the mask label as supervision information, the deep learning model is trained using the back propagation method based on stochastic gradient descent to obtain the training model; specifically, in the training model, The network adopts a fully convolutional network structure, and there is no restriction on the input size of the image. The network structure is based on an improved model of U-Net, which downsamples the second and fourth of the original U-Net 4 times. The structure becomes a convolutional structure that does not change the resolution. The second and fourth up-sampling structures in U-Net's 4 up-sampling are also changed to a convolutional structure that does not change the resolution. Each down-sampling structure contains 2 convolutional layers; test image acquisition unit, used to acquire a new X-ray weld image as a test image; The defect category and mask determination unit is used to input the test image to the training model to obtain the defect category and mask of the test image; the defect category, location and size determination unit is used to pass the connected domain The defect is framed by a circumscribed rectangle to obtain the position and size of each defect; The defect level determination module is used to determine the defect level of the X-ray weld image according to the type, location and size of the defect, which specifically includes: According to the type, location and size of the defect, the defect point calculation standard is used to determine the number of points for each defect; to obtain the thickness of the weld plate; to determine the size of the rating frame according to the thickness; according to the size of the rating frame, Mark the position of the grading frame; Calculate the total number of points of all defects in the grading frame according to the position of the grading frame and the number of points for each defect; According to the total number of points, use the weld defect grading standard to perform the X-ray weld The images are rated for defects.

title: A PAVEMENT CRACK DEFECT DETECTION METHOD BASED ON CONFRONTATION GENERATION NETWORK; 一种基于对抗生成网络的路面裂缝缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于对抗生成网络的路面裂缝缺陷检测方法，包括如下步骤：S1、将图像数据X输入至生成器并生成与裂缝标签Y对应的赝品标签Y’；S2、将图像数据X和赝品标签Y’在通道上进行连接，传输至辨别器并输出第一结果G_n；S3、将图像数据X和裂缝标签Y在通道上进行连接，传输至辨别器并输出第二结果G_p；S4、训练辨别器判断G_p为真，G_n为假，并将判断假的部分反向传播调整生成器参数；S5、更换所述图像数据X并重复步骤S1‑S4对生成器和辨别器重复训练，直到辨别器无法判别G_p为真，G_n为假；S6、训练完成后，固定生成器参数，将要检测的图片输入生成器，输出一个1280*1280*1的得分矩阵，然后通过阀值进行过滤，得出检测结果。能够更清楚的辨别裂缝病害。

The invention discloses a road crack defect detection method based on a confrontation generation network, which includes the following steps: S1, input image data X to a generator and generate a counterfeit label Y'corresponding to the crack label Y; S2, image data X Connect with the fake label Y'on the channel, transmit to the discriminator and output the first result G_n; S3, connect the image data X and the crack label Y on the channel, transmit to the discriminator and output the second result G_p; S4 , The training discriminator judges that G_p is true and G_n is false, and the part of the judged false is backpropagated to adjust the generator parameters; S5. Replace the image data X and repeat steps S1-S4 to repeat the training of the generator and the discriminator, Until the discriminator can't distinguish G_p as true and G_n as false; S6. After the training is completed, the generator parameters are fixed, the image to be detected is input to the generator, and a score matrix of 1280*1280*1 is output, and then filtered by the threshold. Get the test results. Can identify cracks and diseases more clearly.

title: A PAVEMENT CRACK DEFECT DETECTION METHOD BASED ON CONFRONTATION GENERATION NETWORK; 一种基于对抗生成网络的路面裂缝缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于对抗生成网络的路面裂缝缺陷检测方法，包括如下步骤：S1、将图像数据X输入至生成器并生成与裂缝标签Y对应的赝品标签Y’；S2、将图像数据X和赝品标签Y’在通道上进行连接，传输至辨别器并输出第一结果G_n；S3、将图像数据X和裂缝标签Y在通道上进行连接，传输至辨别器并输出第二结果G_p；S4、训练辨别器判断G_p为真，G_n为假，并将判断假的部分反向传播调整生成器参数；S5、更换所述图像数据X并重复步骤S1‑S4对生成器和辨别器重复训练，直到辨别器无法判别G_p为真，G_n为假；S6、训练完成后，固定生成器参数，将要检测的图片输入生成器，输出一个1280*1280*1的得分矩阵，然后通过阀值进行过滤，得出检测结果。能够更清楚的辨别裂缝病害。

The invention discloses a road crack defect detection method based on a confrontation generation network, which includes the following steps: S1, input image data X to a generator and generate a counterfeit label Y'corresponding to the crack label Y; S2, image data X Connect with the fake label Y'on the channel, transmit to the discriminator and output the first result G_n; S3, connect the image data X and the crack label Y on the channel, transmit to the discriminator and output the second result G_p; S4 , The training discriminator judges that G_p is true and G_n is false, and the part of the judged false is backpropagated to adjust the generator parameters; S5. Replace the image data X and repeat steps S1-S4 to repeat the training of the generator and the discriminator, Until the discriminator can't distinguish G_p as true and G_n as false; S6. After the training is completed, the generator parameters are fixed, the image to be detected is input to the generator, and a score matrix of 1280*1280*1 is output, and then filtered by the threshold. Get the test results. Can identify cracks and diseases more clearly.

title: IMAGE DETECTION METHOD OF ROAD CRACKS; 路面裂缝图像检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种路面裂缝图像检测方法，所述方法包括：获取待检测路面图像；获取训练数据，所述训练数据包括多个路面图像与每个所述路面图像对应的裂缝标记图像；获取预训练的深度模型，并基于所述深度模型构建初始路面裂缝检测模型；基于所述训练数据，训练所述初始路面裂缝检测模型；基于训练后得到的路面裂缝检测模型，获取所述待检测路面图像的裂缝标记图像，得到路面裂缝图像检测结果。本发明能够根据预训练的深度模型构建路面裂缝检测模型，提高了模型训练效率，还提高了所获取的裂缝标记图像的精度。

The invention discloses a road crack image detection method. The method includes: acquiring a road surface image to be detected; acquiring training data, the training data including a plurality of road surface images and a crack mark image corresponding to each of the road surface images; and acquiring Pre-trained depth model, and build an initial road crack detection model based on the depth model; train the initial road crack detection model based on the training data; obtain the road surface to be detected based on the road crack detection model obtained after training The crack marks the image of the image, and the result of road crack image detection is obtained. The invention can construct a pavement crack detection model based on the pre-trained depth model, improves the efficiency of model training, and also improves the accuracy of the acquired crack mark images.
claims:
1 .一种路面裂缝图像检测方法,其特征在于，包括： 步骤S1,获取待检测路面图像； 步骤S2,获取训练数据，所述训练数据包括多个路面图像与每个所述路面图像对应的 裂缝标记图像； 步骤S3,获取预训练的深度模型，并基于所述深度模型构建初始路面裂缝检测模型； 步骤S4，基于所述训练数据，训练所述初始路面裂缝检测模型； 步骤S5,基于训练后得到的路面裂缝检测模型，获取所述待检测路面图像的裂缝标记 图像，得到路面裂缝图像检测结果。 2 .如权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述深度模型取为VGG16模型，所述路面裂缝 检测模型为VGG-U-net模型。 3 .如权利要求2所述的方法，其特征在于，所述VGG16模型包括输入层、m个编码卷积结 构、p个全连接结构以及输出层，其中，m和p均为正整数，每个编码卷积结构包括至少两个卷 积层和一个池化层，所述全连接结构包括多个全连接层。 4 .如权利要求3所述的方法，其特征在于，所述VGG-U-net模型包括： 编码部分，所述编码部分包括所述VGG16模型的输入层和前n个编码卷积结构，其中，n 为小于等于m的正整数； 解码部分，所述解码部分包括n个解码卷积结构和输出结构，每个所述解码卷积结构包 括至少两个卷积层和一个上采样层，所述输出结构包括至少两个卷积层和一个输出层。 5 .如权利要求4所述的方法，其特征在于，所述上采样层对前一个卷积层输出的图像进 行上采样计算。 6 .如权利要求5所述的方法，其特征在于，所述上采样计算包括以下步骤： 步骤S21，上采样，基于反卷积核，确定所述上采样层前一个卷积层输出的图像的第一 特征图像，所述第一特征图像包括p个通道，其中，p为大于2的整数； 步骤S22,图像复制，复制所述编码部分中通道数为p的第二特征图像； 步骤S23,图像裁剪，将所述第二特征图像裁剪为与所述第一特征图像像素数量相同的 第三特征图像； 步骤S24,图像合并，将所述第三特征图像与所述第一特征图像进行合并，得到第四特 征图像。 7 .如权利要求4所述的方法，其特征在于，所述池化层采用最大池化法，且采样窗口为2 X 2 ；所述上采样层采用反卷积法，且反卷积核为2 X 2的矩阵。 8 .如权利要求4所述的方法，其特征在于， 所述编码卷积结构还包括归一化层、激活层和随机失活层； 所述解码卷积结构还包括激活层和随机失活层。 9 .如权利要求2所述的方法，其特征在于，所述获取预训练的VGG16模型包括： 基于所述训练数据，训练所述VGG16模型；或者 加载ImageNet数据集中已训练的VGG16模型。 10 .如权利要求2所述的方法，其特征在于，所述基于所述训练数据，训练所述初始VGGU-net模型包括： 步骤S31，基于所述VGG16模型，对所述VGG-U-net模型的编码部分的参数进行初始化； 步骤S32,通过所述VGG-U-net模型，确定所述训练数据中路面图像的输出特征图； 步骤S33,将所述输出特征图转换为概率分布图； 步骤S34,计算所述概率分布图与所述裂缝标记图像之间的偏差值； 步骤S35，根据所述偏差值，更新所述VGG-U-net模型中解码部分的参数，再基于更新参 数后的VGG-U-net模型，重复执行所述步骤S32、步骤S33和步骤S34,直至所述偏差值小于预 设阈值，得到训练完成的VGG-U-net模型。

1 A road surface crack image detection method, characterized by comprising: Step S1, acquiring a road image to be detected; Step S2, acquiring training data, the training data including multiple road images and cracks corresponding to each of the road images Mark the image; a decoding part, the decoding part includes n decoded convolutional structures and an output structure, each of the decoded convolutional structures includes at least two convolutional layers and an upsampling layer, the The output structure includes at least two convolutional layers and one output layer. 5 The method of claim 4, wherein the up-sampling layer performs up-sampling calculation on the image output by the previous convolutional layer. 6 The method of claim 5, wherein the up-sampling calculation includes the following steps: Step S21, up-sampling, based on a deconvolution kernel, determining the image output by the previous convolutional layer of the up-sampling layer The first feature image, the first feature image includes p channels, where p is an integer greater than 2; Step S22, the image is copied, and the second feature image with the number of channels p in the encoding part is copied; Step S23, Image cropping, cropping the second feature image into a third feature image with the same number of pixels as the first feature image; step S24, image merging, merging the third feature image with the first feature image , Get the fourth feature image. 7 The method of claim 4, wherein the pooling layer adopts a maximum pooling method, and the sampling window is 2 X 2; the up-sampling layer adopts a deconvolution method, and the deconvolution kernel is 2 X 2 matrix. 8 The method of claim 4, wherein the coded convolution structure further includes a normalization layer, an activation layer, and a random inactivation layer; the decoding convolution structure further includes an activation layer and a random inactivation layer . 9 The method of claim 2, wherein the obtaining the pre-trained VGG16 model comprises: training the VGG16 model based on the training data; or loading the trained VGG16 model in the ImageNet dataset. 10 The method according to claim 2, wherein the training of the initial VGGU-net model based on the training data comprises: Step S31, based on the VGG16 model, performing the training on the VGG-U-net model To initialize the parameters of the encoding part; Step S32: Determine the output feature map of the road image in the training data through the VGG-U-net model; Step S33: Convert the output feature map to a probability distribution map; Step S34, Calculate the probability distribution map The deviation value from the crack mark image; Step S35, according to the deviation value, update the parameters of the decoding part of the VGG-U-net model, and then repeat based on the updated VGG-U-net model The steps S32, S33, and S34 are executed until the deviation value is less than the preset threshold, and the trained VGG-U-net model is obtained.

title: A DAM SLOPE CRACK DETECTION METHOD AND A BIONIC GECKO CRAWLING DETECTION DEVICE; 一种水坝斜坡裂缝检测方法及仿生壁虎爬行检测装置
abstract:
本发明公开了一种水坝斜坡裂缝检测方法和仿生壁虎爬行检测装置。该方法首先训练神经网络，然后采用训练好的u‑net神经网络，对实时采集的水坝裂缝图像进行检测，准确分割图像中的裂缝与背景杂物。在对倾斜水坝进行裂缝检测时，采用仿生壁虎爬行检测装置，该检测装置包括机身、行走仿生机构、摄像机夹持机构和光源照明系统。本发明通过神经网络和双目视觉检测系统可以很好地检测倾斜水坝裂缝，包括裂缝宽度、裂缝深度等信息，检测精度高，而且通过行走仿生机构使得检测装置能够很稳定的在倾斜水坝上行走和检测。

The invention discloses a method for detecting cracks in a dam slope and a bionic gecko crawling detection device. The method first trains the neural network, and then uses the trained unet neural network to detect real-time images of dam cracks and accurately segment the cracks and background debris in the image. When detecting cracks on inclined dams, a bionic gecko crawling detection device is used. The detection device includes a fuselage, a walking bionic mechanism, a camera clamping mechanism and a light source lighting system. The present invention can well detect the cracks of the inclined dam through the neural network and the binocular vision detection system, including crack width, crack depth and other information, and the detection accuracy is high, and the detection device can walk on the inclined dam stably through the walking bionic mechanism and detection.

1. A kind of dam slope crack detection method is characterized in that comprising the following steps: (1) training neural network: .preparing the training set and test set of neural network: first gather the real-time image of dam slope with CCD industrial camera and carry out preprocessing, Then the image is enhanced, including flipping, translation or rotation, to obtain more than 1000 crack images; then 60-80% of the images are used as a training set for network training, and 20-40% of the images are used as a test set for network testing; 1 - 2. Adjust the parameters of the neural network: by adjusting the parameters of the U-net neural network, the U-net neural network can adapt to the crack image, thereby accurately segmenting cracks and background debris; 1-3. Test: Use the test set obtained in step 1-1 to test the training results of the U-net neural network, and evaluate through the uniform intersection and union ratio MI0U and Dice coefficients; (2) Use the trained u-net neural network , to detect the dam crack images collected in real time, and accurately segment the cracks and background debris in the image: 2-1. Camera calibration: aim the camera at a known structure with many independently identifiable points, obtain the calibration image, and then use the built-in functions of OpenCV to find the internal and external parameters of the camera, where the internal parameters include the rotation matrix R and translation vector T; 2-2. Correct the image: the left and right cameras capture the real-time left and right images of the dam cracks; then according to the rotation matrix R and translation vector T obtained in step 2-1, correct the real-time left and right images to obtain the corrected left and right images ; 2-3. title: DEEP LEARNING-BASED DAM SLOPE CRACK DETECTION METHOD AND BIONIC GECKO CRAWLING DETECTION DEVICE; 一种基于深度学习的水坝斜坡裂缝检测方法及仿生壁虎爬行检测装置
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于深度学习的水坝斜坡裂缝检测方法和仿生壁虎爬行检测装置。该方法首先训练神经网络，然后采用训练好的u‑net神经网络，对实时采集的水坝裂缝图像进行检测，准确分割图像中的裂缝与背景杂物。在对倾斜水坝进行裂缝检测时，采用仿生壁虎爬行检测装置，该检测装置包括机身、行走仿生机构、摄像机夹持机构和光源照明系统。本发明通过神经网络和双目视觉检测系统可以很好地检测倾斜水坝裂缝，包括裂缝宽度、裂缝深度等信息，检测精度高，而且通过行走仿生机构使得检测装置能够很稳定的在倾斜水坝上行走和检测。

The invention discloses a dam slope crack detection method based on deep learning and a bionic gecko crawling detection device. This method first trains the neural network, and then uses the trained unet neural network to detect real-time images of dam cracks, and accurately segment the cracks and background debris in the image. When detecting cracks in inclined dams, a bionic gecko crawling detection device is used, which includes a body, a walking bionic mechanism, a camera clamping mechanism, and a light source lighting system. The invention can well detect the cracks of the inclined dam through the neural network and the binocular vision detection system, including information such as crack width, crack depth, etc., with high detection accuracy, and the walking bionic mechanism enables the detection device to stably walk on the inclined dam And detection.

title: BINOCULAR SCANNING AND DEEP LEARNING FUSION RECOGNITION METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR CONTINUOUS CASTING SLAB SURFACE DEFECTS; 连铸坯表面缺陷双目扫描与深度学习融合识别方法及系统
abstract:
本发明涉及一种连铸坯表面缺陷双目扫描与深度学习融合识别方法及系统，所述方法包括采用双目激光扫描成像提取连铸坯表面的三维形貌图像，根据深度信息定位感兴趣区域ROI，生成缺陷识别候选框，采用全连接神经网络对候选框内缺陷区域进行真实缺陷判别和类型识别，对于真实存在的缺陷，采用全卷积神经网络进行语义分割，本发明通过融合双目激光三维扫描成像与深度卷积神经网络目标识别和语义分割方法，能够精确识别缺陷三维量化形态信息，属于钢铁冶金中连铸坯质量检测与控制的领域。

The invention relates to a continuous casting slab surface defect binocular scanning and deep learning fusion recognition method and system. The method includes using binocular laser scanning imaging to extract a three-dimensional topography image of the continuous casting slab surface, and locating an area of interest according to depth information ROI is used to generate defect recognition candidate frames, and the fully connected neural network is used to perform real defect discrimination and type recognition on the defect area in the candidate frame. For real defects, a full convolutional neural network is used for semantic segmentation. The present invention integrates binocular lasers Three-dimensional scanning imaging and deep convolutional neural network target recognition and semantic segmentation methods can accurately identify the three-dimensional quantitative morphological information of defects, and belong to the field of continuous casting slab quality inspection and control in iron and steel metallurgy.

title: A PIXEL-LEVEL CLASSIFICATION METHOD FOR FABRIC DEFECTS BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 一种基于深度学习的织物缺陷像素级分类方法
abstract:
本发明提供一种基于深度学习的织物缺陷像素级分类方法，具体按照如下步骤实施：步骤1，采集有缺陷的织物图像组成图片集；步骤2，建立MobileNetV2网络模型；步骤3，用MobileNetV2网络模型对预训练集进行训练；步骤4，建立Mobile‑Unet网络模型；步骤5利用Mobile‑Unet网络模型对训练集进行训练；步骤6，训练好的Mobile‑Unet网络模型对输入图片进行分类，输出分类后的图像。本发明能够对有缺陷织物进行像素级分割，且本发明中参数与模型更小，提高了算法的鲁棒性。

The present invention provides a pixel-level classification method for fabric defects based on deep learning, which is specifically implemented according to the following steps: Step 1, collecting defective fabric images to form a picture set; Step 2, establishing a MobileNetV2 network model; Step 3, using the MobileNetV2 network model Train the pre-training set; Step 4, establish the Mobile-Unet network model; Step 5, use the Mobile-Unet network model to train the training set; Step 6, the trained Mobile-Unet network model classifies the input image and outputs the classification after the image. The invention can perform pixel-level segmentation on defective fabrics, and the parameters and models in the invention are smaller, which improves the robustness of the algorithm.

title: A METHOD FOR SEGMENTING DEFECTS IN DRAINAGE PIPES BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 一种基于深度学习的排水管道缺陷分割方法
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于深度学习的排水管道缺陷分割方法，包括：选取视频帧，形成管道图像集，并根据缺陷类型对其进行缺陷划分，划分为：破裂、错口、渗漏和支管暗接四类；对管道图像数据集进行数据标注，获得标注后的Mask图像，并对管道图像数据集进行数据增强；搭建基于U‑Net和SE模块的语义分割网络；使用反向传播算法对神经网络进行训练，训练过程中保存训练损失最小的网络模型；使用保存的模型对测试集进行测试，得到管道缺陷图片的分割结果图片。

The invention relates to a deep learning-based drainage pipeline defect segmentation method, which includes: selecting video frames to form a pipeline image set, and classifying the defects according to defect types into: rupture, misalignment, leakage and branch pipe hidden connection Four categories; perform data annotation on the pipeline image data set, obtain the annotated Mask image, and perform data enhancement on the pipeline image data set; build a semantic segmentation network based on UNet and SE modules; use the back propagation algorithm to perform neural network optimization Carry out training and save the network model with the smallest training loss during the training process; use the saved model to test the test set and obtain the segmentation result image of the pipeline defect image.
claims:
1 .一种基于深度学习的排水管道缺陷分割方法，大致步骤如下描述： 步骤1：选取视频帧，形成管道图像集，并根据缺陷类型对其进行缺陷划分，划分为:破裂、错□、渗漏和支管暗接四类； 步骤2:对管道图像数据集进行数据标注，获得标注后的Mask图像，并对管道图像数据集进行数据增强； 步骤3：将进行数据增强后的数据集划分为训练集和测试集； 步骤4：搭建基于U-Net和SE模块的语义分割网络，继承语义分割网络的架构，分为 encoder部分和decoder部分，其中encoder部分采用VGG16结构形式，并在VGG16的基础上进行修改，去掉最后的池化层和全连接层；decoder采用上采样对encoder最终输出的Feature map进行特征恢复，然后将上采样部分和encoder处理后的部分用concatenate的方式连接； 进行连接后紧跟着2个3*3卷积层，这2个卷积层的参数设置和encoder对应的处理部分相同；其中和decoder相连的encoder部分的处理方式是采用concatenate的方式先对encoder 部分的相连的两个卷积层进行连接，将连接后的Feature map用SE模块进行处理，然后进行 3*3卷积，该卷积的滤波器数量和相连的两个卷积层的数量相同；decoder部分最后采用一个1*1卷积最终输出分割后的图像； 步骤5：使用反向传播算法对神经网络进行训练，训练过程中保存训练损失最小的网络模型； 步骤6：使用保存的模型对测试集进行测试，得到管道缺陷图片的分割结果图片。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于,步骤2）中，采用的数据增强方法为高斯噪声、图像翻转和色彩抖动三种方式。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，步骤5）中，网络训练使用Nvidia GPU进行。

1 .A drainage pipeline defect segmentation method based on deep learning. The general steps are described as follows: Step 1: Select video frames to form a pipeline image set, and classify them according to defect types: rupture, fault, and leakage There are four categories of hidden connections with branch pipes; Step 2: Perform data annotation on the pipeline image data set, obtain the annotated Mask image, and perform data enhancement on the pipeline image data set; Step 3: Divide the data set after data enhancement into training Set and test set; Step 4: Build a semantic segmentation network based on U-Net and SE modules, inherit the architecture of the semantic segmentation network, and divide it into an encoder part and a decoder part. The encoder part adopts the VGG16 structure and is based on VGG16. Make modifications to remove the final pooling layer and fully connected layer; the decoder uses upsampling to restore the features of the feature map finally output by the encoder, and then concatenates the upsampled part and the encoder-processed part using concatenate; After the connection, Following two 3*3 convolutional layers, the parameter settings of these two convolutional layers are the same as the processing parts corresponding to the encoder; the processing method of the encoder part connected to the decoder is to use the concatenate method to first connect the encoder part. The two convolutional layers are connected, and the connected Feature The map is processed with the SE module, and then a 3*3 convolution is performed. The number of filters in this convolution is the same as the number of the two connected convolution layers; the decoder part finally uses a 1*1 convolution to finally output the segmented image. ; Step 5: Use the back propagation algorithm to train the neural network, and save the network model with the smallest training loss during the training process; Step 6: Use the saved model to test the test set, and obtain the segmentation result image of the pipeline defect image. 2 . The method according to claim 1, characterized in that in step 2), the data enhancement methods adopted are Gaussian noise, image flipping and color dithering. 3 . The method according to claim 1, characterized in that in step 5), network training is performed using Nvidia GPU.

title: METHOD AND EQUIPMENT FOR DETECTING APPEARANCE DEFECTS OF ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT; 一种用于电子设备外观瑕疵检测的方法与设备
abstract:
本申请的目的是提供一种用于电子设备外观瑕疵检测的方法与设备。与现有技术相比，本申请通过获取待检测的电子设备外观图像，然后基于所述电子设备外观图像提取目标检测区域，并将所述目标检测区域输入训练结束后的神经网络模型，然后，接收所述神经网络模型输出的所述目标检测区域的瑕疵检测结果，所述瑕疵检测结果包括：所述目标检测区域的瑕疵种类、瑕疵在所述目标检测区域的位置和瑕疵检测结果的置信度，通过这种方式，能够准确地识别二手电子设备如手机的屏幕外观的瑕疵差异。

The purpose of this application is to provide a method and device for detecting the appearance defect of an electronic device. Compared with the prior art, this application obtains the appearance image of the electronic device to be detected, then extracts the target detection area based on the appearance image of the electronic device, and inputs the target detection area into the neural network model after training, and then, Receive the defect detection result of the target detection area output by the neural network model, the defect detection result including: the defect type of the target detection area, the position of the defect in the target detection area, and the confidence of the defect detection result In this way, it is possible to accurately identify the differences in the appearance of second-hand electronic devices such as mobile phones.
claims:

步骤一，预设神经网络模型及其初始的模型参数； 步骤二，将样本目标检测区域输入带有当前的模型参数的神经网络模型，得到所述样 本目标检测区域的瑕疵预测结果，所述瑕疵预测结果包括:样本目标检测区域的瑕疵种类、 瑕疵在所述样本目标检测区域中的位置和瑕疵检测结果的置信度； 步骤三，基于预设目标函数计算所述瑕疵预测结果与所述样本目标检测区域的真实瑕 疵结果之间的差值，识别所述差值是否大于第二预设阈， title: SCREEN APPEARANCE DEFECT DETECTION METHOD AND EQUIPMENT; 屏幕外观瑕疵检测方法及设备
abstract:
本发明的目的是提供一种屏幕外观瑕疵检测方法及设备，本发明通过获取电子设备的外观图像；从所述电子设备的外观图像中提取该电子设备的屏幕外观区域图像；将所述屏幕外观区域图像输入训练结束后的FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型；从所述FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型接收输出的电子设备的屏幕外观区域的瑕疵检测结果，所述瑕疵检测结果包括：电子设备的屏幕的瑕疵种类、瑕疵在电子设备的屏幕中的位置和瑕疵检测结果的置信度，能够准确地识别二手电子设备如手机的屏幕外观的瑕疵差异。

The purpose of the present invention is to provide a method and device for detecting screen appearance defects. The present invention obtains the appearance image of the electronic device; extracts the screen appearance area image of the electronic device from the appearance image of the electronic device; The model of the FPN network combined with the backbone network after the regional image input training is completed; the defect detection result of the screen appearance area of the electronic device is received from the model of the FPN network combined with the backbone network, and the defect detection result includes: the screen of the electronic device The types of defects, the position of the defects on the screen of the electronic device, and the confidence level of the defect detection result can accurately identify the difference in the appearance of the screen of second-hand electronic devices such as mobile phones.

title: METHOD AND EQUIPMENT FOR DETECTING APPEARANCE DEFECT OF ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT BACKPLANE; 电子设备背板外观瑕疵检测方法及设备
abstract:
本发明的目的是提供一种电子设备背板外观瑕疵检测方法及设备，本发明通过获取电子设备的外观图像；从所述电子设备的外观图像中提取该电子设备的背板外观区域图像，将所述背板外观区域图像调整为长度和宽度相同的图像；将调整后的背板外观区域图像输入训练结束后的FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型；从所述FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型接收输出的电子设备的背板外观区域的瑕疵检测结果，所述瑕疵检测结果包括：电子设备的背板的瑕疵种类、瑕疵在电子设备的背板中的位置和瑕疵检测结果的置信度，能够准确地识别二手电子设备如手机的电子设备背板外观的瑕疵差异。

The object of the present invention is to provide a method and device for detecting the appearance defect of the backplane of an electronic device. The present invention obtains the appearance image of the electronic device; extracts the appearance area image of the backplane of the electronic device from the appearance image of the electronic device, and The image of the backplane appearance area is adjusted to an image with the same length and width; the adjusted backplane appearance area image is input into the model of the FPN network combined with the backbone network after the training is completed; the output is received from the model of the FPN network combined with the backbone network The defect detection result of the appearance area of the backplane of the electronic device, the defect detection result includes: the type of the defect of the backplane of the electronic device, the position of the defect in the backplane of the electronic device, and the confidence of the defect detection result can be accurately Identify the differences in the appearance of second-hand electronic devices such as mobile phones' electronic device back panels.

title: A SEMI-SUPERVISED INDUSTRIAL IMAGE DEFECT SEGMENTATION METHOD BASED ON ADVERSARIAL GENERATIVE NETWORK; 一种基于对抗生成网络的半监督工业图像缺陷分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开一种基于对抗生成网络的半监督工业图像缺陷分割方法，使用少量标注的带有缺陷的负样本和大量没有缺陷的正样本来训练神经网络从而得到能对缺陷自动识别的分割网络。在神经网络的构建过程中分别使用了基于D‑LinkNet的分割网络和基于U‑net重构网络，通过交叉训练的方式来分离负样本和正样本的特征空间从而使分割网络能正确分割出负样本中的缺陷。本方法能大大减少对工业缺陷样本图像的依赖，同时能大幅度减少分割模型在分割缺陷时的误差。

The invention discloses a semi-supervised industrial image defect segmentation method based on a confrontation generation network, which uses a small number of labeled negative samples with defects and a large number of positive samples without defects to train a neural network to obtain a segmentation network capable of automatically identifying defects. In the construction of the neural network, the segmentation network based on D-LinkNet and the reconstruction network based on U-net are used respectively, and the feature space of negative samples and positive samples is separated by cross-training so that the segmentation network can correctly segment negative samples Defects in. This method can greatly reduce the dependence on industrial defect sample images, and can greatly reduce the error of the segmentation model when segmenting defects.

title: A SPECIAL METAL DEFECT DETECTION SYSTEM BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，包括以下步骤：1)获取特种金属图片数据集作为原始数据集；2)对特种金属图片数据集进行数据增强；3)根据增强后的数据集对Mask RCNN模型进行训练；4)将待检测的图片输入训练好的Mask RCNN模型中，输出检测过后的图片。与现有技术相比，本发明具有降低数据采集成本和人工检测成本，简化检测过程，提高工作效率等优点。

The present invention relates to a special metal defect detection system based on deep learning, including the following steps: 1) Obtain a special metal picture data set as the original data set; 2) Perform data enhancement on the special metal picture data set; 3) According to the enhanced The data set trains the Mask RCNN model; 4) Input the image to be detected into the trained Mask RCNN model, and output the detected image. Compared with the prior art, the present invention has the advantages of reducing data collection cost and manual detection cost, simplifying the detection process, and improving work efficiency.
claims:
1. 一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，用以在没有人工辅助的情况下根据特 种金属照片对瑕疵进行检测和定位，其特征在于，包括以下步骤： 1） 获取特种金属图片数据集作为原始数据集； 2） 对特种金属图片数据集进行数据增强； 3） 根据增强后的数据集对Mask RCNN模型进行训练； 4） 将待检测的图片输入训练好的Mask RCNN模型中，输出检测过后的图片。 2. 根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，其特征在于，所 述的步骤2）具体包括以下步骤： 21） 采用Data Augmentation GAN对特种金属图片数据集进行数据增强； 22） 采用lableme标注工具，对增强后数据集进行标注，标注出多边形轮廓，获取json格 式文件存储样本中瑕疵的轮廓顶点； 23） 进一步扩大数据集规模，并根据变换规则同时生成标注的j son文件； 24） 采用旋转、翻转、放大后裁剪局部、修改对比度、增加高斯噪声的方式，进一步扩大 数据集，最终得到训练用的数据集。 3. 根据权利要求2所述的一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，其特征在于，所 述的Data Augmentation GAN包括生成器和判别器。 4. 根据权利要求3所述的一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，其特征在于，所 述的生成器包括UNet和ResNet两个网络，共8个模块，每个模块均由4个带有leaky relu激 活函数和batch normalization的卷积层以及一个下采样层或一个上采样层组成，所述的 下采样层依次包括步长为2的卷积层、leaky relu层、batch normalization层和dropout 层，所述的上采样层依次包括步长为1/2的复制器、卷积层、leaky relu层、normalization 层和dropout层。 5. 根据权利要求3所述的一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，其特征在于，所 述的判别器为采用 layer normalization 代替 batch normalization 的 DenseNet，所述的 DenseNet由4个Dense模块和4个过渡层组成，其增长率为64，每个Dense模块由4个卷积层组 成，对于每个Dense模块的最后一个卷积层，均通过一个dropout提升最后结果。 6. 根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，其特征在于，所 述的步骤3）具体包括以下步骤： 31） 对增强后的数据集变换尺寸为800x800大小； 32） 根据尺寸变换后的图片训练Mask RCNN模型； 33） Mask RCNN模型中的卷积骨干网络由ResNet101和FPN组成，用来提取特征图，RPN根 据特征图生成多个ROI，通过ROIAlign，采用双线性插值点方法，将多个ROI的尺寸统一为 7x7,最后对多个ROI进行分类，采用定位框回归，并使用FCN生成mask，其损失函数L表示为： L = Lcls+Lbox+Lmask 其中，Lcls为分类的损失，Lbox为定位框的损失，Lmask为mask的损失。 7. 根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，其特征在于，所 述的步骤3）中，根据COCO数据集上训练的权重进行fine tuning训练Mask RCNN模型。 8. 根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，其特征在于，所 述的步骤4）中，将待测图片输入训练好的Mask RCNN模型，输出待测图片并标注模型得到的 CN 110992318 A 权 利 要 求 书 检测框，若不存在检测框，则说明图片为正常图片，否则为瑕疵图片，瑕疵具体位置为检测 框标注位置。 9.根据权利要求2所述的一种基于深度学习的特种金属瑕疵检测系统，其特征在于，所 述的步骤23）中，通过以下方式进一步扩大数据集规模： A、 增加瑕疵:随机选取瑕疵部分，将该瑕疵粘贴在随机的正常区域； 或者 B、 减少瑕疵:随机选择瑕疵，将复制的正常区域覆盖原有的瑕疵。

RPN generates multiple ROIs based on the feature maps. Through ROIAlign, the bilinear interpolation point method is used to unify the size of multiple ROIs. It is 7x7, and finally classifies multiple ROIs, uses positioning frame regression, and uses FCN to generate a mask, and its loss function L is expressed as: L = Lcls+Lbox+Lmask Among them, Lcls is the loss of classification, Lbox is the loss of positioning frame, and Lmask is the loss of mask. 7. Add defects: randomly select the defect part and paste the defect in a random normal area; or B. Reduce blemishes: randomly select blemishes, and cover the original blemishes with the copied normal area.

title: A SMALL SAMPLE DEFECT CLASSIFICATION METHOD AND DEVICE; 一种小样本缺陷分类方法和装置
abstract:
本发明公开了一种小样本缺陷分类方法和装置。该方法包括：对待测目标进行部件分离，按照分离后的部件将待测目标的原图像分割成至少两个包含有不同部件的子图像；对应每个子图像以及原图像，分别建立小样本分类模型，借助对应的分类模型，获得每个子图像的分类结果和原图像的分类结果，分类结果包括缺陷类别和对应的类别概率；根据所有子图像和原图像的分类结果，确定并输出待测目标的缺陷类别。本申请通过将待测目标进行部件分离，使用分离后的部件与待测目标本身作为多个分支分别进行缺陷分类，能够降低缺陷识别的复杂度，从而提高了缺陷识别的准确度，克服了小样本情况下传统缺陷分类方法结果不稳定的问题。

The invention discloses a small sample defect classification method and device. The method includes: separating the components of the target to be tested, dividing the original image of the target to be tested into at least two sub-images containing different components according to the separated components; establishing a small sample classification model corresponding to each sub-image and the original image. , with the help of the corresponding classification model, the classification results of each sub-image and the original image are obtained. The classification results include the defect category and the corresponding category probability; based on the classification results of all sub-images and the original image, determine and output the target to be tested Defect category. This application separates the components of the target to be tested, and uses the separated components and the target to be tested as multiple branches to classify defects respectively, which can reduce the complexity of defect identification, thereby improving the accuracy of defect identification and overcoming small problems. The problem of unstable results of traditional defect classification methods under sample conditions.
claims:

该方法还包括:为不同的缺陷类别设置优先级； 所述根据所有子图像和原图像的分类结果，确定并输出待测目标的缺陷类别，包括： 当所有子图像和原图像的分类结果均指示不存在缺陷时，确定待测目标为良品； 当所有子图像和原图像的至少一个分类结果中指示存在缺陷时，根据各分类结果以及缺陷类别的优先级确定待测目标的缺陷类别； 所述优先级用以表征不同缺陷类别对待测目标的重要程度。 2 确定不同部件的颜色或纹理特征，将待测目标原图像按照颜色或纹理特征分割成各子图像。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述对待测目标进行部件分离，按照分离后的部件将待测目标的原图像分割成至少两个包含有不同部件的子图像，包括： 将待测目标的原图像分割成分别包含不同部件的前景图像和背景图像。 5 高的缺陷类别为输出结果； 当缺陷类别属于同一优先级时,通过投票原则，确定得票最多的缺陷类别为输出结果， 若同一优先级的缺陷类别得票相同，则继续比较缺陷类别对应的类别概率，确定类别概率高的缺陷类别为输出结果。 7 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述方法还包括:为每个部件设置一个或多个缺陷类别，不同部件的相同缺陷类别的优先级相同或不同。 8 title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SMALL SAMPLE DEFECT CLASSIFICATION; 一种小样本缺陷分类方法和装置
abstract:
本发明公开了一种小样本缺陷分类方法和装置。该方法包括：对待测目标进行部件分离，按照分离后的部件将待测目标的原图像分割成至少两个包含有不同部件的子图像；对应每个子图像以及原图像，分别建立小样本分类模型，借助对应的分类模型，获得每个子图像的分类结果和原图像的分类结果，分类结果包括缺陷类别和对应的类别概率；根据所有子图像和原图像的分类结果，确定并输出待测目标的缺陷类别。本申请通过将待测目标进行部件分离，使用分离后的部件与待测目标本身作为多个分支分别进行缺陷分类，能够降低缺陷识别的复杂度，从而提高了缺陷识别的准确度，克服了小样本情况下传统缺陷分类方法结果不稳定的问题。

The invention discloses a small sample defect classification method and device. The method includes: separating the components of the object to be tested, and dividing the original image of the object to be tested into at least two sub-images containing different components according to the separated components; corresponding to each sub-image and the original image, respectively establishing a small sample classification model , With the help of the corresponding classification model, the classification result of each sub-image and the classification result of the original image are obtained. The classification result includes the defect category and the corresponding category probability; according to the classification results of all the sub-images and the original image, determine and output the target Defect category. This application separates the parts to be tested, and uses the separated parts and the target to be tested as multiple branches to perform defect classification respectively, which can reduce the complexity of defect recognition, thereby improving the accuracy of defect recognition and overcoming minor defects. The problem of unstable results of traditional defect classification methods in sample situations.
claims:
1. 一种小样本缺陷分类方法，其特征在于，该方法包括： 对待测目标进行部件分离，按照分离后的部件将待测目标的原图像分割成至少两个包 含有不同部件的子图像； 对应每个子图像以及原图像，分别建立小样本分类模型，借助对应的分类模型，获得每 个子图像的分类结果和原图像的分类结果，所述分类结果包括缺陷类别和对应的类别概 率； 根据所有子图像和原图像的分类结果，确定并输出待测目标的缺陷类别。 2. 根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述对待测目标进行部件分离，按照分离 后的部件将待测目标的原图像分割成至少两个包含有不同部件的子图像，包括： 根据不同部件的功能不同，将待测目标的原图像按照功能进行分割；和/或，根据不同 部件的位置不同，将待测目标的原图像按照位置进行分割;和/或，根据不同部件的表观特 征不同，将待测目标的原图像按照表观特征进行分割。 3. 根据权利要求2所述的方法，其特征在于，所述方法包括： 将待测目标分离为由对目标功能起主要作用的主要部件和由对目标功能起次要作用 的次要部件构成，将待测目标原图像按照主要部件和次要部件分割成各子图像;和/或， 确定不同部件的上下相对、左右相对、前后相对和边框与中央区域相对中的一种或多 种位置关系，将待测目标原图像按照该位置关系分割成各子图像;和/或， 确定不同部件的颜色或纹理特征，将待测目标原图像按照颜色或纹理特征分割成各子 图像。 4. 根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述对待测目标进行部件分离，按照分离 后的部件将待测目标的原图像分割成至少两个包含有不同部件的子图像，包括： 将待测目标的原图像分割成分别包含不同部件的前景图像和背景图像。 5. 根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述对待测目标进行部件分离，按照分离 后的部件将待测目标的原图像分割成至少两个包含有不同部件的子图像，包括： 利用训练样本训练Unet算法模型，通过训练后的Unet算法模型分割所述原图像； 所述对应每个子图像以及原图像，分别建立小样本分类模型，借助对应的分类模型，获 得每个子图像的分类结果和原图像的分类结果，包括： 对应每个子图像以及原图像，分别训练得到对应的TADAM算法模型，使用对应的TADAM 算法模型分别得到每个子图像的分类结果和原图像的分类结果。 6. 根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，该方法还包括:为不同的缺陷类别设置优 先级； 所述根据所有子图像和原图像的分类结果，确定并输出待测目标的缺陷类别，包括： 当所有子图像和原图像的分类结果均指示不存在缺陷时，确定待测目标为良品； 当所有子图像和原图像的至少一个分类结果中指示存在缺陷时，根据各分类结果以及 缺陷类别的优先级确定待测目标的缺陷类别。 7. 根据权利要求6所述的方法，其特征在于，所述当所有子图像和原图像的至少一个分 类结果中指示存在缺陷时，根据各分类结果以及缺陷类别的优先级确定待测目标的缺陷类 别，包括： 在所有子图像和原图像的分类结果中，若缺陷类别属于不同优先级，则确定优先级最 高的缺陷类别为输出结果； 当缺陷类别属于同一优先级时，通过投票原则，确定得票最多的缺陷类别为输出结果， 若同一优先级的缺陷类别得票相同，则继续比较缺陷类别对应的类别概率，确定类别概率 高的缺陷类别为输出结果。 8. 根据权利要求6所述的方法，其特征在于，所述方法还包括:为每个部件设置一个或 多个缺陷类别，不同部件的相同缺陷类别的优先级相同或不同。 9. 根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，该方法还包括:在对待测目标图像进行部 件分离之前，对待测目标图像进行预处理，所述预处理包括图像尺寸变换和/或图像中目标 朝向归一化。 10. 一种小样本缺陷分类装置，其特征在于，该装置包括:部件分离模块、分支分类模块 和逻辑输出模块； 所述部件分离模块，用于对待测目标进行部件分离，按照分离后的部件将待测目标的 原图像分割成至少两个包含有不同部件的子图像； 所述分支分类模块，用于对应每个子图像以及原图像，分别建立小样本分类模型，借助 对应的分类模型，获得每个子图像的分类结果和原图像的分类结果，所述分类结果包括缺 陷类别和对应的类别概率； 所述逻辑输出模块，用于根据所有子图像和原图像的分类结果，确定并输出待测目标 的缺陷类别。 11. 根据权利要求10所述的装置，其特征在于，所述逻辑输出模块，具体用于： 为不同的缺陷类别设置优先级； 当所有子图像和原图像的分类结果均指示不存在缺陷时，确定待测目标为良品； 当所有子图像和原图像的至少一个分类结果中指示存在缺陷时，根据各分类结果以及 缺陷类别的优先级确定待测目标的缺陷类别:若缺陷类别属于不同优先级，则确定优先级 最高的缺陷类别为输出结果；若缺陷类别属于同一优先级，则通过投票原则，确定得票最多 的缺陷类别为输出结果，若同一优先级的缺陷类别得票相同，则继续比较缺陷类别对应的 类别概率，确定类别概率高的缺陷类别为输出结果。

title: A RIGID-FLEXIBLE INTEGRATED CRACK DETECTION SYSTEM FOR NARROW SPACES OF BUILDINGS; 一种刚柔一体的建筑物狭窄空间的裂缝检测系统
abstract:
一种刚柔一体的建筑物狭窄空间的裂缝检测系统，包括轮式移动小车、裂缝检测系统，轮式移动小车上设有运动控制系统、激光导航系统、超声波避障系统以及照明系统；裂缝检测系统包括移动检测平台、图像采集装置以及图像处理系统；移动检测平台为安装在轮式移动小车顶部的蛇形机械臂，图像采集装置为安装在蛇形机械臂前端的运动相机，图像处理系统包括存储器、模型训练数据集以及基于U‑Net网络的裂缝检测模型；本发明的优点在于：整体裂缝检测系统自主移动可控，减少人工和物力消耗，安全性高经济效益好。

A rigid-flexible crack detection system in a narrow space of a building, including a wheeled mobile trolley and a crack detection system. The wheeled mobile trolley is equipped with a motion control system, a laser navigation system, an ultrasonic obstacle avoidance system and a lighting system; crack detection The system includes a mobile detection platform, an image acquisition device and an image processing system; the mobile detection platform is a snake-shaped robotic arm installed on the top of a wheeled mobile trolley, and the image acquisition device is a sports camera installed at the front end of the snake-shaped robotic arm. The image processing system includes Memory, model training data set and crack detection model based on U-Net network; the advantages of the present invention are: the overall crack detection system is autonomously movable and controllable, reduces labor and material consumption, has high safety and good economic benefits.

title: A RIGID-FLEXIBLE INTEGRATED CRACK DETECTION SYSTEM FOR NARROW SPACES OF BUILDINGS; 一种刚柔一体的建筑物狭窄空间的裂缝检测系统
abstract:
一种刚柔一体的建筑物狭窄空间的裂缝检测系统，包括轮式移动小车、裂缝检测系统，轮式移动小车上设有运动控制系统、激光导航系统、超声波避障系统以及照明系统；裂缝检测系统包括移动检测平台、图像采集装置以及图像处理系统；移动检测平台为安装在轮式移动小车顶部的蛇形机械臂，图像采集装置为安装在蛇形机械臂前端的运动相机，图像处理系统包括存储器、模型训练数据集以及基于U‑Net网络的裂缝检测模型；本发明的优点在于：整体裂缝检测系统自主移动可控，减少人工和物力消耗，安全性高经济效益好。

A rigid-flexible crack detection system in a narrow space of a building, including a wheeled mobile trolley and a crack detection system. The wheeled mobile trolley is equipped with a motion control system, a laser navigation system, an ultrasonic obstacle avoidance system and a lighting system; crack detection The system includes a mobile detection platform, an image acquisition device and an image processing system; the mobile detection platform is a snake-shaped robotic arm installed on the top of a wheeled mobile trolley, and the image acquisition device is a sports camera installed at the front end of the snake-shaped robotic arm. The image processing system includes Memory, model training data set and crack detection model based on U-Net network; the advantages of the present invention are: the overall crack detection system is autonomously movable and controllable, reduces labor and material consumption, has high safety and good economic benefits.

title: AUTOMATIC DETECTION METHOD OF CONCRETE STRUCTURE SURFACE DEFECTS BASED ON COMPUTER VISION; 基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法
abstract:
本发明属于计算机视觉技术领域，具体涉及一种基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，包括对视频数据进行时间轴上采样获取图像，再将图像输入深度卷积神经网络模型获取缺陷的位置、缺陷的类别以及缺陷的分割效果。在实际的混凝土结构检测中，本发明的方法基于深度学习框架下的视频图像识别技术，从根本上解决了以往计算机视觉方法中存在的误检率高、通用性差等实际问题；从视频图像数据的处理和最终结果的输出，具有自动化程度高、实时性好、准确率高、通用性好、便于后期升级维护等优点。

The invention belongs to the technical field of computer vision, and specifically relates to a computer vision-based automatic detection method for surface defects of concrete structures, which includes sampling video data on a time axis to obtain images, and then inputting the images into a deep convolutional neural network model to obtain the position of the defect , Defect category and defect segmentation effect. In the actual concrete structure inspection, the method of the present invention is based on the video image recognition technology under the deep learning framework, and fundamentally solves the actual problems of high false detection rate and poor versatility in the previous computer vision methods; from the video image data The processing and the output of the final result have the advantages of high automation, good real-time performance, high accuracy, good versatility, and ease of later upgrade and maintenance.
claims:
1. 一种基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法,其特征在于:对视频数 据进行时间轴上采样获取图像，图像输入深度卷积神经网络模型获取缺陷的位置、缺陷的 类别以及缺陷的分割效果。 2. 根据权利要求1所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述深度卷积神经网络模型包括： 特征提取模块，用于提取图像特征； 缺陷位置生成模块，用于根据图像特征提取出图像中的疑似缺陷目标区域； 缺陷区域位置检测模块，用于获取疑似缺陷目标区域中缺陷在图像中的精确坐标信 息； 缺陷区域分类模块，用于确定疑似缺陷目标区域中缺陷的类别； 缺陷区域分割模块，用于对疑似缺陷目标区域中的缺陷进行语义分割。 3. 根据权利要求2所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述特征提取模块包括ResNet50网络模块，用于提取图像的特征向量。 4. 根据权利要求3所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述缺陷位置生成模块包括感兴趣区域提取模块，将图像的特征向量输入感兴趣 区域提取模块，生成疑似缺陷目标区域的目标框，提取目标框对应的目标区域特征向量，将 所有目标区域特征向量调整到统一的维度;生成目标存在置信度的概率值，并将概率值按 照大小顺序排序，选取概率值大于预设值的目标区域特征向量，作为缺陷区域位置检测模 块、缺陷区域分类模块、缺陷区域分割模块的输入。 5. 根据权利要求4所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述缺陷区域位置检测模块，将目标区域特征向量输入到一线性回归器中计算误 差并进行反向传播，最终得到缺陷所在区域的最小外接矩形。 6. 根据权利要求4所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于：所述缺陷区域分类模块，将目标区域特征向量输入到一全连接层并传输给Soft Max激活层，得到疑似缺陷目标区域对应于各个类别的概率预测向量。 7. 根据权利要求4所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述缺陷区域分割模块，将目标区域特征向量输入到一 Unet网络模块中对疑似缺 陷目标区域中的缺陷进行语义分割。 8. 根据权利要求2-7任一所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方 法，其特征在于:所述深度卷积神经网络模型的训练过程如下： S10、准备训练数据； S20、通过I mageNet数据集训练ResNet50网络模块； S30、训练感兴趣区域提取模块； S40、训练缺陷区域位置检测模块、缺陷区域分类模块和缺陷区域分割模块； S50、调整学习率，然后重复执行S30、S4 0两个步骤，直到设定的损失函数数值收敛到设 定的误差值以下。 9. 根据权利要求8所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述准备训练数据包括对缺陷的训练数据进行数据增强，模拟生成出各种环境下 的混凝土表面缺陷的成像效果图像。

title: KNOCKOUT AUTOENCODER FOR DETECTING ANOMALIES IN BIOMEDICAL IMAGES; 用于检测生物医学图像中的异常的敲除自动编码器
abstract:
在包括处理器和存储器的数据处理系统中提供一种机制，存储器包括由处理器执行的指令以具体配置处理器以实现用于检测生物医学图像中的异常的敲除自动编码器引擎。该机制训练用作基于输入图像预测原稿的敲除自动编码器的神经网络。敲除自动编码器引擎将生物医学图像作为输入图像提供给神经网络。神经网络输出生物医学图像中每个像素的概率分布。每个概率分布表示生物医学图像中给定像素的预期像素值的预期概率分布。在敲除自动编码器引擎内执行的异常检测组件基于概率分布确定每个像素具有预期值的概率以形成多个预期像素概率。异常检测组件基于多个预期像素概率来检测生物医学图像中的异常。在敲除自动编码器引擎内执行的异常标记组件在生物医学图像中标记检测到的异常以形成标记的生物医学图像并输出标记的生物医学图像。

A mechanism is provided in a data processing system including a processor and a memory, the memory including instructions executed by the processor to specifically configure the processor to implement a knockout autoencoder engine for detecting anomalies in a biomedical image. The mechanism trains a neural network used as a knockout autoencoder to predict an original based on an input image. The knockout autoencoder engine provides the biomedical image as an input image to the neural network. The neural network outputs a probability distribution for each pixel in the biomedical image. Each probability distribution represents an expected probability distribution of an expected pixel value for a given pixel in the biomedical image. An anomaly detection component executed within the knockout autoencoder engine determines a probability that each pixel has an expected value based on the probability distribution to form a plurality of expected pixel probabilities. The anomaly detection component detects anomalies in the biomedical image based on the plurality of expected pixel probabilities. An anomaly labeling component executed within the knockout autoencoder engine labels detected anomalies in the biomedical image to form a labeled biomedical image and outputs the labeled biomedical image.

由在所述敲除自动编码器引擎内执行的异常检测组件基于所述概率分布确定每个像素具有预期值以形成多个预期像素概率的概率； 由所述异常检测组件基于所述多个预期像素概率来检测所述生物医学图像中的异常； 通过在敲除自动编码器引擎内执行的异常标记组件在生物医学图像中标记检测到的异常以形成标记的生物医学图像；并且通过敲除自动编码器引擎输出标记的生物医学图像；其中，训练所述神经网络包括： 对于一组训练图像中的每个训练图像，选择所述训练图像的一个或多个敲除小片，用噪声填充一个或多个敲除小片以形成敲除图像，并且训练神经网络以基于给定敲除图像中的不包括所述一个或多个敲除小片的剩余像素来预测所述训练图像。 16 .权利要求15所述的装置，其中基于该概率分布确定每一像素具有预期值的该概率包括： 对于所述生物医学图像中具有给定像素值的每个给定像素，在对应于所述给定像素的给定概率分布中识别对应于所述给定像素值的概率值。 17 .如权利要求15所述的装置，其中基于该多个预期像素概率检测该生物医学图像中的该异常包括： 将所述多个预期像素概率中的每个预期像素概率与预定阈值进行比较;并且响应于所述多个预期像素概率中的一个或多个小于所述预定阈值，确定所述生物医学图像具有异常。

title: TREE GENERATOR NETWORK GEAR PITTING IMAGE MEASUREMENT METHOD AND DEVICE BASED ON CYCLEGAN; 基于CYCLEGAN的树状生成器网络齿轮点蚀图像测量方法及装置
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于cyclegan的树状生成器网络齿轮点蚀图像测量方法，并提供对应装置，属于齿轮故障检测，包括以下步骤：S1：采集齿轮点蚀图像信息；S2：对原始图像进行图像预处理，消除环境因素；S3：基于循环一致性损失cyclegan的树状生成器网络对齿轮点蚀图像进行扩增，生成多张齿轮点蚀图像；S4：通过齿轮点蚀检测算法对多张齿轮点蚀图像进行检测，得到齿轮点蚀等级。本发明可以利用其底层参数共享机制来有效训练树状的生成器和鉴别器，通过训练树状生成器，让生成器的各个分支朝着不同的数据模式学习，同时用重构器让这些样本重构成原域样本，这样便能够保持风格转换的情况下生成不同的样本。

The invention relates to a method for measuring gear pitting images based on a tree generator network based on cyclegan, and provides a corresponding device, which belongs to gear fault detection and includes the following steps: S1: collecting gear pitting image information; S2: performing image processing on the original image Preprocessing to eliminate environmental factors; S3: The tree generator network based on the cycle consistency loss cyclegan amplifies the gear pitting image to generate multiple gear pitting images; S4: Use the gear pitting detection algorithm to detect multiple gears The pitting image is detected to obtain the gear pitting grade. The present invention can use its underlying parameter sharing mechanism to effectively train tree-like generators and discriminators. By training tree-like generators, each branch of the generator can learn towards different data patterns, and at the same time use the reconstructor to make these samples Reconstitute the original domain samples, so that different samples can be generated while maintaining the style transfer.

title: CYCLEGAN-BASED TREE GENERATOR NETWORK GEAR PITTING IMAGE MEASURING METHOD AND DEVICE; 基于CYCLEGAN的树状生成器网络齿轮点蚀图像测量方法及装置
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于cyclegan的树状生成器网络齿轮点蚀图像测量方法，并提供对应装置，属于齿轮故障检测，包括以下步骤：S1：采集齿轮点蚀图像信息；S2：对原始图像进行图像预处理，消除环境因素；S3：基于循环一致性损失cyclegan的树状生成器网络对齿轮点蚀图像进行扩增，生成多张齿轮点蚀图像；S4：通过齿轮点蚀检测算法对多张齿轮点蚀图像进行检测，得到齿轮点蚀等级。本发明可以利用其底层参数共享机制来有效训练树状的生成器和鉴别器，通过训练树状生成器，让生成器的各个分支朝着不同的数据模式学习，同时用重构器让这些样本重构成原域样本，这样便能够保持风格转换的情况下生成不同的样本。

The invention relates to a cyclegan-based tree generator network gear pitting image measurement method, and provides a corresponding device, belonging to gear fault detection, including the following steps: S1: collecting gear pitting image information; S2: performing an image on the original image Preprocessing to eliminate environmental factors; S3: Amplify gear pitting images based on cyclegan's tree generator network based on cycle consistency loss to generate multiple gear pitting images; S4: Use gear pitting detection algorithm to detect multiple gears The pitting image is tested and the gear pitting grade is obtained. The present invention can use its underlying parameter sharing mechanism to effectively train tree-shaped generators and discriminators. By training the tree-shaped generator, each branch of the generator can learn from different data patterns, and at the same time, the reconstructor can be used to make these samples Reconstitute the original domain samples so that different samples can be generated while maintaining the style conversion.

title: A DEFECT DETECTION METHOD FOR AUTOMOBILE GEAR FINISHED PRODUCTS BASED ON MACHINE VISION; 一种基于机器视觉的汽车齿轮成品缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于机器视觉的汽车齿轮成品缺陷检测方法。针对当前采样数字化图像处理技术对汽车齿轮部件缺陷识别精度不高的问题。本发明利用数字图像处理技术对齿轮等零部件轮廓以及边缘部分进行提取，然后将提取后的齿轮边界图像作为先验信息融入改进的UNet网络结构中，进行人为地补充底层特征信息作为网络训练的参考，从而达到更好的信息融合效果。本发明基于UNet网络结构对齿轮图像语义进行分割，能够完全识别出细小的裂缝、污迹等缺陷。

The invention discloses a method for detecting defects of finished automobile gears based on machine vision. Aiming at the problem that the current sampling digital image processing technology has low accuracy in identifying defects of automobile gear parts. The invention uses digital image processing technology to extract the outline and edge parts of gears and other parts, and then integrates the extracted gear boundary image into the improved UNet network structure as prior information, and artificially supplements the underlying feature information as the network training method. reference, so as to achieve better information fusion effect. The invention divides the semantics of the gear image based on the UNet network structure, and can completely identify defects such as small cracks and stains.

1 .A machine vision-based defect detection method for finished automotive gears, characterized in that it includes the following steps: 1) The downsampling process of the Unet network performs downsampling and compression processing on the original image of the gear layer by layer, and the downsampling process consists of n downsampling features Each downsampling feature layer includes convolution and pooling units to display environmental information; the original gear image is down-sampled by the Unet network to obtain the output feature map GjGn of each downsampling feature layer; The image is subjected to edge extraction to obtain the image after the edge contour is recognized; the image after the recognition of the edge contour is subjected to size correction through a single-layer convolutional network to obtain an image DE that is consistent with the resolution of the output feature map of the feature layer at each stage of downsampling; 2) The feature map GjGn is cascaded with the elements of the size-corrected image DjDn in step 1 respectively to generate a fusion feature image FjFy is added in the form of channels to strengthen the shallow network's capture of simple features on the edge of the image; 3 ) The upsampling process of the Unet network is also composed of N upsampling layers. In the upsampling process of the Unet network, the feature map G obtained after being compressed n times. Carry out upsampling in the first upsampling layer, after upsampling, learn cascade fusion with the fusion feature image Fi through the embedding module of the second upsampling layer, the output of the embedding module is used as the input of the second upsampling layer, and the second upsampling layer After the sampling layer is up-sampled and fused with the feature image F. -2 After learning cascade fusion through the embedding module of the third upsampling layer, the output of the embedding module is used as the input of the third upsampling layer, and so on; after n times of fusion and deconvolution layer by layer, each upsampling is obtained The feature map of the layer; the original label image is elastically deformed to the same size as the input image of each layer, as the label image of each layer in the upsampling stage, and softmax is used as the activation function for each layer in the upsampling stage, and the obtained features are regenerated Mapped to each pixel in the label image for the classification of each pixel; the logarithmic loss function calculates the difference between the predicted value and the real value as the loss of each stage of upsampling, and the entire network loss function is The sum of each upsampling stage; the obtained difference is fed back to correct the weight parameters of each convolutional layer and embedding module; 4) Input the feature map obtained at each stage of upsampling to the 1*1 convolutional layer, and finally pass the softmax layer to obtain the segmented image of each part consistent with the image size of each stage. 2 . The machine vision-based method for detecting defects in finished automotive gears according to claim 1, characterized in that the entire loss function of the network is expressed as: In the loss part, n is the number of batch images, i is the number of categories, Pi and Pj represent the probability that the current pixel belongs to category i and j category respectively, and the softmax function is used to represent the probability that the current input picture belongs to category i. 3 . The machine vision-based automotive gear product defect detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that the embedding module is specifically: when sampling on the UNet network, the up-sampling output image U1 of the upper layer passes through the convolution module After feature extraction, bilinear upsampling is performed to restore the size consistent with the fusion feature image F1, and then multiplied element by element with the fusion feature image F1, and finally used as the input of the next upsampling stage. 4 . The automobile gear finished product defect detection method based on machine vision according to claim 1, is characterized in that: each down-sampling layer comprises continuous 2 times convolution layer, and convolution selects hole convolution, and the convolution kernel size is 3 *3, the hole factor is 2, the step size is 1, then through the nonlinear layer of Relu, and finally through the 2*2 maximum pooling layer with a step size of 2. 5 . the automobile gear finished product defect detection method based on machine vision according to claim 1, is characterized in that: each The first upsampling layer includes consecutive 2*2 deconvolution layers and 2 times 3*3 convolution layers, and the feature channels are gradually halved. 6 . the automobile gear product defect detection method based on machine vision according to claim 1, is characterized in that: described n is preferably 4. 7 . The automobile gear finished product defect detection method based on machine vision according to claim 1, is characterized in that: carrying out edge extraction to the original gear image is specifically: the original gear image is converted into a grayscale image; in order to improve image clarity, enhance the contrast , to increase the gray level of the image; use a 5X5 Gaussian filter to eliminate noise, and then calculate the image at 0°/45°/90°/135. For the gradients in these four directions, the local maximum value is reserved, and the rest are set to 0; finally, the high-to-low threshold ratio of the canny operator is set to 2:1 for edge extraction.

title: A U-NET-BASED HIGH-SPEED RAILWAY RAIL DAMAGE DETECTION METHOD; 一种基于U-NET的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于U‑Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，包括如下步骤：搭建高速铁路钢轨损伤检测现实场景，获取钢轨损伤的检测图像；在采集的每个原始图像中标记钢轨损伤区域并将注释保存；通过平移、旋转和缩放的数据增强操作来扩充训练样本；设置钢轨损伤检测网络模型的参数，输入图像及其对应的分割图，通过深度学习算法平台实现检测网络的训练，并根据训练网络的评价指标来修改检测网络模型参数，直至得到评价指标；依据U‑Net网络计算出的分割图在原始输入图像上用矩形框进行标记，如果所采集的图像包含缺陷，则在计算机中提示相关处理结果，并将含缺陷工件标识入库。本发明能够适用于不同条件下的钢轨损伤裂纹检测，泛化性较强和准确率较高。

The invention discloses a U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method, comprising the following steps: building a high-speed railway rail damage detection realistic scene, obtaining a detection image of the rail damage; marking the rail damage area in each original image collected And save the annotations; expand the training samples through data enhancement operations of translation, rotation and scaling; set the parameters of the rail damage detection network model, input the image and its corresponding segmentation map, realize the training of the detection network through the deep learning algorithm platform, and Modify the parameters of the detection network model according to the evaluation index of the training network until the evaluation index is obtained; the segmentation map calculated according to the U-Net network is marked with a rectangular frame on the original input image, and if the collected image contains defects, it will be displayed on the computer Relevant processing results will be prompted in , and the defective workpieces will be identified and stored in the warehouse. The invention can be applied to the detection of rail damage cracks under different conditions, and has strong generalization and high accuracy.
claims:
1 . 一种基于u-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，包括如下步骤： 图像采集:搭建高速铁路钢轨损伤检测现实场景，通过深度相机获取钢轨损伤的检测图像； 图像注释:使用图像注释工具，在采集的每个原始图像中标记钢轨损伤区域并将注释保存； 图像预处理：将每个原始图像和对应的标签均变成相同像素分辨率的图片，并通过翻转、颜色抖动和高斯模糊的数据增强操作来扩充训练样本以提高网络的泛化能力，并按比例将数据集随机分成训练集、验证集和测试集； 模型训练:设置钢轨损伤检测网络模型的参数,输入图像及其对应的分割图，通过深度学习算法平台实现检测网络的训练，并根据训练网络的评价指标来修改检测网络模型参数,直至得到评价指标； 利用模型进行裂纹检测：依据U-Net网络计算出的分割图在原始输入图像上用矩形框进行标记,如果所采集的图像包含缺陷，则在计算机中提示相关处理结果,并将含缺陷工件标识入库,如果没有缺陷则丢弃图像继续运行； 钢轨损伤检测网络模型具体为： 由一个收缩路径和一个扩展路径组成;收缩路径遵循卷积网络的典型架构，它由两个3 X3卷积层的重复使用组成,每个卷积层后跟一个ReLU函数激活层和一个步长为2、池化核为2X2的最大池化层用于对图像进行下采样;在每个下采样步骤中，将特征通道的数量加倍;扩展路径中的每个步骤都包括对特征图进行上采样,随后进行2 X 2卷积，以对特征通道的数量减半,并与从收缩路径中相应裁剪的特征图进行级联,再加上两个3 X 3卷积层，每个卷积单元后跟一个ReLU函数激活层；由于边界像素的丢失，必须对每个卷积单元进行裁剪； 在最后一层，使用1X1卷积将每个64通道的特征向量映射到所需的类上;该网络总共有23 个卷积层;为了无缝拼接输出分割图，重要的是选择输入图块大小，以便将所有2X2最大池化操作应用于X和y大小均等的图层； 模型训练中，由于钢轨表面损伤区域与周围正常组织的像素不连续，故使用形态学运算来分割边界，分割权重公式为： w（X） =叱（X） +因・exp（-' —「 ） 式⑴ 2σ 式⑴中,w0表示平衡类频率，w0表示初始权重,力表示损伤区域到最近边界的距离,d2表示损伤区域到第二近的边界距离，。表示像素个数； 在模型训练之后，使用准确率、召回率、损失曲线的评估指标对模型训练结果进行评估。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，高速铁路钢轨损伤检测现实场景包括： 相机，用于连续采集图像，并将图像送至计算机中； 光源，用于使图像中的目标信息与背景信息得到最佳分离，大大降低图像处理的算法难度，同时提高检测系统的精度和可靠性； 计算机，用于分析图像特征，完成钢轨损伤检测模型的训练，实时检测出图像中是否包含缺陷,如果没有缺陷则丢弃图像并继续运行,如果所采集的图像包含缺陷，则报警装置对 有缺陷的图像进行报警； 报警装置，用于对有缺陷的图像进行报警,最终完成钢轨损伤检测。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，图像预处理操作包括： 数据增强操作包括翻转、颜色抖动和高斯噪声； 其中，翻转是将图像的左右或上下部分以图像垂直中轴线为中心进行镜像兑换;颜色抖动是将图像变换到HSV颜色空间，然后随机改变图像的曝光度、饱和度和色调，最后再将变换后的图像转到RGB空间，随机形成不同光照及颜色下的图片，达到数据增强的目的；高斯噪声是在原图上添加高斯分布的模板，从而使图像变得模糊； 在图像预处理时，需将图像边界模糊、标记错误的数据集删除，之后选取200张图像作为数据集，其中70%的数据集用于训练，10%的数据集用于验证,20%的数据集用于测试。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，图像注释中,所述图像注释工具为LabelMe。 5 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，图像注释中，在采集的每个原始图像中标记钢轨损伤区域并将注释保存为JSON文件。 6 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，图像预处理中，将每个原始图像和对应的标签均变成160X1000像素分辨率的图片。
