A u-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method is characterized in that, comprising the steps of: Image acquisition: build a high-speed railway rail damage detection reality scene, obtain the detection image of rail damage by depth camera; Image annotation: use image annotation Tool, mark the rail damage area in each original image collected and save the annotation; Image preprocessing: convert each original image and corresponding label into a picture with the same pixel resolution, and through flipping, color dithering and Gaussian Fuzzy data enhancement operation to expand the training samples to improve the generalization ability of the network, and randomly divide the data set into training set, verification set and test set in proportion; Model training: set the parameters of the rail damage detection network model, input images and their For the corresponding segmentation diagram, the detection network is trained through the deep learning algorithm platform, and the parameters of the detection network model are modified according to the evaluation index of the training network until the evaluation index is obtained; Crack detection using the model: based on the segmentation calculated by the U-Net network The image is marked with a rectangular frame on the original input image. If the collected image contains defects, the relevant processing results will be prompted in the computer, and the workpiece with defects will be marked into the warehouse. If there are no defects, the image will be discarded and the operation will continue; Rail damage detection The network model is specifically: It consists of a contraction path and an expansion path; the contraction path follows the typical architecture of a convolutional network, which consists of two 3 The repeated use of X3 convolutional layers consists of each convolutional layer followed by a ReLU function activation layer and a maximum pooling layer with a stride of 2 and a pooling kernel of 2X2 for downsampling the image; at each downsampling step, doubling the number of feature channels; each step in the expansion path consists of upsampling the feature map, followed by a 2 X 2 convolution to halve the number of feature channels, and corresponding The cropped feature maps are concatenated, plus two 3 X 3 convolutional layers, each convolutional unit followed by a ReLU function activation layer; due to the loss of boundary pixels, each convolutional unit must be cropped; at the end One layer, using a 1X1 convolution to map each 64-channel feature vector to the desired class; the network has a total of 23 convolutional layers; in order to stitch the output segmentation map seamlessly, it is important to choose the input tile size, In order to apply all 2X2 maximum pooling operations to layers of equal size X and y; In model training, since the damaged area on the surface of the rail is not continuous with the pixels of the surrounding normal tissue, morphological operations are used to segment the boundary, and the segmentation weight formula is : w (X) = scold (X) + cause · exp (-' - " ) formula (1) 2σ In formula (1), w0 represents the frequency of the balance class, w0 represents the initial weight, force represents the distance from the damaged area to the nearest boundary, and d2 represents the distance from the damaged area to the second closest boundary. computer, used to analyze image features and complete the training of the rail damage detection model , real-time detection of whether the image contains defects, if there is no defect, the image will be discarded and continue to run, if the collected image contains defects, the alarm device will Defective images give an alarm; the alarm device is used to give an alarm to defective images, and finally complete the rail damage detection. 3 . the U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, is characterized in that, image preprocessing operation comprises: Data enhancement operation comprises flipping, color dithering and Gaussian noise; Wherein, flipping is the left and right sides of image Or the upper and lower parts are mirrored and exchanged centering on the vertical central axis of the image; the color dithering is to transform the image into the HSV color space, then randomly change the exposure, saturation and hue of the image, and finally transfer the transformed image to the RGB space, Randomly form images under different lighting and colors to achieve the purpose of data enhancement; Gaussian noise is to add a template of Gaussian distribution on the original image, so that the image becomes blurred; during image preprocessing, it is necessary to blur the image boundary and mark the error The data set is deleted, and then 200 images are selected as the data set, of which 70% of the data set is used for training, 10% of the data set is used for verification, and 20% of the data set is used for testing. 4 . the U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, is characterized in that, in image annotation, described image annotation tool is LabelMe. 5 . The U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, wherein, in the image annotation, mark the rail damage region in each original image collected and save the annotation as a JSON file. 6 . the U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, is characterized in that, in image preprocessing, each original image and corresponding label are all become the picture of 160X1000 pixel resolution.

abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于U‑Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，包括如下步骤：搭建高速铁路钢轨损伤检测现实场景，获取钢轨损伤的检测图像；在采集的每个原始图像中标记钢轨损伤区域并将注释保存；通过平移、旋转和缩放的数据增强操作来扩充训练样本；设置钢轨损伤检测网络模型的参数，输入图像及其对应的分割图，通过深度学习算法平台实现检测网络的训练，并根据训练网络的评价指标来修改检测网络模型参数，直至得到评价指标；依据U‑Net网络计算出的分割图在原始输入图像上用矩形框进行标记，如果所采集的图像包含缺陷，则在计算机中提示相关处理结果，并将含缺陷工件标识入库。本发明能够适用于不同条件下的钢轨损伤裂纹检测，泛化性较强和准确率较高。

The invention discloses a U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method, which includes the following steps: constructing a high-speed railway rail damage detection realistic scene, obtaining rail damage detection images; marking the rail damage area in each collected original image And save the annotations; expand the training samples through data enhancement operations of translation, rotation, and zoom; set the parameters of the rail damage detection network model, input the image and its corresponding segmentation map, and realize the training of the detection network through the deep learning algorithm platform, and Modify the parameters of the detection network model according to the evaluation index of the training network until the evaluation index is obtained; the segmentation figure calculated according to the U-Net network is marked with a rectangular frame on the original input image. If the collected image contains defects, the computer Prompt the relevant processing results, and mark the defective workpiece into the warehouse. The invention can be applied to rail damage and crack detection under different conditions, and has strong generalization and high accuracy.
claims:
1 .一种基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法,其特征在于，包括如下步骤： 图像采集:搭建高速铁路钢轨损伤检测现实场景，通过深度相机获取钢轨损伤的检测 图像； 图像注释:使用图像注释工具，在采集的每个原始图像中标记钢轨损伤区域并将注释 保存； 图像预处理:将每个原始图像和对应的标签均变成相同像素分辨率的图片，并通过翻 转、颜色抖动和高斯模糊的数据增强操作来扩充训练样本以提高网络的泛化能力，并按比 例将数据集随机分成训练集、验证集和测试集； 模型训练:设置钢轨损伤检测网络模型的参数，输入图像及其对应的分割图，通过深度 学习算法平台实现检测网络的训练，并根据训练网络的评价指标来修改检测网络模型参 数，直至得到评价指标； 利用模型进行裂纹检测：依据U-Net网络计算出的分割图在原始输入图像上用矩形框 进行标记，如果所采集的图像包含缺陷，则在计算机中提示相关处理结果，并将含缺陷工件 标识入库，如果没有缺陷则丢弃图像继续运行。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，高速 铁路钢轨损伤检测现实场景包括: 相机，用于连续采集图像，并将图像送至计算机中； 光源，用于使图像中的目标信息与背景信息得到最佳分离，大大降低图像处理的算法 难度，同时提高检测系统的精度和可靠性； 计算机，用于分析图像特征，完成钢轨损伤检测模型的训练，实时检测出图像中是否包 含缺陷，如果没有缺陷则丢弃图像并继续运行，如果所采集的图像包含缺陷，则报警装置对 有缺陷的图像进行报警； 报警装置，用于对有缺陷的图像进行报警，最终完成钢轨损伤检测。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，图像 预处理操作包括: 数据增强操作包括翻转、颜色抖动和高斯噪声； 其中，翻转是将图像的左右或上下部分以图像垂直中轴线为中心进行镜像兑换;颜色 抖动是将图像变换到HSV颜色空间，然后随机改变图像的曝光度、饱和度和色调，最后再将 变换后的图像转到RGB空间，随机形成不同光照及颜色下的图片，达到数据增强的目的；高 斯噪声是在原图上添加高斯分布的模板，从而使图像变得模糊； 在图像预处理时，需将图像边界模糊、标记错误的数据集删除，之后选取200张图像作 为数据集，其中70%的数据集用于训练，10%的数据集用于验证,20%的数据集用于测试。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，钢轨 损伤检测网络模型具体为： 由一个收缩路径和一个扩展路径组成;收缩路径遵循卷积网络的典型架构，它由两个3 X3卷积层的重复使用组成，每个卷积层后跟一个ReLU函数激活层和一个步长为2、池化核 为2X2的最大池化层用于对图像进行下采样;在每个下采样步骤中，将特征通道的数量加 倍;扩展路径中的每个步骤都包括对特征图进行上采样，随后进行2 X 2卷积，以对特征通道 的数量减半,并与从收缩路径中相应裁剪的特征图进行级联,再加上两个3 X 3卷积层，每个 卷积单元后跟一个ReLU函数激活层；由于边界像素的丢失,必须对每个卷积单元进行裁剪； 在最后一层，使用1X1卷积将每个64通道的特征向量映射到所需的类上；该网络总共有23 个卷积层;为了无缝拼接输出分割图，重要的是选择输入图块大小，以便将所有2 X 2最大池 化操作应用于X和y大小均等的图层。 5 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，模型 训练中，由于钢轨表面损伤区域与周围正常组织的像素不连续，故使用形态学运算来分割 边界，分割权重公式为： ΜΎ)=叱(X) + % · exp(—* % (Η))?) 式(1) 2(7 式⑴中,Wc表示平衡类频率,W0表示初始权重,dl表示损伤区域到最近边界的距离,d2表 示损伤区域到第二近的边界距离，。表示像素个数； 在模型训练之后，使用准确率、召回率、损失曲线的评估指标对模型训练结果进行评 估。 6 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，图像 注释中，所述图像注释工具为LabelMe。 7 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，图像 注释中，在采集的每个原始图像中标记钢轨损伤区域并将注释保存为JS0N文件。 8 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-Net的高速铁路钢轨损伤检测方法，其特征在于，图像 预处理中，将每个原始图像和对应的标签均变成160X1000像素分辨率的图片。

1 A U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method, which is characterized by including the following steps: Image acquisition: build a real scene of high-speed railway rail damage detection, and obtain the detection image of the rail damage through a depth camera; image annotation: use the image Annotation tool to mark the damaged area of the rail in each original image collected and save the annotation; Image preprocessing: Turn each original image and the corresponding label into a picture with the same pixel resolution, and pass flip, color dithering and Gaussian fuzzy data enhancement operation expands the training samples to improve the generalization ability of the network, and divides the data set into training set, validation set and test set randomly according to the proportion; Model training: Set the parameters of the rail damage detection network model, input the image and The corresponding segmentation map is trained on the detection network through the deep learning algorithm platform, and the detection network model parameters are modified according to the evaluation index of the training network until the evaluation index is obtained; the crack detection using the model: calculated according to the U-Net network The segmentation map is marked with a rectangular frame on the original input image. If the collected image contains defects, the computer will prompt the relevant processing results and mark the defective workpiece into the warehouse. If there are no defects, discard the image and continue running. 2 The U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, wherein the real scene of high-speed railway rail damage detection includes: The camera is used to continuously collect images and send the images to the computer; the light source is used to optimally separate the target information and background information in the image, greatly reducing the difficulty of image processing algorithms, and improving the accuracy and reliability of the detection system The computer is used to analyze the image characteristics, complete the training of the rail damage detection model, and detect whether the image contains defects in real time. If there are no defects, discard the image and continue to run. If the collected image contains defects, the alarm device The defective image will give an alarm; the alarm device is used to give an alarm to the defective image and finally complete the rail damage detection. 3 The U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, wherein the image preprocessing operation includes: Data enhancement operations include flipping, color dithering, and Gaussian noise; among them, flipping is to convert the left and right or upper and lower parts of the image with the vertical axis of the image as the center for mirroring; color dithering is to transform the image into the HSV color space, and then randomly change the image Exposure, saturation and hue, and finally transfer the transformed image to the RGB space, randomly forming pictures under different lighting and colors to achieve the purpose of data enhancement; Gaussian noise is to add a Gaussian distribution template to the original image, so that The image becomes blurred; during image preprocessing, the data set with blurred image boundaries and incorrectly labeled needs to be deleted, and then 200 images are selected as the data set, of which 70% of the data set is used for training, and 10% of the data set is used for For verification, 20% of the data set is used for testing. 4 The U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, wherein the rail damage detection network model is specifically: composed of a contraction path and an expansion path; the contraction path follows the typical convolutional network Architecture, which consists of the repeated use of two 3 X3 convolutional layers, each convolutional layer is followed by a ReLU function activation layer and a maximum pooling layer with a step size of 2 and a pooling core of 2X2 to download the image Sampling; in each down-sampling step, the number of feature channels is doubled; each step in the expansion path includes up-sampling the feature map, followed by 2 X 2 convolution to halve the number of feature channels, It is cascaded with the feature maps cropped from the shrinking path, plus two 3 X 3 convolutional layers, each The convolution unit is followed by a ReLU function activation layer; due to the loss of boundary pixels, each convolution unit must be cropped; in the last layer, 1X1 convolution is used to map the feature vector of each 64 channel to the required class ; The network has a total of 23 convolutional layers; in order to seamlessly stitch the output segmentation map, it is important to choose the input tile size so that all 2 X 2 maximum pooling operations can be applied to layers of equal size in X and y. 5 The U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that, in the model training, because the rail surface damage area is not continuous with the pixels of the surrounding normal tissue, morphological operations are used to segment the boundary , The division weight formula is: ΜΎ)=scold(X) +% · exp(-*% (Η))?) Equation (1) 2(7 In equation (1), Wc represents the balance class frequency, W0 represents the initial weight, dl represents the distance from the damaged area to the nearest boundary, d2 represents the distance from the damaged area to the second closest boundary, and represents the number of pixels; after model training , Use the evaluation indicators of accuracy, recall, and loss curve to evaluate the model training results. 6 The U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, wherein in the image annotation, the image annotation tool is LabelMe. 7 The U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, wherein in the image annotation, the rail damage area is marked in each original image collected and the annotation is saved as a JSON file. 8 The U-Net-based high-speed railway rail damage detection method according to claim 1, characterized in that, in the image preprocessing, each original image and corresponding label is turned into a 160X1000 pixel resolution picture.

title: AN AOI DEFECT DETECTION METHOD; 一种AOI缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明属于显示面板自动光学检测技术领域，公开了一种AOI缺陷检测方法，建立缺陷检测模型，缺陷检测模型包括生成器网络和判别器网络，缺陷检测模型用于获得缺陷相关信息；利用正样本建立训练集，利用训练集训练生成器网络和判别器网络；利用训练获得的生成器网络和判别器网络更新缺陷检测模型，获得更新后的缺陷检测模型；采集待检测面板图像；将待检测面板图像输入至更新后的缺陷检测模型中，进行缺陷检测，并获得缺陷检测信息。本发明解决了现有技术中基于监督式学习的面板缺陷检测方法存在的漏检明显异常区域、大量正样本利用不充分、负样本少的问题，能够提高整个AOI系统的缺陷检出能力，降低检测成本。

The invention belongs to the technical field of automatic optical inspection of display panels, and discloses an AOI defect detection method to establish a defect detection model. The defect detection model includes a generator network and a discriminator network. The defect detection model is used to obtain defect related information; using positive samples Establish a training set, use the training set to train the generator network and the discriminator network; use the trained generator network and the discriminator network to update the defect detection model to obtain the updated defect detection model; collect the image of the panel to be tested; change the panel to be tested The image is input into the updated defect detection model to perform defect detection and obtain defect detection information. The present invention solves the problems of missing detection of obvious abnormal areas, insufficient utilization of a large number of positive samples, and few negative samples in the panel defect detection method based on supervised learning in the prior art, and can improve the defect detection ability of the entire AOI system and reduce Inspection cost.
claims:
1. 一种AOI缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，包括以下步骤： 建立缺陷检测模型，所述缺陷检测模型包括生成器网络和判别器网络，所述缺陷检测 模型用于获得缺陷相关信息，所述缺陷相关信息包括输入样本的异常得分、和/或异常区域 的具体位置信息； 利用正样本建立训练集，利用所述训练集训练所述生成器网络和所述判别器网络； 利用训练获得的所述生成器网络和所述判别器网络更新所述缺陷检测模型，获得更新 后的缺陷检测模型； 采集待检测面板图像； 将所述待检测面板图像输入至所述更新后的缺陷检测模型中，进行缺陷检测，并获得 所述待检测面板的所述缺陷相关信息。 2. 根据权利要求1所述的AO I缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，所述异常区域的具体位置信 息包括异常区域轮廓、和/或异常区域边界框。 3. 根据权利要求1所述的AO I缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，所述生成器网络采用Unet结 构，输入图像经过N层(N>=1)下采样、N层上采样处理后得到重构图像； 所述下采样包括三个子处理过程，依次为LeakyRelu层、卷积层、批归一化层；所述上采 样包括三个子处理过程，依次为Relu层、转置卷积层、批归一化层。 4. 根据权利要求1所述的AOI缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，所述判别器网络的输入图像 经过N(N>=1)层下采样、特征提取、卷积处理后得到输出得分； 所述下采样、所述特征提取均包括三个子处理过程，依次为LeakyRelu层、卷积层、批归 一化层;所述卷积处理包括两个子处理过程，依次为卷积层、sigmoid层。 5. 根据权利要求2所述的AOI缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，所述缺陷检测模型包括依次 连接的异常GAN前向模块和特征信息提取模块； 所述异常GAN前向模块包括依次连接的生成器网络和判别器网络，用于获得输入样本 的异常得分和残差图； 所述特征信息提取模块包括依次连接的残差图开闭操作模块、异常区域轮廓提取模 块、轮廓过滤模块，用于根据残差图获得异常区域轮廓和异常区域边界框。 6. 根据权利要求1所述的AOI缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，所述利用所述训练集训练所 述生成器网络和所述判别器网络为： 针对每一个正样本，真实图像作为输入图像，经过生成器网络后生成重构图像;所述重 构图像输入至判别器网络，输出重构得分、重构特征;所述真实图像作为输入图像，直接经 过所述判别器网络后输出真实得分、真实特征； 根据所述真实图像、所述重构图像、所述真实特征、所述重构特征、所述真实得分、所述 重构得分获得最小化的生成器损失函数和判别器损失函数。 7. 根据权利要求6所述的AOI缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，所述生成器损失函数包括残 差损失、对抗损失、特征损失;所述判别器损失函数包括真实图对抗损失、重构图对抗损失； 利用所述训练集根据所述生成器损失函数、所述判别器损失函数交替地通过反向传播 训练对应网络。 8. 根据权利要求1所述的AOI缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，每一轮训练结束后，通过验证 集进行测试，计算出AUC值作为此轮训练的测试指标;全部训练结束后，保存AUC值最高时对 CN 111223093 A 权 利 要 求 书 应的生成器网络和判别器网络，并将其用于更新的所述缺陷检测模型中。 9. 根据权利要求1所述的AO I缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，在将所述待检测面板图像输 入至所述更新后的缺陷检测模型中之前，还包括:对所述待检测面板图像进行前处理； 所述前处理包括：对所述待检测面板图像进行ROI区域提取，获取ROI区域图；对所述 ROI区域图进行切分，获得多个第一图像;对每个所述第一图像进行切分，获得多个第二图 像，作为批处理图像； 将所述批处理图像输入至所述更新后的缺陷检测模型中，获得每个所述第二图像对应 的缺陷相关信息。 10. 根据权利要求1-9中任意一项所述的AOI缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，还包括进行缺 陷分类，具体为： 根据所述待检测面板图像获得已知缺陷信息;根据所述缺陷相关信息和所述已知缺陷 信息，利用重叠面积判断缺陷为已知缺陷或异常缺陷。

title: A METHOD FOR DETECTING CRACKS ON CONCRETE SURFACE BASED ON IMPROVED U-NET; 一种基于改进的U-NET的混凝土表面裂缝检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于改进的U‑net的混凝土表面裂缝检测方法，包括：获取待检测图像；利用预先训练好的基于改进的U‑net裂缝检测模型对待检测图像中的像素进行分类，得到分类结果；所述分类结果包括背景像素和裂缝像素。本发明提供一种基于改进的U‑net网络结构的裂缝自动化检测方法，能够实现完全依靠深度模型自动提取裂缝特征，实现混凝土裂缝的自动快速检测。

The invention discloses a method for detecting cracks on concrete surfaces based on an improved U-net. Classification result; the classification result includes background pixels and crack pixels. The invention provides an automatic crack detection method based on an improved U-net network structure, which can realize automatic extraction of crack features completely relying on a depth model, and realize automatic and rapid detection of concrete cracks.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR FETAL BRAIN AGE ESTIMATION AND ABNORMAL DETECTION BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 基于深度学习的胎儿大脑脑龄估计和异常检测方法及装置
abstract:
本发明公开一种基于深度学习的胎儿大脑脑龄估计和异常检测方法及装置。脑龄估计和和异常检测方法中，首先，利用临床常规采集的孕妇子宫内T2加权像建立正常胎儿大脑T2加权磁共振图像的数据集。其次，利用U型网络将胎儿大脑从子宫中分割出，再利用基于注意力机制的深度残差网络预测胎儿脑龄，并生成脑龄的不确定度和胎儿脑龄估计的可信度。最后，根据实际胎龄和预测脑龄的差异、不确定度、可信度等指标构建分类器，判断胎儿大脑发育是否异常。本发明可以同时对胎儿大脑年龄进行估计，并生成不确定性、估计可信度等指标用于检测大脑发育异常的胎儿，具有较高的准确度和精确性以及较高的临床应用前景和价值。

The invention discloses a fetal brain age estimation and abnormal detection method and device based on deep learning. In the brain age estimation and abnormal detection method, firstly, a data set of T2-weighted magnetic resonance images of the normal fetal brain is established by using T2-weighted images of pregnant women's uterus that are routinely collected clinically. Secondly, the U-shaped network is used to segment the fetal brain from the uterus, and then the deep residual network based on the attention mechanism is used to predict the fetal brain age, and generate the uncertainty of the brain age and the credibility of the fetal brain age estimation. Finally, according to the actual gestational age and the predicted brain age, the difference, uncertainty, reliability and other indicators are used to construct a classifier to determine whether the fetal brain development is abnormal. The invention can simultaneously estimate the age of the fetus' brain, and generate indicators such as uncertainty and estimation credibility for detecting fetuses with abnormal brain development, and has high accuracy and precision, as well as high clinical application prospects and value .

1.一种基于深度集成学习的胎儿脑龄估计方法，其特征在于，包括以下步骤： S1：获取正常胎儿大脑T2加权磁共振图像数据集，所述图像数据集中包含不同胎龄正 常胎儿的大脑多层T2加权磁共振图像，且每张图像均标记有对应胎儿临床的胎龄估计值； S2：建立基于注意力机制的深度残差网络，并利用S1中的图像数据集对其进行训练； 所述基于注意力机制的深度残差网络由若干注意力网络模块连接而成，所述注意力模 块包含一个主干分支和一个掩膜分支，主干分支的输出与掩膜分支的输出经过以下合并计 算后得到注意力网络模块的输出图像： X1 = T1 (xi-1) +Ml (xi-1) , Tl (xi-1) 其中，Ml和Tl分别表示第l个注意力网络模块中掩膜分支和主干分支的输出，X1表示第l 个注意力网络模块的输出图像； 最后一个注意力网络模块的输出图像通过平均池化和全连接层，得到输入图像中的胎 儿脑龄预测结果； S3：将待估计的胎儿大脑多层T2加权磁共振图像作为网络输入，利用S2中训练完毕的 基于注意力机制的深度残差网络，对其脑龄进行估计； 所述基于注意力机制的深度残差网络中共含有N个注意力网络模块； 其中前N-1个注意力网络模块中，主干分支由两个以上的残差模块连接形成，其中每个 残差模块包含连续的1 X 1、3 X 3和1 X 1的卷积层，批量标准化层和线性整流函数层，每个主 干支路的第一个残差模块后增加掩膜分支;掩膜分支包括一个最大池化层紧接着多个残差 模块进行降采样，然后紧跟着一个对称的结构进行过采样形成编码-解码结构，再经过两个 1X1的卷积层，对输出进行sigmoid函数处理，得到掩膜分支最后的输出；同时，编码-解码 结构中添加跨越的连接； 最后一个注意力网络模块的中,主干分支直接由多个1 X 1卷积层连接；掩膜分支中,将 编码-解码结构替换成多个残差模块连接，输出经过sigmoid激活。 2 .如权利要求1所述的基于深度集成学习的胎儿脑龄估计方法，其特征在于，所述的S1 和S3中，所述的大脑多层T2加权磁共振图像均利用训练后的U-Net网络从胎儿的临床子宫 内T2加权磁共振图像中分割得到； 所述U-Net网络包括一条收缩路径和一条扩张路径;在收缩路径中，先连续进行4次重 复，每次重复时,先进行2个卷积操作后接着进行2 X 2的最大池化同时通道数增加一倍，第4 次重复中完成最大池化后输出的特征图再依次通过2个卷积操作后，进入扩张路径;在扩张 路径中，也连续进行4次重复，每次重复时，先将特征图进行2X2的上采样操作后，将其与收 缩路径中对应输出的相同图像大小的特征图合并拼接，然后再对拼接结果连续进行2个卷 积操作;在收缩路径和扩张路径的卷积操作中，最后一次最大池化之前的卷积操作以及第 一次上采样操作之前的卷积操作均采用2 X 2卷积操作并增加一个dropout操作，其余均采 用3 X 3卷积操作；在扩张路径最后一次重复完成后,通过3 X 3卷积操作将特征转为概率值, 并通过1 X 1的卷积操作生成0-1掩膜； 所述U-Net网络在模型训练时，用Softmax函数输出0-1掩膜中每个像素的值，通过和真 值标签对应像素的互信息的大小作为网络训练的损失函数。 3 .如权利要求2所述的基于深度集成学习的胎儿脑龄估计方法，其特征在于，对胎儿的 临床子宫内T2加权磁共振图像进行分割时，先利用所述U-Net网络生成其胎儿大脑的0-1掩 膜,将胎儿的大脑图像从其他组织图像中分割出来;定义多层图像中的胎儿大脑面积最大 的2D层面为中间层，将每层胎儿大脑图像周边像素都补零形成的相同大小的图像，并将每 title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR FETAL BRAIN AGE ESTIMATION AND ABNORMAL DETECTION BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 基于深度学习的胎儿大脑脑龄估计和异常检测方法及装置
abstract:
本发明公开一种基于深度学习的胎儿大脑脑龄估计和异常检测方法及装置。脑龄估计和和异常检测方法中，首先，利用临床常规采集的孕妇子宫内T2加权像建立正常胎儿大脑T2加权磁共振图像的数据集。其次，利用U型网络将胎儿大脑从子宫中分割出，再利用基于注意力机制的深度残差网络预测胎儿脑龄，并生成脑龄的不确定度和胎儿脑龄估计的可信度。最后，根据实际胎龄和预测脑龄的差异、不确定度、可信度等指标构建分类器，判断胎儿大脑发育是否异常。本发明可以同时对胎儿大脑年龄进行估计，并生成不确定性、估计可信度等指标用于检测大脑发育异常的胎儿，具有较高的准确度和精确性以及较高的临床应用前景和价值。

The invention discloses a fetal brain age estimation and abnormal detection method and device based on deep learning. In the method of brain age estimation and abnormality detection, firstly, a data set of T2-weighted magnetic resonance images of normal fetal brain is established by using T2-weighted images of pregnant women's uterus that are routinely collected clinically. Secondly, the U-shaped network is used to segment the fetal brain from the uterus, and then the deep residual network based on the attention mechanism is used to predict the fetal brain age, and generate the uncertainty of the brain age and the credibility of the fetal brain age estimation. Finally, according to the actual gestational age and the predicted brain age, the difference, uncertainty, reliability and other indicators are used to construct a classifier to determine whether the fetal brain development is abnormal. The invention can simultaneously estimate the age of the fetus' brain, and generate indicators such as uncertainty and estimation credibility for detecting fetuses with abnormal brain development, and has high accuracy and precision, as well as high clinical application prospects and value .

1卷积层连接；掩膜分支中，将 编码-解码结构替换成多个残差模块连接，输出经过sigmoid激活。 3 .如权利要求1所述的基于深度集成学习的胎儿脑龄估计方法，其特征在于，所述的S1 和S3中，所述的大脑多层T2加权磁共振图像均利用训练后的U-Net网络从胎儿的临床子宫 内T2加权磁共振图像中分割得到； 所述U-Net网络包括一条收缩路径和一条扩张路径;在收缩路径中，先连续进行4次重 复，每次重复时,先进行2个卷积操作后接着进行2 X 2的最大池化同时通道数增加一倍，第4 次重复中完成最大池化后输出的特征图再依次通过2个卷积操作后，进入扩张路径;在扩张 路径中，也连续进行4次重复，每次重复时，先将特征图进行2X2的上采样操作后，将其与收 缩路径中对应输出的相同图像大小的特征图合并拼接，然后再对拼接结果连续进行2个卷 title: A METHOD FOR ABNORMAL DETECTION OF OUTDOOR INSULATORS IN TRACTION SUBSTATIONS; 一种牵引变电所户外绝缘子异常检测方法
abstract:
本发明提供一种牵引变电所户外绝缘子异常检测方法。涉及计算机视觉、模式识别与智能系统技术领域。分别构建绝缘子定位网络与绝缘子图像生成网络的数据集；构建了一个绝缘子定位网络，通过训练使网络获得对图像中绝缘子定位能力；构建了一个绝缘子图像生成网络，通过训练使其获得对绝缘子图像重建能力；将牵引变电所图像输入网络模型；通过绝缘子定位网络对绝缘子进行定位，提取绝缘子图像；对绝缘子进行异常检测，绝缘子图像生成网络对每张图片给予一个异常分数。设置一个异常判断阈值，若异常分数超过设置的阈值，则判断为异常样本，若低于阈值，则判断为正常样本。最后对判定的异常图像及其生成图像进行特征提取，对比两者差异定位出异常区域。

The invention provides a method for detecting abnormality of outdoor insulators of traction substations. It involves the technical fields of computer vision, pattern recognition and intelligent systems. The datasets of the insulator location network and the insulator image generation network were constructed respectively; an insulator location network was constructed, and the network was trained to obtain the ability to locate insulators in the image; an insulator image generation network was constructed to obtain the reconstruction of the insulator image through training. ability; input the image of the traction substation into the network model; locate the insulator through the insulator positioning network, extract the insulator image; perform anomaly detection on the insulator, and the insulator image generation network will give an anomaly score to each image. Set an abnormal judgment threshold. If the abnormal score exceeds the set threshold, it will be judged as an abnormal sample, and if it is lower than the threshold, it will be judged as a normal sample. Finally, feature extraction is performed on the determined abnormal image and its generated image, and the abnormal area is located by comparing the difference between the two.
claims:
1 .一种牵引变电所户外绝缘子异常检测方法，包括如下步骤： 步骤一、绝缘子定位网络数据集构建 采用牵引变电所内杆塔搭载监控摄像头拍摄的图像构成图像库，对图像库中每张图像 进行中值滤波处理以抑制噪声，具体为：用3X3像素滑窗算法遍历图像，对滑窗内9个像素 点按像素值大小进行排序，取中值作为该滑窗中心点像素值;通过人工标注的方式，使用能 够包围完整绝缘子的包围框标注出图像中的绝缘子区域，所有图像及其标注结果共同构成 绝缘子定位网络数据集； 步骤二、绝缘子图像生成网络数据集构建 对图像库中的图像进行裁剪，提取出单独的绝缘子图像，考虑到实际中存在异常的绝 缘子图像较少，对每一张正常绝缘子图像，通过人工制作其对应的裂纹、掉磁、闪络的异常 绝缘子图像，使每张正常绝缘子图像都有一张异常绝缘子图像所对应;所有的两种图像共 同构成绝缘子图像生成网络数据集； 步骤三、绝缘子定位网络的构建与训练 绝缘子定位网络采取FasterlCNN网络模型，包括特征提取网络，候选区域生成网络 和分类与边界框回归网络;采用在大型分类识别数据集ImageNet上经预训练的VGG-16的前 16层作为特征提取网络，生成特征图；在原始图像的对应位置生成不同面积和宽高比的区 域，利用softmax函数计算每个区域内含有绝缘子的概率P，作为候选区域生成网络;再将候 选区域输入到分类与边界框回归网络对目标进行分类，同时对目标边界框进行回归，输出 绝缘子包围框位置及其经全连接层被分类为绝缘子的概率P 0 ,具体为:特征图进入候选区 域生成网络后，用3 X 3像素滑窗算法遍历特征图，在每个滑窗位置上基于9个固定比例的默 认边界框生成多个区域，选取概率P最高的前300个区域作为候选区域;设置候选区域默认 边界框的长宽比为0.5，1，2,尺寸为8倍，16倍，32倍;设置基础边界框坐标为［0,0,15,15］， 其中（0,0）为边界框左上角坐标，（15,15）为边界框右下角坐标;保持该边界框面积与中心 点不变，根据三种长宽比可得三个新边界框，将三种尺寸与三个新边界框的长与宽相乘，保 持中心点不变，即可得到9个默认边界框;将得到的候选区域作用于特征图，通过RoI池化提 取区域特征，分类与边界框回归网络对这些特征进行分类与边界框的预测;使用绝缘子定 位网络数据集对绝缘子定位网络进行训练，使其获得对图像中绝缘子定位能力； 步骤四、绝缘子图像生成网络的构建与训练 绝缘子图像生成网络基于GAN网络结构搭建，包含三个部分:生成器、判别器、重构编码 器;其中生成器基于自动编码器结构搭建，包含一个编码器和一个解码器;编码器将一张3 通道的图片X映射为一个32维的向量Z；在解码器一端加入U-Net跨层连接方式，以获得更佳 的图像生成效果，最终将编码得到的32维向量Z重建为3通道图片X'；判别器采取与生成器 中编码器相同的网络结构，用于区分原图与生成器生成的重建图；重构编码器将生成器生 成的重建图片X'再映射为一个32维的向量Z',其结构与生成器中编码器相同，用于对比原 图与重建图在高一层抽象空间中的差异，具体为:编码器由4个4X4卷积层组成，输出一个 大小为1X1X32的向量，其宽高为1,维数为32；解码器对该向量进行反卷积操作，每进行一 次反卷积操作，就进行一次上采样，随后与编码器中对应层的具有相同尺寸的特征进行拼 接，经4个4X4反卷积层后输出重建图；重建图通过重构编码器再进行一次编码，获得大小 同为1 X 1 X 32的向量；网络损失包括三个部分，分别为：1）生成器重建损失，比较的是原图 与重建图，采用L1损失；2）编码网络损失即生成器+重构编码器的损失，比较的是原图的编 码特征与重建图的编码特征，采用L2损失；3）判别网络损失，采用二分类的交叉熵损失；使 用绝缘子图像生成网络训练集对绝缘子图像生成网络进行训练，训练方法采取Adam训练方 法，使其获得对绝缘子图像重建能力； 步骤五、图像输入 在实时处理情况下，提取通过摄像头采集并保存在存储区的原始视频图像，作为要进 行异常检测的输入图像;在离线处理情况下，将已采集的视频文件分解为多个帧组成的图 像序列，按照时间顺序，逐个提取帧图像作为输入图像，如果输入图像为空，则整个流程中 止； 步骤六、绝缘子定位 将输入图像尺寸归一化为绝缘子定位网络输入端所需尺寸224X224像素，然后经过网 络的正向处理后得到绝缘子包围框的位置及概率P 0 ；若该概率P 0 大于预先设置的阈值0.9, 则认为定位成功，提取出所有定位成功的绝缘子图像； 步骤七、绝缘子异常检测 将步骤六中提取的绝缘子图像输入绝缘子图像生成网络进行异常检测，将网络损失中 的编码网络损失作为输入图像的异常分数，同时设置一个阈值为0.2的异常判断阈值，如果 输入图像的异常分数小于该异常判断阈值时则判定为正常，否则判定为异常;将判定为异 常的图像与其通过绝缘子图像生成网络所生成的图像同时进行LBP特征提取，得到各自的 LBP特征图，任选一图进行逐像素搜索，并与另一图的对应位置像素进行比较;若一像素点 满足:该像素点在两图中像素差值大于等于30,且以该像素点为中心的3X3像素窗□内8个 像素点的像素差值均大于等于30,则将该像素点判断为存在异常;然后对判定为异常的图 像进行二值化处理，令判断为存在异常的像素点灰度值为255,其它像素点灰度值为0,即可 获得异常区域，跳转到步骤五。

1 . A method for detecting abnormality of outdoor insulators in traction substations, comprising the following steps: Step 1: Building a network data set for insulator positioning Using images captured by monitoring cameras mounted on towers in the traction substations to form an image library, and performing an image analysis on each image in the image library. Median filter processing to suppress noise, specifically: traverse the image with a 3X3 pixel sliding window algorithm, sort the 9 pixels in the sliding window according to the size of the pixel value, and take the median value as the pixel value of the center point of the sliding window; The insulator area in the image is marked with a bounding box that can enclose the complete insulator, and all the images and their annotation results together constitute an insulator positioning network dataset; Crop and extract individual insulator images. Considering that there are few abnormal insulator images in practice, for each normal insulator image, the corresponding abnormal insulator images of cracks, demagnetization, and flashovers are artificially produced, so that each The normal insulator image corresponds to an abnormal insulator image; all the two images together constitute the insulator image generation network data set; Step 3, the construction and training of the insulator positioning network The insulator positioning network adopts the FasterCNN network model, including the feature extraction network, candidate Region generation network and classification and bounding box regression network; using VGG-16 pretrained on the large classification and recognition dataset ImageNet The 16 layers are used as a feature extraction network to generate feature maps; regions with different areas and aspect ratios are generated at the corresponding positions of the original image, and the softmax function is used to calculate the probability P of insulators in each region as a candidate region generation network; The region is input to the classification and bounding box regression network to classify the target, and at the same time, the target bounding box is regressed to output the insulator bounding box position and its probability P that it is classified as an insulator by the fully connected layer 0 , specifically: after the feature map enters the candidate region generation network, the feature map is traversed with a 3 × 3 pixel sliding window algorithm, and multiple regions are generated based on 9 default bounding boxes of fixed proportions at each sliding window position, and the probability P is the highest. The first 300 regions of the candidate region are used as candidate regions; set the aspect ratio of the default bounding box of the candidate region to 0.5, 1, 2, and the size to 8 times, 16 times, and 32 times; set the coordinates of the base bounding box to [0, 0, 15, 15], where (0,0) is the coordinate of the upper left corner of the bounding box, and (15,15) is the coordinate of the lower right corner of the bounding box; keeping the area and center point of the bounding box unchanged, three new values can be obtained according to the three aspect ratios. Bounding box, multiply the three sizes by the length and width of the three new bounding boxes, keep the center point unchanged, you can get 9 default bounding boxes; apply the obtained candidate area to the feature map, and extract it through RoI pooling Regional features, classification and bounding box regression network to classify these features and predict bounding boxes; use the insulator location network dataset to train the insulator location network to obtain the ability to locate insulators in the image; Step 4, insulator image generation network The construction and training of the insulator image generation network is based on the GAN network structure and consists of three parts: the generator, the discriminator, and the reconstruction encoder; the generator is built based on the auto-encoder structure, including an encoder and a decoder; The device will take a 3 The image X of the channel is mapped to a 32-dimensional vector Z; the U-Net cross-layer connection method is added at the decoder end to obtain a better image generation effect, and finally the encoded 32-dimensional vector Z is reconstructed into a 3-channel image X '; the discriminator adopts the same network structure as the encoder in the generator to distinguish the original image from the reconstructed image generated by the generator; the reconstructed encoder remaps the reconstructed image X' generated by the generator into a 32-dimensional vector Z', whose structure is the same as the encoder in the generator, is used to compare the difference between the original image and the reconstructed image in a higher abstract space, specifically: the encoder consists of four 4X4 convolutional layers, and the output is a size of 1X1X32 The vector has a width and height of 1 and a dimension of 32; the decoder performs a deconvolution operation on this vector, and performs an upsampling every time a deconvolution operation is performed, and then has the same size as the corresponding layer in the encoder. The features are spliced, and the reconstructed image is output after four 4X4 deconvolution layers; the reconstructed image is encoded again through the reconstruction encoder to obtain a vector with the same size as 1 X 1 X 32; the network loss includes three parts, respectively For: 1) The generator reconstructs the loss and compares the original image Compared with the reconstructed image, L1 loss is used; 2) The encoding network loss is the loss of the generator + reconstructed encoder. The encoding feature of the original image and the encoding feature of the reconstructed image are compared, and the L2 loss is used; 3) The discriminant network loss, using The cross-entropy loss of the two classifications; use the insulator image generation network training set to train the insulator image generation network, and the training method adopts the Adam training method to obtain the ability to reconstruct the insulator image; Step 5. In the case of real-time processing of image input, extract The original video image collected by the camera and saved in the storage area is used as the input image for anomaly detection; in the case of offline processing, the collected video file is decomposed into an image sequence composed of multiple frames, and extracted one by one in chronological order The frame image is used as the input image. If the input image is empty, the whole process will be terminated; Step 6. Insulator positioning Normalize the input image size to the required size of the input end of the insulator positioning network, 224X224 pixels, and then obtain the result after the forward processing of the network. The position and probability P of the bounding box of the insulator 0 ; if the probability P 0 If the value is greater than the preset threshold of 0.9, it is considered that the positioning is successful, and all insulator images with successful positioning are extracted; Step 7. Insulator abnormality detection Input the insulator images extracted in step 6 into the insulator image generation network for abnormal detection, and the code in the network loss will be detected. The network loss is used as the abnormal score of the input image, and an abnormal judgment threshold with a threshold of 0.2 is set at the same time. If the abnormal score of the input image is less than the abnormal judgment threshold, it is judged as normal, otherwise it is judged as abnormal; the image that is judged to be abnormal will pass it. The images generated by the insulator image generation network are simultaneously subjected to LBP feature extraction to obtain their respective LBP feature maps, select one image for pixel-by-pixel search, and compare with the corresponding position pixels of another image; if a pixel satisfies: the pixel If the pixel difference between the two images is greater than or equal to 30, and the pixel difference of 8 pixels in the 3X3 pixel window centered on the pixel is greater than or equal to 30, the pixel is judged to be abnormal; The image determined to be abnormal is binarized, and the gray value of the pixel determined to be abnormal is 255, and the gray value of other pixels is 0, and the abnormal area can be obtained, and jump to step 5.

title: METHOD FOR DETECTING ABNORMALITY OF OUTDOOR INSULATOR IN TRACTION SUBSTATION; 一种牵引变电所户外绝缘子异常检测方法
abstract:
本发明提供一种牵引变电所户外绝缘子异常检测方法。涉及计算机视觉、模式识别与智能系统技术领域。分别构建绝缘子定位网络与绝缘子图像生成网络的数据集；构建了一个绝缘子定位网络，通过训练使网络获得对图像中绝缘子定位能力；构建了一个绝缘子图像生成网络，通过训练使其获得对绝缘子图像重建能力；将牵引变电所图像输入网络模型；通过绝缘子定位网络对绝缘子进行定位，提取绝缘子图像；对绝缘子进行异常检测，绝缘子图像生成网络对每张图片给予一个异常分数。设置一个异常判断阈值，若异常分数超过设置的阈值，则判断为异常样本，若低于阈值，则判断为正常样本。最后对判定的异常图像及其生成图像进行特征提取，对比两者差异定位出异常区域。

The invention provides a method for detecting abnormality of outdoor insulators in traction substations. Involved in the technical fields of computer vision, pattern recognition and intelligent systems. Construct the data set of the insulator positioning network and the insulator image generation network respectively; construct an insulator positioning network, through training, the network can obtain the ability to locate the insulator in the image; construct an insulator image generation network, and obtain the reconstruction of the insulator image through training Ability; input the image of the traction substation into the network model; locate the insulator through the insulator positioning network and extract the insulator image; perform anomaly detection on the insulator, and the insulator image generation network gives an abnormal score to each picture. Set an abnormality judgment threshold. If the abnormal score exceeds the set threshold, it is judged as an abnormal sample, and if it is lower than the threshold, it is judged as a normal sample. Finally, feature extraction is performed on the judged abnormal image and its generated image, and the difference between the two is compared to locate the abnormal area.

apply the obtained candidate area to the feature map, extract the regional features through RoI pooling, and classify and bounding box regression network to these features Perform classification and bounding box prediction; use insulators to determine The bit network data set trains the insulator positioning network to obtain the ability to locate the insulator in the image; Step 4. Construction and training of the insulator image generation network The insulator image generation network is built based on the GAN network structure and consists of three parts: generator, Discriminator, reconstruction encoder; the generator is based on the structure of the autoencoder, including an encoder and a decoder; the encoder maps a 3-channel picture X to a 32-dimensional vector Z; at the decoder end The U-Net cross-layer connection method is added to obtain a better image generation effect, and finally the 32-dimensional vector Z obtained by encoding is reconstructed into a 3-channel picture X'; the discriminator adopts the same network structure as the encoder in the generator. To distinguish the original image from the reconstructed image generated by the generator; the reconstruction encoder recompresses the reconstructed image X'generated by the generator into a 32-dimensional vector Z', which has the same structure as the encoder in the generator, and is used to compare the original The difference between the image and the reconstructed image in the higher level of abstract space, specifically: the encoder consists of 4 4X4 convolutional layers, and outputs a vector of 1X1X32 with a width and height of 1, and a dimension of 32; the decoder pair The vector is subjected to deconvolution operation. Each time a deconvolution operation is performed, an up-sampling is performed, and then it is spliced with features of the same size in the corresponding layer in the encoder, and output after 4 4 X 4 deconvolution layers Reconstructed image; the reconstructed image is coded again by the reconstructed encoder, and the size is the same as 1 X 1 X 32 vector; the network loss includes three parts, namely: 1) The generator reconstruction loss, the comparison is the original image L1 loss is used with the reconstructed image; 2) The coding network loss is the loss of the generator + reconstructed encoder, and the coding feature of the original image is compared with the coding feature of the reconstructed image, and the L2 loss is used; 3) To determine the network loss, use Two-class cross-entropy loss; use the insulator image generation network training set to train the insulator image generation network, and the training method adopts the Adam training method to obtain the ability to reconstruct the insulator image; Step 5. Image input is extracted in the case of real-time processing The original video image collected by the camera and saved in the storage area is used as the input image for abnormality detection; in the case of offline processing, the collected video file is decomposed into a sequence of images composed of multiple frames, and extracted one by one in chronological order The frame image is used as the input image. If the input image is empty, the whole process is aborted; Step 6: Insulator positioning normalizes the input image size to the required size of 224X224 pixels at the input end of the insulator positioning network, and then passes the network forward processing to obtain The position of the insulator bounding box and the probability Po; if the probability Po is greater than the preset threshold 0.9, It is considered that the positioning is successful, and all the successfully positioned insulator images are extracted; Step 7. Insulator anomaly detection Input the insulator image extracted in step 6 into the insulator image generation network for anomaly detection, and use the coding network loss in the network loss as the anomaly of the input image At the same time, set an abnormality judgment threshold with a threshold of 0.2. If the abnormality score of the input image is less than the abnormality judgment threshold, it is judged as normal, otherwise it is judged as abnormal; the image judged to be abnormal and the image generated by the insulator image generation network The LBP feature extraction of the image is carried out at the same time to obtain the respective LBP feature map. Choose one image to search pixel by pixel, and compare it with the corresponding position pixel of the other image; if one pixel meets: the pixel is different in the two images If the value is greater than or equal to 30, and the pixel difference of 8 pixels in the 3X3 pixel window centered on the pixel is greater than or equal to 30, then the pixel is judged to be abnormal; then the image judged to be abnormal is binary-valued Make the gray value of the pixel that is judged to be abnormal, and the gray value of other pixels is 0, then the abnormal area can be obtained, and then go to step 5.

title: SLICE DEFECT DETECTION METHOD, ELECTRONIC DEVICE AND READABLE STORAGE MEDIUM; 切片缺陷检测方法、电子装置及可读存储介质
abstract:
本发明涉及人工智能中的智能决策技术领域，揭露一种切片缺陷检测方法，包括：将待检测切片集输入切片缺陷检测模型的特征提取分支，得到每张切片的特征集，将特征集输入切片缺陷检测模型的上采样分支，得到每张切片的缺陷区域及缺陷区域对应的预测缺陷类别，将特征集输入切片缺陷检测模型的分类分支，得到第二缺陷类别分布表，当各个缺陷区域对应的预测缺陷类别在第二缺陷类别分布表中的第二概率值大于预设阈值时，将各个缺陷区域对应的预测缺陷类别作为各个缺陷区域对应的目标缺陷类别。本发明提高了切片缺陷区域、缺陷类别检测的准确度。另外，本发明还涉及区块链技术，同时本发明可应用于智慧医疗领域中，从而推动智慧城市的建设。

The invention relates to the technical field of intelligent decision-making in artificial intelligence, and discloses a slice defect detection method, comprising: inputting a slice set to be detected into a feature extraction branch of a slice defect detection model, obtaining a feature set of each slice, and inputting the feature set into the slice The upsampling branch of the defect detection model obtains the defect area of each slice and the predicted defect category corresponding to the defect area, and inputs the feature set into the classification branch of the slice defect detection model to obtain the second defect category distribution table. When the second probability value of the predicted defect category in the second defect category distribution table is greater than the preset threshold, the predicted defect category corresponding to each defect area is used as the target defect category corresponding to each defect area. The invention improves the detection accuracy of slice defect area and defect category. In addition, the present invention also relates to blockchain technology, and at the same time, the present invention can be applied in the field of smart medical treatment, thereby promoting the construction of smart cities.

title: DEFECT DETECTION METHOD AND SYSTEM BASED ON MULTI-ANGLE IMAGING; 基于多角度成像的缺陷检测方法及系统
abstract:
本申请实施例中提供了一种基于多角度成像的缺陷检测方法及系统，首先，获取待检产品的原始图像；然后，根据原始图像获取待检产品的品类信息、根据原始图像获取待检产品的实际位置坐标以及建立用于多角度拍照的多角度参数库；然后，根据品类信息、实际位置坐标以及多角度参数库得到待检产品的多角度图像；最后，根据待检产品的多角度图像得到待检产品的缺陷检测结果。实现了实现产品“小批量、多批次”生产模式下产品的自适应智能质检，实现了产品三维的多面结构的多角度成像并基于此进行更为准确的缺陷检测，解决了现有技术中不能实现多批次产品基于多角度图像进行缺陷检测的问题。

The embodiment of this application provides a defect detection method and system based on multi-angle imaging. title: A PRODUCT SURFACE DEFECT DETECTION METHOD, DEVICE AND EQUIPMENT; 一种产品表面缺陷检测方法和装置及设备
abstract:
本发明提供一种产品表面缺陷检测方法和装置及设备，包括：获取图像并确定图像是否为需要检测指定类型缺陷的待检测图像；若是，通过预训练的缺陷检测模型利用滑动窗口对待检测图像进行滑动采样，并对采样的窗口区域进行缺陷检测，输出待检测图像中存在缺陷的窗口区域位置标识；利用图像分割算法对存在缺陷的窗口区域进行图像分割，得到存在缺陷的窗口区域内各缺陷的轮廓区域；通过区域生长算法将相邻的轮廓区域进行连接，得到待检测图像中存在的缺陷的形态和数目。本发明可以对图像进行滑动采样检测的方式，解决现有技术费时费力、无法检测表面细小缺陷且定位性差的问题。

The present invention provides a product surface defect detection method, device and equipment, including: acquiring an image and determining whether the image is an image to be detected that needs to detect a specified type of defect; if so, using a sliding window to detect the image to be detected through a pre-trained defect detection model Sliding sampling, defect detection is performed on the sampled window area, and the location identification of the defective window area in the image to be detected is output; the image segmentation algorithm is used to segment the defective window area to obtain the location of each defect in the defective window area. Contour area: Connect adjacent contour areas through a region growing algorithm to obtain the shape and number of defects in the image to be detected. The present invention can perform sliding sampling detection on images, thereby solving the problems of the prior art that it is time-consuming and labor-intensive, cannot detect small surface defects, and has poor positioning properties.
claims:

title: METHOD, DEVICE AND EQUIPMENT FOR DETECTING PRODUCT SURFACE DEFECTS; 一种产品表面缺陷检测方法和装置及设备
abstract:
本发明提供一种产品表面缺陷检测方法和装置及设备，包括：获取图像并确定图像是否为需要检测指定类型缺陷的待检测图像；若是，通过预训练的缺陷检测模型利用滑动窗口对待检测图像进行滑动采样，并对采样的窗口区域进行缺陷检测，输出待检测图像中存在缺陷的窗口区域位置标识；利用图像分割算法对存在缺陷的窗口区域进行图像分割，得到存在缺陷的窗口区域内各缺陷的轮廓区域；通过区域生长算法将相邻的轮廓区域进行连接，得到待检测图像中存在的缺陷的形态和数目。本发明可以对图像进行滑动采样检测的方式，解决现有技术费时费力、无法检测表面细小缺陷且定位性差的问题。

The present invention provides a product surface defect detection method, device and equipment, including: acquiring an image and determining whether the image is a to-be-detected image that needs to be detected for a specified type of defect; if so, using a pre-trained defect detection model to perform a sliding window on the to-be-detected image Slide sampling, and perform defect detection on the sampled window area, and output the position identification of the window area with defects in the image to be inspected; image segmentation is performed on the defective window area using the image segmentation algorithm to obtain the defect of each defect in the defective window area Contour area: The adjacent contour areas are connected by a region growing algorithm to obtain the shape and number of defects in the image to be inspected. The present invention can perform sliding sampling detection on the image, and solves the problems of time-consuming and labor-intensive, inability to detect small surface defects and poor localization in the prior art.

通过区域生长算法将相邻的轮廓区域进行连接，得到所述待检测图像中存在的缺陷的 形态和数目。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述预训练的缺陷检测模型通过以下训练 方式生成： 初始化包括采样部分和检测部分的网络模型，所述采样部分用于利用滑动窗口对图像 进行滑动采样，所述检测部分用于对所述窗口区域进行缺陷检测； 获取包括多个样本的样本集，每个样本包括图像及标注的缺陷位置； 将所述多个样本中的图像输入到初始化网络模型，根据所述初始化网络模型输出的缺 陷位置及标注的缺陷位置，对所述初始化网络模型的参数进行调整，达到训练结束条件时 结束参数调整，得到所述预训练的缺陷检测模型。 3 .根据权利要求2所述的方法，其特征在于，所述利用滑动窗口对图像进行滑动采样， 包括如下至少一个步骤： 利用滑动窗口对图像进行水平方向的滑动采样； 利用滑动窗口对图像进行竖直方向的滑动采样； 利用滑动窗口在水平方向/竖直方向滑动时，按照单位时间内移动固定长度的速度，对 图像进行滑动采样，其中，所述固定长度由该滑动窗口水平方向/竖直方向边长的固定比例 确定。 4 .根据权利要求2所述的方法，其特征在于，初始化包括采样部分和检测部分的网络模 型，包括如下至少一个步骤： 初始化所述采样部分采用的滑动窗口的高度和宽度； 初始化所述采样部分采用的滑动窗口的滑动方向； 初始化所述采样部分利用滑动窗口在水平方向/竖直方向滑动时，单位时间内移动的 固定长度，其中，所述固定长度由该滑动窗口水平方向/竖直方向边长的固定比例确定。 5 .根据权利要求2〜4任一所述的方法，其特征在于，根据所述网络模型输出的缺陷位 置及标注的缺陷位置，对当前网络模型的参数进行调整，包括： 对当前网络模型中采样部分采用的滑动窗口的高度和/或宽度进行调整； title: EQUIPMENT FAULT DEFECT DIAGNOSIS METHOD BASED ON IMPROVED U-NET NEURAL NETWORK; 基于改进U-NET神经网络的设备故障缺陷诊断方法
abstract:
基于改进U‑Net神经网络的设备故障缺陷诊断方法，包括构建含5层下采样网络层、5层上采样网络层、且带有三重约束的改进U‑Net网络模型；所述三重约束，包括对位于最底层的第五上采样网络层进行三级损失约束、对紧邻第五上采样网络层的第四上采样网络层进行二级损失约束和对位于最顶层的第一上采样网络层进行一级损失约束。本发明通过对原始图像采用改进的改进U‑Net神经网络模型进行缺陷裂纹位置、形状的预测和生成，然后通过WebGL方法进行3D显示交互，进一步提升了对设备外观裂纹像素级预测的精度和正确度，同时显著提升了人机交互的画面体验感，有利于设备外观缺陷裂纹位置的有效识别和精准定位，减少维护成本。

The equipment failure defect diagnosis method based on improved U-Net neural network, including constructing the improved U-Net network model containing 5 layers of down-sampling network layers, 5 layers of up-sampling network layers, and triple constraints; the triple constraints include A third-level loss constraint is applied to the fifth upsampling network layer at the bottom, a second-level loss constraint is performed on the fourth upsampling network layer next to the fifth upsampling network layer, and a second-level loss constraint is performed on the first upsampling network layer at the topmost layer Level 1 loss constraints. The present invention uses the improved U-Net neural network model to predict and generate the location and shape of defect cracks on the original image, and then uses the WebGL method to perform 3D display interaction, further improving the accuracy and correctness of pixel-level prediction of equipment appearance cracks At the same time, the screen experience of human-computer interaction is significantly improved, which is conducive to the effective identification and precise positioning of the location of equipment appearance defects and cracks, and reduces maintenance costs.

title: EQUIPMENT FAULT DEFECT DIAGNOSIS METHOD BASED ON IMPROVED U-NET NEURAL NETWORK; 基于改进U-NET神经网络的设备故障缺陷诊断方法
abstract:
基于改进U‑Net神经网络的设备故障缺陷诊断方法，包括构建含5层下采样网络层、5层上采样网络层、且带有三重约束的改进U‑Net网络模型；所述三重约束，包括对位于最底层的第五上采样网络层进行三级损失约束、对紧邻第五上采样网络层的第四上采样网络层进行二级损失约束和对位于最顶层的第一上采样网络层进行一级损失约束。本发明通过对原始图像采用改进的改进U‑Net神经网络模型进行缺陷裂纹位置、形状的预测和生成，然后通过WebGL方法进行3D显示交互，进一步提升了对设备外观裂纹像素级预测的精度和正确度，同时显著提升了人机交互的画面体验感，有利于设备外观缺陷裂纹位置的有效识别和精准定位，减少维护成本。

The equipment fault defect diagnosis method based on the improved UNet neural network includes the construction of an improved UNet network model with five downsampling network layers, five upsampling network layers, and triple constraints; the triple constraints include Perform a three-level loss constraint on the fifth upsampling network layer at the bottom, perform a two-level loss constraint on the fourth upsampling network layer next to the fifth upsampling network layer, and perform a second-level loss constraint on the first upsampling network layer at the top First-level loss constraint. The present invention uses an improved U-Net neural network model for the original image to predict and generate the defect crack position and shape, and then uses the WebGL method to perform 3D display interaction, which further improves the accuracy and accuracy of pixel-level prediction of device appearance cracks At the same time, it significantly improves the screen experience of human-computer interaction, which is conducive to the effective identification and precise positioning of the crack location of the equipment appearance defect, and reduces the maintenance cost.

title: A DEEP LEARNING METHOD AND DEVICE FOR DETECTING ATRIAL SEPTAL DEFECT; 一种深度学习的房间隔缺损检测方法及装置
abstract:
本发明提供了一种深度学习的房间隔缺损检测方法及装置，其中方法包括：获取超声心动图，对超声心动图进行预处理，提取感兴趣区域；对感兴趣区域进行特征提取，识别出剑突下房间隔额状切面、剑突下房间隔矢状切面、心尖四腔心切面、低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面；对房缺最小距离点进行检测；对剑突下房间隔额状切面、剑突下房间隔矢状切面、心尖四腔心切面、低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面的心脏结构进行分割，得到分割结果，其中，心脏结构包括：左心房、右心房、左心室、右心室、主动脉和肺动脉；根据分割结果，对检测到的房缺最小距离点边界框进行过滤，将过滤后的结果作为房间隔缺损检测结果。

The present invention provides a deep learning atrial septal defect detection method and device, wherein the method comprises: acquiring an echocardiogram, preprocessing the echocardiogram, and extracting a region of interest; extracting features of the region of interest, identifying a frontal section of the atrial septum below the xiphoid process, a sagittal section of the atrial septum below the xiphoid process, an apical four-chamber section, a low parasternal four-chamber section, and a parasternal aortic short-axis section; detecting a minimum distance point of the atrial septal defect; segmenting the heart structures of the frontal section of the atrial septum below the xiphoid process, the sagittal section of the atrial septum below the xiphoid process, the apical four-chamber section, the low parasternal four-chamber section, and the parasternal aortic short-axis section, and obtaining a segmentation result, wherein the heart structure comprises: a left atrium, a right atrium, a left ventricle, a right ventricle, aorta, and a pulmonary artery; according to the segmentation result, filtering the detected minimum distance point boundary box of the atrial septal defect, and using the filtered result as the atrial septal defect detection result.
claims:
1 . 一种深度学习的房间隔缺损检测方法，其特征在于，包括： 获取超声心动图，对所述超声心动图进行预处理，提取感兴趣区域； 对所述感兴趣区域进行特征提取，识别出剑突下房间隔额状切面、剑突下房间隔矢状切面、心尖四腔心切面、低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面； 对房缺最小距离点进行检测； 对所述剑突下房间隔额状切面、所述剑突下房间隔矢状切面、所述心尖四腔心切面、所述低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和所述胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面的心脏结构进行分割，得到分割结果，其中，所述心脏结构包括:左心房、右心房、左心室、右心室、主动脉和肺动脉； 根据分割结果，对检测到的房缺最小距离点边界框进行过滤，将过滤后的结果作为房间隔缺损检测结果； 其中： 所述根据分割结果，对检测到的房缺最小距离点边界框进行过滤包括： 利用所述分割结果对所述房缺最小距离点边界框进行筛选，去除掉在左心房、右心房以外的边界框。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述对所述感兴趣区域进行特征提取包括： 将预处理后的超声心动图图像输入进ResNet网络，所述ResNet网络通过四阶段的特征提取对所述感兴趣区域进行特征提取。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述对房缺最小距离点进行检测包括： 采用基于FCOS网络对所述房缺最小距离点进行检测。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述对所述剑突下房间隔额状切面、所述剑突下房间隔矢状切面、所述心尖四腔心切面、所述低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和所述胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面的心脏结构进行分割包括： 采用U-Net对所述剑突下房间隔额状切面、所述剑突下房间隔矢状切面、所述心尖四腔心切面、所述低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和所述胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面的心脏结构进行分割。 5 . 一种深度学习的房间隔缺损检测装置，其特征在于，包括： 预处理模块，用于获取超声心动图，对所述超声心动图进行预处理，提取感兴趣区域； 特征提取模块，用于对所述感兴趣区域进行特征提取，识别出剑突下房间隔额状切面、 剑突下房间隔矢状切面、心尖四腔心切面、低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面； 检测模块，用于对房缺最小距离点进行检测； 分割模块，用于对所述剑突下房间隔额状切面、所述剑突下房间隔矢状切面、所述心尖四腔心切面、所述低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和所述胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面的心脏结构进行分割，得到分割结果，其中，所述心脏结构包括:左心房、右心房、左心室、右心室、主动脉和肺动脉； 过滤模块，用于根据分割结果，对检测到的房缺最小距离点边界框进行过滤，将过滤后的结果作为房间隔缺损检测结果； 其中： 所述过滤模块通过如下方式根据分割结果，对检测到的房缺最小距离点边界框进行过 滤： 所述过滤模块，具体用于利用所述分割结果对所述房缺最小距离点边界框进行筛选， 去除掉在左心房、右心房以外的边界框。 6 .根据权利要求5所述的装置，其特征在于，所述特征提取模块通过如下方式对所述感兴趣区域进行特征提取： 所述特征提取模块，具体用于将预处理后的超声心动图图像输入进ResNet网络，所述 ResNet网络通过四阶段的特征提取对所述感兴趣区域进行特征提取。 7 .根据权利要求5所述的装置，其特征在于，所述检测模块通过如下方式对房缺最小距离点进行检测： 所述检测模块，具体用于采用基于FCOS网络对所述房缺最小距离点进行检测。 8 .根据权利要求5所述的装置，其特征在于，所述分割模块通过如下方式对所述剑突下房间隔额状切面、所述剑突下房间隔矢状切面、所述心尖四腔心切面、所述低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和所述胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面的心脏结构进行分割： 所述分割模块，具体用于采用U-Net对所述剑突下房间隔额状切面、所述剑突下房间隔矢状切面、所述心尖四腔心切面、所述低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和所述胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面的心脏结构进行分割。

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR DETECTING ATRIAL SEPTAL DEFECT BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 一种深度学习的房间隔缺损检测方法及装置
abstract:
本发明提供了一种深度学习的房间隔缺损检测方法及装置，其中方法包括：获取超声心动图，对超声心动图进行预处理，提取感兴趣区域；对感兴趣区域进行特征提取，识别出剑突下房间隔额状切面、剑突下房间隔矢状切面、心尖四腔心切面、低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面；对房缺最小距离点进行检测；对剑突下房间隔额状切面、剑突下房间隔矢状切面、心尖四腔心切面、低位胸骨旁四腔心切面和胸骨旁主动脉短轴切面的心脏结构进行分割，得到分割结果，其中，心脏结构包括：左心房、右心房、左心室、右心室、主动脉和肺动脉；根据分割结果，对检测到的房缺最小距离点边界框进行过滤，将过滤后的结果作为房间隔缺损检测结果。

The present invention provides a deep learning method and device for detecting atrial septal defect, wherein the method includes: acquiring an echocardiogram, preprocessing the echocardiogram, and extracting a region of interest; extracting features of the region of interest, and identifying a sword Frontal view of the subprojection atrial septum, sagittal view of the subxiphoid process, apical four-chamber view, low parasternal four-chamber view, and short-axis view of the parasternal aorta; detect the minimum distance of the atrial gap; Segmentation of the heart structure from the frontal view of the sub-atrial septum, the sagittal view of the subxiphoid atrial septum, the apical four-chamber view, the lower parasternal four-chamber view, and the parasternal aorta short-axis view to obtain the segmentation results. The heart structure includes: left atrium, right atrium, left ventricle, right ventricle, aorta and pulmonary artery; according to the segmentation result, filter the minimum distance point bounding box of the detected atrial defect, and use the filtered result as the detection result of atrial septal defect .

title: A METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR DETECTING INDUSTRIAL DEFECTS BASED ON GEOMETRIC ALGEBRA; 一种基于几何代数的工业缺陷检测方法和系统
abstract:
本发明适用于工业检测技术领域，提供了基于几何代数的工业缺陷检测方法和系统。该系统引入GA‑U‑net对图像中工业产品表面缺陷严重程度打分，然后由缺陷过滤器得到得分高于预设阈值的图像像素，然后再由连通域分析模块得到含有完整缺陷的图像，然后再由基于几何代数模糊池化的堆叠式深度神经网络对含有完整缺陷的3D图像进行缺陷类别评估，完成对工业缺陷的检测与分类。由于几何代数具有丰富统一的计算方式，能够将复杂的线性运算和矩阵运算简化，减少配准数据参数、降低几何变换复杂度、简化计算量并加快计算速度，本发明考虑图像的3D高维信息，未丢失图像的维度信息，使得工业缺陷检测率更高。

The invention is applicable to the technical field of industrial detection, and provides an industrial defect detection method and system based on geometric algebra. The system introduces GA-U-net to score the severity of surface defects of industrial products in the image, and then the image pixels with a score higher than the preset threshold are obtained by the defect filter, and then the image containing complete defects is obtained by the connected domain analysis module, and then Then, the stacked deep neural network based on geometric algebraic fuzzy pooling evaluates the defect category of the 3D image containing complete defects, and completes the detection and classification of industrial defects. Because geometric algebra has a rich and unified calculation method, it can simplify complex linear operations and matrix operations, reduce registration data parameters, reduce geometric transformation complexity, simplify calculations and speed up calculations. The present invention considers 3D high-dimensional information of images , the dimensional information of the image is not lost, making the industrial defect detection rate higher.

title: AN INDUSTRIAL DEFECT DETECTION METHOD AND SYSTEM BASED ON GEOMETRIC ALGEBRA; 一种基于几何代数的工业缺陷检测方法和系统
abstract:
本发明适用于工业检测技术领域，提供了基于几何代数的工业缺陷检测方法和系统。该系统引入GA‑U‑net对图像中工业产品表面缺陷严重程度打分，然后由缺陷过滤器得到得分高于预设阈值的图像像素，然后再由连通域分析模块得到含有完整缺陷的图像，然后再由基于几何代数模糊池化的堆叠式深度神经网络对含有完整缺陷的3D图像进行缺陷类别评估，完成对工业缺陷的检测与分类。由于几何代数具有丰富统一的计算方式，能够将复杂的线性运算和矩阵运算简化，减少配准数据参数、降低几何变换复杂度、简化计算量并加快计算速度，本发明考虑图像的3D高维信息，未丢失图像的维度信息，使得工业缺陷检测率更高。

The invention is suitable for the technical field of industrial inspection, and provides an industrial defect inspection method and system based on geometric algebra. The system introduces GA-U-net to score the severity of the surface defects of industrial products in the image, and then the defect filter obtains image pixels with a score higher than the preset threshold, and then the connected domain analysis module obtains the image with complete defects, and then Then, a stacked deep neural network based on geometric algebraic fuzzy pooling evaluates the defect category of the 3D image with complete defects, and completes the detection and classification of industrial defects. Because geometric algebra has rich and unified calculation methods, it can simplify complex linear operations and matrix operations, reduce registration data parameters, reduce geometric transformation complexity, simplify calculations, and speed up calculations. The present invention takes into account the 3D high-dimensional information of the image , The dimension information of the image is not lost, which makes the detection rate of industrial defects higher.

title: A DEFECT DETECTION METHOD BASED ON IMPROVED U-NET NETWORK; 一种基于改进的U-NET网络的缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于改进的U‑net网络的缺陷检测方法，用于对平面产品进行缺陷检测，所述方法包括：利用U‑net网络对一批训练图像进行训练，所述训练图像包括多个正常类样本和多个缺陷样本；使用Resnet网络代替U‑net网络的encode部分。Resnet网络包括多个残差模块，经过每一个残差模块对应进行一次最大池化操作，经过每一个残差模块和一次最大池化操作后得到对应的残差特征图。本发明提高了训练模型预测的准确度，增大了网络的感受野，保持原始图像更多的特征信息，能够更充分的保持底层的特征，能够更快的使得缺陷特征凸显，尤其对于玻璃等平坦场景中的产品缺陷检测的准确度。

The present invention relates to a defect detection method based on an improved U-net network, which is used for defect detection of flat products. The method includes: using the U-net network to train a batch of training images, and the training images include multiple One normal sample and multiple defective samples; Resnet network is used to replace the encode part of U-net network. The Resnet network includes multiple residual modules. After each residual module, a maximum pooling operation is performed. After each residual module and a maximum pooling operation, the corresponding residual feature map is obtained. The invention improves the prediction accuracy of the training model, increases the receptive field of the network, maintains more feature information of the original image, can more fully maintain the underlying features, and can make the defect features more prominent, especially for glass, etc. The accuracy of product defect detection in flat scenes.

title: NUCLEAR POWER PIPELINE DEFECT DETECTION SYSTEM BASED ON DEEP LEARNING ATTENTION MECHANISM; 基于深度学习注意力机制的核电管道缺陷检测系统
abstract:
一种基于深度学习注意力机制的核电管道缺陷检测系统，包括：对射线探伤底片图像进行预处理；构建全卷积神经网络，包括依次连接的编码器模块和注意力机制模块和解码器模块，选取Adam优化器对构建的全卷积神经网络进行梯度更新，再使用Focal Loss损失函数对梯度更新后的全卷积神经网络进行训练；对训练好的全卷积神经网络进行测试，得到概率图，对概率图进行阈值二值化处理，得到缺陷区域的二值化图像，作为核电管道缺陷检测结果。本发明可应用于辅助工业生产中判片人员来快速检测缺陷区域进行分类评定，通过分析数字扫描的探伤底片图像，实现对有缺陷区域的快速判别，提高检测效率，节约生产时间成本。

A nuclear power pipeline defect detection system based on deep learning attention mechanism, including: preprocessing the radiographic film image; constructing a full convolutional neural network, including an encoder module, an attention mechanism module and a decoder module connected in sequence, Select the Adam optimizer to update the gradient of the constructed fully convolutional neural network, and then use the Focal Loss loss function to train the fully convolutional neural network after the gradient update; test the trained fully convolutional neural network to obtain a probability map , Perform threshold binarization processing on the probability map to obtain a binarized image of the defect area as the nuclear power pipeline defect detection result. The invention can be applied to assist the judges in industrial production to quickly detect defective areas for classification and evaluation. By analyzing the digitally scanned flaw detection film images, the defect areas can be quickly identified, the detection efficiency is improved, and the production time cost is saved.

title: A LIPSTICK QUALITY INSPECTION SYSTEM WITH HYBRID DEEP LEARNING MODEL; 一种混合深度学习模型的口红质检系统
abstract:
本发明涉及产品智能质检技术领域，具体为一种混合深度学习模型的口红质检系统，包括图像采集模块、图像分割模块、不良品检测模块、表面缺陷分类模块、中转存储模块、中央存储模块、迁移优化模块，迁移优化模块包括新增数据标注单元和迁移训练单元；新增数据标注单元用于对新增的不良品进行人工标注；迁移训练单元将ResNet神经网络模型通过新增数据标注以及配套的标注数据，利用迁移学习的方法进行二次训练，用以对表面缺陷分类模块进行优化，提升模型的检测、分类性能。该系统利用传统数字图像处理方法与深度学习结合的方法，在保证生产效率和检测精度的前提下，极大的减小生产过程中人力的投入，便于使用。

The invention relates to the technical field of product intelligent quality inspection, specifically a lipstick quality inspection system with a hybrid deep learning model, including an image acquisition module, an image segmentation module, a defective product detection module, a surface defect classification module, a transfer storage module, and a central storage module , Migration optimization module, the migration optimization module includes a new data labeling unit and a migration training unit; the new data labeling unit is used to manually label the newly added defective products; the migration training unit uses the ResNet neural network model to label the new data and The matching annotation data is used for secondary training using the transfer learning method to optimize the surface defect classification module and improve the detection and classification performance of the model. The system uses a combination of traditional digital image processing methods and deep learning methods, and on the premise of ensuring production efficiency and detection accuracy, it greatly reduces the manpower input in the production process and is easy to use.

title: IMAGE TO-BE-DETECTED AREA EXTRACTION METHOD, DEVICE AND PRODUCT DEFECT DETECTION SYSTEM; 图像待检测区域提取方法、装置和产品缺陷检测系统
abstract:
本申请公开图像待检测区域提取方法、装置和产品缺陷检测系统。本申请的方法包括：获取产品图像，并根据产品图像生成用于描述待检测区域的掩码图像；将掩码图像与产品图像进行通道级拼接，得到拼接图像，拼接图像的通道数为掩码图像与产品图像的通道数之和；在拼接图像中，根据掩码图像与产品图像之间像素点的对应关系，从产品图像中提取包括该待检测区域的待检测图像。本申请的技术方案能够快速提取产品的待检测区域所在位置，减少产品拍摄背景的变化对缺陷检测模型测试结果带来的影响，同时使输入给缺陷检测模型的图片中产品部分所占的比重更大，以更利于小目标的缺陷检测。

The present application discloses a method, device and product defect detection system for extracting an area to be detected in an image. The method of the present application includes: acquiring a product image, and generating a mask image for describing the area to be detected based on the product image; performing channel-level splicing on the mask image and the product image to obtain a spliced image, wherein the number of channels of the spliced image is the sum of the number of channels of the mask image and the product image; in the spliced image, based on the correspondence between the pixel points of the mask image and the product image, extracting the image to be detected including the area to be detected from the product image. The technical solution of the present application can quickly extract the location of the area to be detected of the product, reduce the impact of changes in the background of the product shooting on the test results of the defect detection model, and at the same time make the proportion of the product part in the picture input to the defect detection model larger, so as to be more conducive to the defect detection of small targets.
claims:
1 . 一种图像待检测区域提取方法，其特征在于，包括： 获取产品图像，并根据所述产品图像生成用于描述待检测区域的掩码图像； 将所述掩码图像与所述产品图像进行通道级拼接，得到拼接图像，所述拼接图像的通道数为掩码图像与产品图像的通道数之和； 在所述拼接图像中，根据所述掩码图像与产品图像之间像素点的对应关系，从所述产品图像中提取包括该待检测区域的待检测图像； 根据所述掩码图像与产品图像之间像素点的对应关系，从所述产品图像中提取包括该待检测区域的待检测图像，包括： 根据所述掩码图像与产品图像之间像素点的对应关系，在所述产品图像中确定该待检测区域的像素位置； 基于所述像素位置在所述产品图像上选取包括该待检测区域的几何图形，在所述产品图像上裁剪该几何图形所在区域的图像，得到目标图像； 计算所述目标图像的倾斜程度； 根据该倾斜程度调整所述目标图像至图像端正，获得待检测图像； 其中，所述倾斜程度是指在以产品图像左上角像素点为原点构建的直角坐标系中，所述目标图像相对于该直角坐标系的坐标轴的倾斜程度。 2 .如权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，根据所述产品图像生成用于描述待检测区域的掩码图像，包括： 预先构建浅层Unet网络并训练，该浅层Unet网络包括卷积部分和上采样部分，其中上采样部分输出的特征图为与卷积部分输出的特征图进行通道级拼接后的特征图； 将所述产品图像输入到训练好的浅层Unet网络，利用该浅层Unet网络提取产品图像中待检测区域的轮廓特征，获得该浅层Unet网络输出的包括该待检测区域的掩码图像。 3 .如权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，计算所述目标图像的倾斜程度，包括： 计算该几何图形的一个边框线与预设参考线之间的夹角，所述预设参考线包括水平参考线或竖直参考线，所述水平参考线与所述直角坐标系的X轴平行，所述竖直参考线与所述直角坐标系的y轴平行； 将该夹角作为该目标图像的倾斜角，通过该倾斜角表示该目标图像相对预设参考线的倾斜程度。 4 .如权利要求3所述的方法，其特征在于，根据该倾斜程度调整所述目标图像至图像端正，获得待检测图像，包括： 在所述倾斜角为零时，将所述目标图像作为待检测图像； 在所述倾斜角不为零时，根据该几何图形的顶点坐标计算目标图像的倾斜方向，并根据倾斜方向旋转所述目标图像直至所述倾斜角为零，将倾斜角为零时的目标图像作为待检测图像。 5 .如权利要求4所述的方法，其特征在于，在所述倾斜角不为零时，根据倾斜方向旋转所述目标图像直至所述倾斜角为零，包括： 在该目标图像向第一方向倾斜时，顺时针旋转所述目标图像直至所述倾斜角为零； 在该目标图像向第二方向倾斜时，逆时针旋转所述目标图像直至所述倾斜角为零。 6 .如权利要求4所述的方法，其特征在于，该几何图形为包括该待检测区域的最小外接 矩形，根据该几何图形的顶点坐标计算目标图像的倾斜方向,包括： 在以产品图像左上角像素点为原点构建的直角坐标系中，将最小外接矩形的四个顶点中纵坐标值最大的顶点标记为第一顶点，并以第一顶点为基准点按照逆时针方向标记最小外接矩形的其他三个顶点依次为第二顶点、第三顶点和第四顶点； 根据第一顶点与第三顶点的横坐标的大小关系计算目标图像的倾斜方向，具体是:若第三顶点的横坐标大于第一顶点的横坐标，该目标图像向第一方向倾斜;若第三顶点的横坐标小于第一顶点的横坐标，该目标图像向第二方向倾斜； 或者，根据第一顶点与第三顶点确定的直线的斜率计算目标图像的倾斜方向，具体是: 若直线的斜率大于零，该目标图像向第一方向倾斜；若直线的斜率小于零，该目标图像向第二方向倾斜。 7 .如权利要求6所述的方法，其特征在于，预设参考线包括水平参考线，计算该几何图形的一个边框线与水平参考线或垂直参考线之间的夹角，包括： 在目标图像向第一方向倾斜时，计算由第二顶点和第一顶点确定的边框线与水平参考线之间的夹角作为所述倾斜角； 在目标图像向第二方向倾斜时，计算由第四顶点和第一顶点确定的边框线与水平参考线之间的夹角作为所述倾斜角。 8 . 一种图像待检测区域提取装置，其特征在于，包括： 图像分割单元，用于获取产品图像，并根据所述产品图像生成用于描述待检测区域的掩码图像； 图像拼接单元，用于将所述掩码图像与所述产品图像进行通道级拼接，得到拼接图像， 所述拼接图像的通道数为掩码图像与产品图像的通道数之和； 图像提取单元，用于在所述拼接图像中，根据所述掩码图像与产品图像之间像素点的对应关系，从所述产品图像中提取包括该待检测区域的待检测图像； 所述图像提取单元，还用于： 根据所述掩码图像与产品图像之间像素点的对应关系，在所述产品图像中确定该待检测区域的像素位置； 基于所述像素位置在所述产品图像上选取包括该待检测区域的几何图形，在所述产品图像上裁剪该几何图形所在区域的图像，得到目标图像； 计算所述目标图像的倾斜程度； 根据该倾斜程度调整所述目标图像至图像端正，获得待检测图像； 其中，所述倾斜程度是指在以产品图像左上角像素点为原点构建的直角坐标系中，所述目标图像相对于该直角坐标系的坐标轴的倾斜程度。 9 . 一种产品缺陷检测系统，其特征在于，包括摄像头、存储器、处理器和神经网络平台； 所述摄像头，拍摄产线上产品的产品图像并将产品图像发送给所述处理器； 所述存储器，存储计算机可执行指令； 所述处理器，根据所述计算机可执行指令执行如权利要求1-7任一项所述的图像待检测区域提取方法，将得到的待检测图像输出至所述神经网络平台； 所述神经网络平台，对所述待检测图像利用神经网络模型来判断产线上的产品是否存在缺陷。

1 . A method for extracting an area to be detected in an image, characterized in that it includes: acquiring a product image, and generating a mask image for describing the area to be detected based on the product image; performing channel-level splicing on the mask image and the product image to obtain a spliced image, wherein the number of channels of the spliced image is the sum of the number of channels of the mask image and the product image; in the spliced image, according to the correspondence between the pixels of the mask image and the product image, extracting the image to be detected including the area to be detected from the product image; according to the correspondence between the pixels of the mask image and the product image, extracting the image to be detected including the area to be detected from the product image, including: determining the pixel position of the area to be detected in the product image according to the correspondence between the pixels of the mask image and the product image; selecting a geometric figure including the area to be detected on the product image based on the pixel position, and cropping the image of the area where the geometric figure is located on the product image to obtain a target image; calculating the degree of inclination of the target image; adjusting the target image to be straight according to the degree of inclination to obtain the image to be detected; The tilt degree refers to the tilt degree of the target image relative to the coordinate axis of the rectangular coordinate system constructed with the upper left corner pixel point of the product image as the origin. 2 .The method as claimed in claim 1 is characterized in that a mask image for describing the area to be detected is generated based on the product image, comprising: pre-constructing and training a shallow Unet network, the shallow Unet network comprising a convolution part and an upsampling part, wherein the feature map output by the upsampling part is a feature map after channel-level splicing with the feature map output by the convolution part; inputting the product image into a trained shallow Unet network, using the shallow Unet network to extract contour features of the area to be detected in the product image, and obtaining a mask image output by the shallow Unet network including the area to be detected. 3 .The method as claimed in claim 1 is characterized in that calculating the degree of inclination of the target image includes: calculating the angle between a border line of the geometric figure and a preset reference line, the preset reference line includes a horizontal reference line or a vertical reference line, the horizontal reference line is parallel to the x-axis of the rectangular coordinate system, and the vertical reference line is parallel to the y-axis of the rectangular coordinate system; using the angle as the inclination angle of the target image, and using the inclination angle to represent the degree of inclination of the target image relative to the preset reference line. 4 .The method as claimed in claim 3 is characterized in that the target image is adjusted to be straight according to the degree of inclination to obtain the image to be detected, including: when the inclination angle is zero, the target image is used as the image to be detected; when the inclination angle is not zero, the inclination direction of the target image is calculated according to the vertex coordinates of the geometric figure, and the target image is rotated according to the inclination direction until the inclination angle is zero, and the target image when the inclination angle is zero is used as the image to be detected. 5 .The method as claimed in claim 4 is characterized in that, when the tilt angle is not zero, the target image is rotated according to the tilt direction until the tilt angle is zero, including: when the target image is tilted in a first direction, rotating the target image clockwise until the tilt angle is zero; when the target image is tilted in a second direction, rotating the target image counterclockwise until the tilt angle is zero. 6 . The method as claimed in claim 4, characterized in that the geometric figure is the smallest circumscribed area including the area to be detected. Rectangle, calculating the inclination direction of the target image according to the vertex coordinates of the geometric figure, including: in a rectangular coordinate system constructed with the upper left corner pixel of the product image as the origin, marking the vertex with the largest ordinate value among the four vertices of the minimum circumscribed rectangle as the first vertex, and marking the other three vertices of the minimum circumscribed rectangle in a counterclockwise direction with the first vertex as the reference point as the second vertex, the third vertex and the fourth vertex; calculating the inclination direction of the target image according to the size relationship between the horizontal coordinates of the first vertex and the third vertex, specifically: if the horizontal coordinate of the third vertex is greater than the horizontal coordinate of the first vertex, the target image is inclined in the first direction; if the horizontal coordinate of the third vertex is less than the horizontal coordinate of the first vertex, the target image is inclined in the second direction; or, calculating the inclination direction of the target image according to the slope of the straight line determined by the first vertex and the third vertex, specifically: if the slope of the straight line is greater than zero, the target image is inclined in the first direction; if the slope of the straight line is less than zero, the target image is inclined in the second direction. 7 .The method as claimed in claim 6 is characterized in that the preset reference line includes a horizontal reference line, and calculating the angle between a border line of the geometric figure and the horizontal reference line or the vertical reference line includes: when the target image is tilted in a first direction, calculating the angle between the border line determined by the second vertex and the first vertex and the horizontal reference line as the inclination angle; when the target image is tilted in a second direction, calculating the angle between the border line determined by the fourth vertex and the first vertex and the horizontal reference line as the inclination angle. 8 . A device for extracting an area to be detected in an image, characterized in that it comprises: an image segmentation unit, used to obtain a product image, and generate a mask image for describing the area to be detected based on the product image; an image stitching unit, used to perform channel-level stitching on the mask image and the product image to obtain a stitched image, wherein the number of channels of the stitched image is the sum of the number of channels of the mask image and the product image; an image extraction unit, used to extract the image to be detected including the area to be detected from the product image in the stitched image according to the correspondence between the pixels of the mask image and the product image; the image extraction unit is further used to: determine the pixel position of the area to be detected in the product image according to the correspondence between the pixels of the mask image and the product image; select a geometric figure including the area to be detected on the product image based on the pixel position, and crop the image of the area where the geometric figure is located on the product image to obtain a target image; calculate the degree of inclination of the target image; adjust the target image to be straight according to the degree of inclination to obtain the image to be detected; The tilt degree refers to the tilt degree of the target image relative to the coordinate axis of the rectangular coordinate system constructed with the upper left corner pixel of the product image as the origin. 9 . A product defect detection system, characterized in that it includes a camera, a memory, a processor and a neural network platform; the camera takes product images of products on a production line and sends the product images to the processor; the memory stores computer executable instructions; the processor executes the image to be detected area extraction method as described in any one of claims 1 to 7 according to the computer executable instructions, and outputs the obtained image to be detected to the neural network platform; the neural network platform uses a neural network model to determine whether there are defects in the products on the production line.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR EXTRACTING IMAGE AREA TO BE INSPECTED AND PRODUCT DEFECT INSPECTION SYSTEM; 图像待检测区域提取方法、装置和产品缺陷检测系统
abstract:
本申请公开图像待检测区域提取方法、装置和产品缺陷检测系统。本申请的方法包括：获取产品图像，并根据产品图像生成用于描述待检测区域的掩码图像；将掩码图像与产品图像进行通道级拼接，得到拼接图像，拼接图像的通道数为掩码图像与产品图像的通道数之和；在拼接图像中，根据掩码图像与产品图像之间像素点的对应关系，从产品图像中提取包括该待检测区域的待检测图像。本申请的技术方案能够快速提取产品的待检测区域所在位置，减少产品拍摄背景的变化对缺陷检测模型测试结果带来的影响，同时使输入给缺陷检测模型的图片中产品部分所占的比重更大，以更利于小目标的缺陷检测。

The application discloses a method, a device and a product defect detection system for extracting a region to be detected in an image. The method of this application includes: obtaining a product image, and generating a mask image describing the area to be inspected according to the product image; performing channel-level splicing of the mask image with the product image to obtain a spliced image, and the number of channels of the spliced image is the mask The sum of the number of channels of the image and the product image; in the stitched image, the image to be detected including the area to be detected is extracted from the product image according to the correspondence between the pixel points of the mask image and the product image. The technical solution of the present application can quickly extract the location of the product to be inspected, reduce the impact of the change of the product shooting background on the test results of the defect detection model, and at the same time make the product part of the picture input to the defect detection model take up a greater proportion Large, in order to be more conducive to defect detection of small targets.
