in the spliced image, according to the correspondence of pixels between the mask image and the product image Relationship, extract the image to be detected including the area to be detected from the product image. 2 The method of claim 1, wherein generating a mask image for describing the area to be detected according to the product image comprises: pre-building and training a shallow Unet network, the shallow Unet network including convolution Part and up-sampling part, where the feature map output by the up-sampling part is the feature map after channel-level splicing with the feature map output by the convolution part; input the product image to the trained shallow Unet network, and use the shallow The hierarchical Unet network extracts the contour features of the area to be inspected in the product image, and obtains the mask image output by the shallow Unet network including the area to be inspected. 3 The method according to claim 1, wherein, according to the pixel correspondence between the mask image and the product image, extracting the image to be detected including the area to be detected from the product image comprises: According to the corresponding relationship between the pixel points of the mask image and the product image, determine the pixel position of the to-be-detected area in the product image; select the pixel position that includes the to-be-detected area on the product image based on the pixel position The geometric figure is to crop the image of the area where the geometric figure is located on the product image to obtain the target image; calculate the inclination degree of the target image; adjust the target image to the correctness of the image according to the inclination degree to obtain the image to be detected. 4 The method of claim 3, wherein calculating the degree of inclination of the target image comprises: calculating an included angle between a border line of the geometric figure and a preset reference line; and using the included angle as the The tilt angle of the target image, by which the tilt angle indicates the tilt degree of the target image relative to the preset reference line. 5 The method according to claim 4, wherein adjusting the target image to the correctness of the image according to the degree of inclination to obtain the image to be detected comprises: when the inclination angle is zero, using the target image as the image to be detected Detect the image; when the tilt angle is not zero, calculate the tilt direction of the target image according to the vertex coordinates of the geometric figure, and rotate the target image according to the tilt direction until the tilt angle is zero, and when the tilt angle is zero The target image is used as the image to be detected. 6 The method of claim 5, wherein when the tilt angle is not zero, rotating the target image according to the tilt direction until the tilt angle is zero, comprising: turning the target image in the first direction When tilting, rotate the target image clockwise until the tilt angle is zero; when the target image tilts in the second direction, rotate the target image counterclockwise until the tilt angle is zero. 7 The method of claim 5, wherein the geometric figure is the smallest circumscribed rectangle that includes the area to be detected, and calculating the tilt direction of the target image according to the vertex coordinates of the geometric figure comprises: in the upper left corner of the product image In the rectangular coordinate system constructed with the pixel as the origin, the vertex with the largest ordinate value among the four vertices of the smallest circumscribed rectangle is marked as the first vertex, and the other of the smallest circumscribed rectangle is marked counterclockwise with the first vertex as the reference point. The three vertices are the second vertex, the third vertex and the fourth vertex in turn; Calculate the tilt direction of the target image according to the size relationship between the abscissa of the first vertex and the third vertex, specifically: if the abscissa of the third vertex is greater than the abscissa of the first vertex, the target image is tilted in the first direction; If the abscissa of the three vertices is smaller than the abscissa of the first vertex, the target image is inclined in the second direction; or, the inclination direction of the target image is calculated according to the slope of the straight line determined by the first vertex and the third vertex, specifically: If the slope is greater than zero, the target image is tilted in the first direction; if the slope of the straight line is less than zero, the target image is tilted in the second direction. 8 The method of claim 7, wherein the preset reference line comprises a horizontal reference line, and calculating the angle between a border line of the geometric figure and the horizontal reference line or the vertical reference line comprises: in the target image When tilting to the first direction, the angle between the frame line determined by the second vertex and the first vertex and the horizontal reference line is calculated as the tilt angle; when the target image is tilted in the second direction, the fourth vertex is calculated The angle between the border line determined with the first vertex and the horizontal reference line is taken as the inclination angle. 9 A device for extracting a region to be detected from an image, comprising: an image segmentation unit for obtaining a product image, and generating a mask image for describing the region to be detected based on the product image; an image stitching unit for The mask image and the product image are spliced at the channel level to obtain a spliced image, where the number of channels of the spliced image is the sum of the number of channels of the mask image and the product image; an image extraction unit is used for the splicing In the image, the image to be detected including the area to be detected is extracted from the product image according to the correspondence between the pixel points of the mask image and the product image. 10 A product defect detection system, characterized by comprising a camera, a memory, a processor, and a neural network platform; the camera captures product images of products on the production line and sends the product images to the processor; the memory , Storing computer-executable instructions; the processor, according to the computer-executable instructions, executes the method for extracting a region to be detected in an image according to any one of claims 1-8, and outputs the obtained image to be detected to the nerve Network platform; The neural network platform uses a neural network model for the image to be detected to determine whether there are defects in the products on the production line.

title: A ROAD CRACK DETECTION METHOD BASED ON MULTI-SOURCE UNET+ATTENTION NETWORK MIGRATION; 一种基于多源UNET+ATTENTION网络迁移的道路裂缝检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于多源Unet+Attention网络迁移的道路裂缝检测方法，该方法首先收集道路、墙壁、桥梁和大坝的裂缝数据集，并对这些数据集进行数据扩充，构建深度学习分割网络Unet模型，将大坝、墙壁和桥梁的数据集导入到模型中进行训练，并将生成的模型参数进行迁移学习。迁移后的模型在Unet的基础之上添加了Attention机制，提高裂缝检测的准确度，将之前的模型参数导入其中，并用道路裂缝数据集进行训练，生成多个模型，对这些模型进行模型融合计算，进一步提高道路裂缝检测的准确度。

The invention discloses a road crack detection method based on multi-source Unet+Attention network migration. The method first collects crack data sets of roads, walls, bridges and dams, and expands these data sets to construct deep learning segmentation The network Unet model imports data sets of dams, walls and bridges into the model for training, and transfers and learns the generated model parameters. The migrated model adds an Attention mechanism on the basis of Unet to improve the accuracy of crack detection, import the previous model parameters into it, and use the road crack data set for training, generate multiple models, and perform model fusion calculations on these models , To further improve the accuracy of road crack detection.
claims:
L 一种基于多源Unet+Attention网络迁移的道路裂缝检测方法，其特征在于，包括如 下步骤： 步骤1,获取数据集,包括道路裂缝、墙壁裂缝、桥梁裂缝及大坝裂缝的真实图片和与之 对应的标签图片，并利用图像数据增强技术对数据集进行扩充,得到道路裂缝、墙壁裂缝、 桥梁裂缝及大坝裂缝样本集； 步骤2,构建深度学习分割网络模型； 步骤3,利用墙壁裂缝、桥梁裂缝及大坝裂缝样本集分别对深度学习分割网络模型进行 训练,得到墙壁裂缝、桥梁裂缝及大坝裂缝样本集各自对应的模型参数； 步骤4,构建新的深度学习分割网络模型，并利用迁移学习分别将墙壁裂缝、桥梁裂缝 及大坝裂缝样本集各自对应的模型参数进行迁移，得到三个迁移后的深度学习分割网络模 型，对每个迁移后的深度学习分割网络模型的上采样部分加入Attention机制，得到三个新 的模型； 步骤5,将道路裂缝样本集分为训练集和测试集，利用训练集依次对三个新的模型进行 训练，得到三个训练好的模型； 步骤6,利用三个训练好的模型分别对测试集进行预测，得到三组预测图像，对三组预 测图像进行二值化处理后，再进行融合操作，得到最终的预测图像。 2 .根据权利要求1所述基于多源Unet+Attention网络迁移的道路裂缝检测方法，其特 征在于，步骤1所述图像数据增强技术包括旋转、平移、投影变换、缩放、翻转和像素填充。 3 .根据权利要求1所述基于多源Unet+Attention网络迁移的道路裂缝检测方法，其特 征在于,步骤2所述深度学习分割网络模型包括收缩路径和扩展路径，其中，收缩路径具体 为:对于输入的图像，在第1层使用两次卷积操作，对第1层输出的特征图进行池化后进入第 2层，在第2层使用两次卷积操作，对第2层输出的特征图进行池化后进入第3层，在第3层使 用两次卷积操作，对第3层输出的特征图进行池化后进入第4层，在第4层使用两次卷积操 作,对第4层输出的特征图进行池化后进入第5层,在第5层使用两次卷积操作；扩展路径具 体为:对第5层输出的特征图进行上采样后进入第6层,在第6层使用两次卷积操作,对第6层 输出的特征图进行上采样后进入第7层，在第7层使用两次卷积操作，对第7层输出的特征图 进行上采样后进入第8层,在第8层使用两次卷积操作,对第8层输出的特征图进行上采样后 进入第9层,在第9层使用三次卷积操作后,得到输出结果； 其中，在第1层至第8层使用的卷积操作，选取的卷积核大小均为3*3,步长均为1；在第9 层使用的三次卷积操作中，前两次选取的卷积核大小均为3*3,步长均为1,最后一次选取的 卷积核大小为1*1;池化选取的卷积核大小均为2*2,上采样使用的是反卷积操作，且反卷积 选取的卷积核大小均为2*2,第1层至第8层采用的过滤器的个数依次为64、128、256、512、 1024、512、256、128,第9层采用的过滤器个数分别为64和2。 4 .根据权利要求1所述基于多源Unet+Attention网络迁移的道路裂缝检测方法，其特 征在于,步骤6所述二值化处理，公式如下： 255, pi >50 pi - \ [0, pi 5 .根据权利要求1所述基于多源Unet+Attention网络迁移的道路裂缝检测方法，其特 征在于,步骤6所述融合操作，公式如下： 厂| 、ο 255, /3)= , ο, 其中，f (pi)表示最终的预测图像上第i个像素点的值,pi表示预测图像上第i个像素点 的值,j表示第j个预测图像。

title: A METHOD FOR CLASSIFICATION AND SEGMENTATION OF INDUSTRIAL MAGNETIC TILE DEFECT IMAGE BASED ON SMALL SAMPLE DEEP CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORK; 一种基于小样本深度卷积神经网络用于工业磁瓦缺陷图像分类和分割的方法
abstract:
本发明涉及工业缺陷图像处理技术领域，公开了一种基于小样本深度卷积神经网络用于工业磁瓦缺陷图像分类和分割的方法，包括：数据采集装置，智能处理系统，产品下放装置和数据库系统，该方法为以下步骤：利用数据采集装置对工业生产流水线中的产品图像进行采集，然后传输给智能处理系统和数据库系统；经过数据预处理模块进行一定的处理，再通过智能分类分割模块对有缺陷的产品进行分类并标定出缺陷的位置，利用产品下放装置把有缺陷的产品和没有缺陷的产品，或者不同缺陷的产品分别下放到不同的区域存放。本发明符合工业生产中的需求，适合小样本训练，同时能够实现两种任务，提高了分类的准确度和定位的精度。

The invention relates to the technical field of industrial defect image processing, and discloses a method for classifying and segmenting industrial magnetic tile defect images based on a small sample deep convolutional neural network. The method includes: a data acquisition device, an intelligent processing system, a product release device and a database System, the method consists of the following steps: use a data acquisition device to collect product images in an industrial production line, and then transmit them to the intelligent processing system and database system; after the data preprocessing module for certain processing, and then through the intelligent classification and segmentation module The defective products are classified and the position of the defect is marked, and the defective product and the non-defective product, or the products with different defects are placed in different areas for storage by using the product release device. The invention meets the requirements in industrial production, is suitable for small sample training, can realize two tasks at the same time, and improves classification accuracy and positioning accuracy.

title: AN IMPROVED GENERATIVE ADVERSARIAL NETWORK BASED IMAGE DEFECT SEGMENTATION METHOD FOR EDDY CURRENT INSPECTION OF ALUMINUM PLATES; 一种基于改进生成对抗网络的铝板电涡流检测图像缺陷分割方法
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于改进生成对抗网络的铝板电涡流检测图像缺陷分割方法，属于铝板电涡流检测图像缺陷分割技术领域。首先通过电涡流检测平台以C扫描的检测方式对铝板表面缺陷进行检测；其次，处理采集到的信号，获得铝板表面缺陷涡流检测图像；然后构造铝板涡流图像缺陷分割的生成对抗网络模型，模型主要由生成器和判别器组成，生成器采用U‑net模型的思想，将低层特征与对应的高层特征进行跳跃连接；最后为了增强目标特征并抑制背景特征，在高低层特征融合之前采用注意力模块，调整低层特征与高层特征拼接时的权重。相较于传统的图像分割方法，本发明提高了图像特征信息的利用，分割图像更加准确，同时在噪声干扰下依然具有较高的识别能力。

The invention relates to an image defect segmentation method for eddy current detection of aluminum plates based on an improved generative confrontation network, and belongs to the technical field of image defect segmentation for eddy current detection of aluminum plates. First, the surface defects of the aluminum plate are detected by the C-scan detection method through the eddy current inspection platform; secondly, the collected signals are processed to obtain the eddy current inspection image of the surface defect of the aluminum plate; then the generative adversarial network model for the defect segmentation of the eddy current image of the aluminum plate is constructed. It consists of a generator and a discriminator. The generator adopts the idea of the U-net model, and connects the low-level features with the corresponding high-level features. Finally, in order to enhance the target features and suppress the background features, an attention module is used before the fusion of high- and low-level features. , to adjust the weights when splicing low-level features and high-level features. Compared with the traditional image segmentation method, the present invention improves the utilization of image feature information, the segmentation image is more accurate, and at the same time, it still has high recognition ability under noise interference.

title: MURA DEFECT DETECTION METHOD, DEVICE, STORAGE MEDIUM AND TERMINAL OF LIQUID CRYSTAL PANEL; 液晶面板的MURA缺陷检测方法、装置、存储介质及终端
abstract:
本发明涉及液晶面板检测领域，具体涉及一种液晶面板的mura缺陷检测方法、装置、存储介质及终端，所述方法包括：采集液晶面板的良品图像数据，对所述良品图像数据加入若干种不同缺陷类型的干扰数据，生成缺陷图像数据；将所述缺陷图像数据、良品图像数据及干扰数据作为训练样本及验证样本；搭建卷积神经网络U‑Net分割模型，利用所述训练样本及验证样本训练所述卷积神经网络U‑Net分割模型，得到mura检测模型；根据所述mura检测模型对液晶面板进行检测，确定所述液晶面板的mura缺陷类型。本发明能够快速地收集训练样本，提高模型的抗干扰能力以及快速准确地检测液晶面板的mura缺陷类型。

The invention relates to the field of liquid crystal panel inspection, and in particular to a method, device, storage medium and terminal for detecting mura defects of liquid crystal panels. The method includes: collecting good product image data of the liquid crystal panel, and adding several different types to the good product image data. Defect type interference data, generate defect image data; use the defect image data, good product image data, and interference data as training samples and verification samples; build a convolutional neural network U-Net segmentation model, and use the training samples and verification samples The U-Net segmentation model of the convolutional neural network is trained to obtain a mura detection model; the liquid crystal panel is detected according to the mura detection model, and the mura defect type of the liquid crystal panel is determined. The invention can quickly collect training samples, improve the anti-interference ability of the model, and quickly and accurately detect the mura defect type of the liquid crystal panel.

title: A METHOD AND DEVICE FOR AUTOMATIC DETECTION OF SURFACE DEFECTS OF MAGNETIC TILES BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 一种基于深度学习的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测方法和装置
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于深度学习的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测方法和装置，属于物体表面缺陷自动检测领域。本发明方法充分利用磁瓦表面缺陷的特性，对应计算出待检测图像的四种显著图，并将计算得到的四种显著图与原始图像进行融合后，输入至U‑net网络实现像素级分割，能够对缺陷的大小、位置做出像素级判断，同时检测结果的准确度有效提高；本发明无需对输入图像做校正、图像增强、去噪、特征提取等预处理过程，对图像形变、环境光照变化、角度变化都有很好的鲁棒性。本发明装置配置简单，不需要对现有生产线做出较大改动即可嵌入到生产当中，减少了方案实施过程中造成的资源浪费。

The invention discloses a method and device for automatic detection of surface defects of magnetic tiles based on deep learning, belonging to the field of automatic detection of surface defects of objects. The method of the present invention makes full use of the characteristics of the surface defects of the magnetic tiles, correspondingly calculates four kinds of saliency maps of the image to be detected, and fuses the calculated four kinds of saliency maps with the original image, and then inputs them into the U-net network to realize pixel-level segmentation , can make a pixel-level judgment on the size and position of the defect, and at the same time, the accuracy of the detection result is effectively improved; the present invention does not need to perform preprocessing processes such as correction, image enhancement, denoising, and feature extraction on the input image, and the image deformation, environment It is robust to illumination changes and angle changes. The device of the invention is simple in configuration, and can be embedded in production without making major changes to the existing production line, thereby reducing waste of resources during the implementation of the scheme.
claims:
1 .一种基于深度学习的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特征在于，包括： S1 .构建磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测模型；所述磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测模型包括显著图计 算模块、特征融合模块和U-net网络;其中，显著图计算模块，用于对输入图像计算其AC显著 图S AC 、ST显著图S ST 、PHOT显著图S PH0T 和BMS显著图S BMS ；S AC 用于凸显缺陷颜色的稀有性、S ST 用 于凸显缺陷的边缘和角点，S PH0T 用于消除背景纹理对缺陷区域的干扰;S BMS 用于模拟人类视 觉注意力机制以凸显缺陷区域;特征融合模块，用于将输入的原始图像和计算得到的四种 显著图通过卷积层进行融合;U-net网络，用于对融合得到的特征图进行像素级分割，得到 缺陷的位置和大小； S2 .对所述磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测模型进行迭代训练，得到训练好的磁瓦表面缺陷自 动检测模型； S3 .将待检测的磁瓦表面图像输入训练好的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测模型，得到待检测 的磁瓦表面图像缺陷的位置和大小。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特征在 于，特征融合模块采用深度为5的1 X 1的卷积核。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特征在 于，输入图像尺寸均为512X512X1。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特征在 于，U-net网络包含下采样、上采样以及跳跃连接三部分。 5 .根据权利要求4所述的一种基于深度学习的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特征在 于，下采样和上采样部分均采用Relu激活函数。 6 .一种基于深度学习的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测装置，其特征在于，包括:传送带（102）、 限位器（103）、立柱（105），横梁（106），RGB摄像头（107）、网络数据交换路由器（109）以及处 理器（110）； 立柱（105）通过螺栓固定于地面，其上开有一列圆形通孔，用以固定所述限位器（103） 和横梁（106）；RGB摄像头（107）安装在横梁（106）上且固定在传送带（102）上方；网络数据交 换路由器（109）连接RGB摄像头（107）和处理器（110）； 待检测的样本图像（101）置于传送带（102）的中央； RGB摄像头（107）用于采集传送带（102）上当前待检测的样本图像； 网络数据交换路由器（109），用于将RGB摄像头（107）采集的图像传送至处理器（110）； 处理器（110）内设置有训练好的磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测模型，用于对所述待检测的样 本图像进行预处理，计算出原始图像的四种显著图，将四种显著图和一个原始图像进行融 合，将融合后的图像输入到U-net网络，得到待检测的样本图像中缺陷的位置和大小;所述 磁瓦表面缺陷自动检测模型包括显著图计算模块、特征融合模块和U-net网络；其中，显著 图计算模块，用于对输入图像计算其AC显著图S AC 、ST显著图S ST 、PHOT显著图S PH0T 和BMS显著 图S bms ；S ac 用于凸显缺陷颜色的稀有性、S ST 用于凸显缺陷的边缘和角点，S PH0T 用于消除背景 纹理对缺陷区域的干扰;S BMS 用于模拟人类视觉注意力机制以凸显缺陷区域;特征融合模 块，用于将输入的原始图像和计算得到的四种显著图通过卷积层进行融合;U-net网络，用 于对融合得到的特征图进行像素级分割，得到缺陷的位置和大小。

title: A DAM CRACK DETECTION METHOD BASED ON U-NET NETWORK AND SC-SAM ATTENTION MECHANISM; 一种基于U-NET网络和SC-SAM注意力机制的大坝裂缝检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于U‑net网络和SC‑SAM注意力机制的大坝裂缝检测方法，该方法首先收集大坝数据集，并对该数据集进行数据扩充。随后构建深度学习分割网络U‑net模型，并在此基础之上添加SC‑SAM注意力机制，该注意力机制由两个部分构成，CAM提高了特征图中的裂缝通道权重，SAM提高了特征图中空间域上裂缝区域的权重，两者的相互协作使得模型对于大坝裂缝检测的准确度有了极大的提高。将扩充后的数据集分为训练集和测试集，利用训练集带SC‑SAM注意力机制的深度学习分割网络模型进行训练，得到训练好的模型；根据训练好的模型，将测试集输入训练好的模型中进行测试，得到大坝裂缝测试结果。

The invention discloses a dam crack detection method based on U-net network and SC-SAM attention mechanism. The method first collects a dam data set and performs data expansion on the data set. Then a deep learning segmentation network U-net model is built, and the SC-SAM attention mechanism is added on this basis. The attention mechanism consists of two parts. CAM improves the crack channel weight in the feature map, and SAM improves the feature. The weight of the crack area in the spatial domain in the figure, the mutual cooperation of the two makes the model greatly improve the accuracy of the dam crack detection. Divide the expanded data set into training set and test set, use the deep learning segmentation network model with SC-SAM attention mechanism in the training set for training, and obtain the trained model; according to the trained model, input the test set into the training set The test is carried out in a good model, and the test results of the dam crack are obtained.
claims:
1 .一种基于u-net网络和SOSAM注意力机制的大坝裂缝检测方法，其特征在于，包括如 下步骤： 步骤1,获取大坝裂缝数据集，包括大坝裂缝的真实图片和与之对应的标签图片，利用 图像数据增强技术对大坝数据集进行扩充，得到大坝裂缝样本集； 步骤2,构建SOSAM注意力机制的深度学习分割网络模型;具体如下： 所述深度学习分割网络模型包括特征提取的收缩路径和上采样的扩展路径； 其中，特征提取的收缩路径具体为:对于模型的输入，在第1层使用两次卷积操作，对第 1层输出的特征图进行最大池化后进入第2层，在第2层使用两次卷积操作，对第2层输出的 特征图进行最大池化后进入第3层，在第3层使用两次卷积操作，对第3层输出的特征图进行 最大池化后进入第4层，在第4层使用两次卷积操作，对第4层输出的特征图进行最大池化后 进入第5层，在第5层使用两次卷积操作，在两次卷积操作之后加上EOSAM注意力模块； 上采样的扩展路径具体为：对经第5层EOSAM注意力模块输出的特征图进行上采样后 进入第6层，将第4层输出的特征图与经第5层EOSAM注意力模块输出的特征图拼接后作为 第6层的输入，在第6层使用两次卷积操作，在两次卷积操作之后加上EOSAM注意力模块;对 经第6层EOSAM注意力模块输出的特征图进行上采样后进入第7层，将第3层输出的特征图 与经第6层EOSAM注意力模块输出的特征图拼接后作为第7层的输入，在第7层使用两次卷 积操作，在两次卷积操作之后加上EOSAM注意力模块;对经第7层EOSAM注意力模块输出的 特征图进行上采样后进入第8层，将第2层输出的特征图与经第7层EOSAM注意力模块输出 的特征图拼接后作为第8层的输入，在第8层使用两次卷积操作，在两次卷积操作之后加上 EOSAM注意力模块;对经第8层EOSAM注意力模块输出的特征图进行上采样后进入第9层， 在第9层使用三次卷积操作后,模型输出结果； 其中，在第1层至第8层使用的卷积操作，选取的卷积核大小均为3*3,步长均为1；在第9 层使用的三次卷积操作中，前两次选取的卷积核大小均为3*3,步长均为1,最后一次选取的 卷积核大小为1*1;最大池化选取的卷积核大小均为2*2,上采样使用的是反卷积操作，且反 卷积选取的卷积核大小均为2*2,第1层至第8层采用的过滤器的个数依次为64、128、256、 512、1024、512、256、128,第9层采用的过滤器个数分别为64和2； 步骤3,将大坝裂缝样本集分为训练集和测试集，利用训练集对步骤2构建的带SOSAM 注意力机制的深度学习分割网络模型进行训练,得到训练好的模型； 步骤4,根据训练好的模型，将测试集输入训练好的模型中进行测试，得到大坝裂缝测 试结果。 2 .根据权利要求1所述基于U-net网络和SOSAM注意力机制的大坝裂缝检测方法，其特 征在于，所述步骤4后面还包括步骤5,将步骤4得到的大坝裂缝测试结果与测试集所对应的 标签图片中的裂缝位置进行对比,计算评价指标,对测试结果进行评价。 3 .根据权利要求2所述基于U-net网络和SOSAM注意力机制的大坝裂缝检测方法，其特 征在于,所述评价指标,公式如下： /（p,尸） 其中，f (p, r)表示评价指标,孑取值为0.3, p为正确率,r为召回率。 4 .根据权利要求1所述基于U-net网络和SOSAM注意力机制的大坝裂缝检测方法，其特 征在于，步骤1所述图像数据增强技术包括旋转、平移、投影变换、缩放、翻转和像素填充。 5 .根据权利要求1所述基于U-net网络和SC-SAM注意力机制的大坝裂缝检测方法，其特 征在于，步骤2所述在第5层使用两次卷积操作，在两次卷积操作之后加上EOSAM注意力模 块具体为： EC-SAM注意力模块包括通道注意力机制和空间注意力机制； 其中，通道注意力机制具体为:对于经第5层两次卷积操作后输出的特征图，采用全局 平均池化生成第一通道特征图，同时对经第5层两次卷积操作后输出的特征图，采用全局最 大池化生成第二通道特征图，对第一通道特征图和第二通道特征图使用add操作进行融合， 再使用激活函数后与经第5层两次卷积操作后输出的特征图进行结合，得到通道注意力特 征图； 空间注意力机制具体为:对通道注意力特征图在通道纬度上进行平均池化即将所有通 道的空间特征相加取平均，得到一个二维的特征，对通道注意力特征图在通道纬度上进行 最大池化即选择出特征值最大的通道的空间特征，得到另一个二维的特征，将上述两个二 维的特征进行拼接，拼为通道数为2的特征图，使用二维卷积核对该特征图进行卷积操作， 得到特征图上与裂缝对应的空间单元的权重，并与通道注意力特征图进行结合，得到新的 特征图。

1 . a dam crack detection method based on u-net network and SOSAM attention mechanism, is characterized in that, comprises the steps: Step 1, obtains dam crack data set, comprises the real picture of dam crack and corresponding to it Label the pictures, and use the image data enhancement technology to expand the dam data set to obtain a dam crack sample set; Step 2, build a deep learning segmentation network model of the SOSAM attention mechanism; the details are as follows: The deep learning segmentation network model includes features The extracted shrinkage path and the upsampling expansion path; wherein, the shrinkage path of feature extraction is specifically: for the input of the model, two convolution operations are used in the first layer, and the feature map output by the first layer is subjected to maximum pooling. Enter the second layer, use two convolution operations in the second layer, perform maximum pooling on the feature map output by the second layer and enter the third layer, use two convolution operations in the third layer, and output the third layer After the feature map is max-pooled, it enters the fourth layer, and two convolution operations are used in the fourth layer. Product operation, add the EOSAM attention module after the two convolution operations; the expansion path of upsampling is as follows: the feature map output by the 5th layer EOSAM attention module is upsampled and then entered into the 6th layer. The feature map output by the layer is spliced with the feature map output by the fifth layer EOSAM attention module as For the input of the sixth layer, two convolution operations are used in the sixth layer, and the EOSAM attention module is added after the two convolution operations; the feature map output by the sixth layer EOSAM attention module is upsampled and entered into the sixth layer. Layer 7, the feature map output by the third layer and the feature map output by the EOSAM attention module of the sixth layer are spliced as the input of the seventh layer, and two convolution operations are used in the seventh layer, and two convolution operations are used. Then add the EOSAM attention module; after upsampling the feature map output by the 7th layer EOSAM attention module, enter the 8th layer, and compare the feature map output by the 2nd layer with the features output by the 7th layer EOSAM attention module After the image is spliced as the input of the 8th layer, two convolution operations are used in the 8th layer, and the EOSAM attention module is added after the two convolution operations; the feature map output by the 8th layer EOSAM attention module is uploaded. After sampling, it enters the ninth layer, and after using the third convolution operation in the ninth layer, the model outputs the results; among them, the convolution operations used in the first to eighth layers, the selected convolution kernel size is 3*3, The step size is 1; in the third convolution operation used in the 9th layer, the size of the convolution kernel selected for the first two times is 3*3, the size of the convolution kernel is 1, and the size of the convolution kernel selected for the last time is 1* 1; The size of the convolution kernel selected by the maximum pooling is 2*2, and the deconvolution operation is used for upsampling, and the reverse The size of the convolution kernel selected by the convolution is 2*2, and the number of filters used in the first layer to the eighth layer is 64, 128, 256, 512, 1024, 512, 256, 128, and the ninth layer adopts The number of filters is 64 and 2 respectively; Step 3, divide the dam crack sample set into a training set and a test set, and use the training set to train the deep learning segmentation network model with SOSAM attention mechanism constructed in step 2, Obtain the trained model; Step 4, according to the trained model, input the test set into the trained model for testing, and obtain the dam crack test result. 2 . the dam crack detection method based on U-net network and SOSAM attention mechanism according to claim 1, is characterized in that, described step 4 also comprises step 5 behind, the dam crack test result that step 4 obtains and test The crack positions in the label images corresponding to the set are compared, the evaluation indicators are calculated, and the test results are evaluated. 3 . the dam crack detection method based on U-net network and SOSAM attention mechanism according to claim 2, is characterized in that, described evaluation index, formula is as follows: /(p, cadaver) wherein, f (p, r) Indicates the evaluation index, and the value of loneliness is 0.3, p is the correct rate, and r is the recall rate. 4 . the dam crack detection method based on U-net network and SOSAM attention mechanism according to claim 1, its special The feature is that the image data enhancement techniques described in step 1 include rotation, translation, projection transformation, scaling, flipping and pixel filling. 5 . the dam crack detection method based on U-net network and SC-SAM attention mechanism according to claim 1, is characterized in that, described in step 2, uses twice convolution operation in the 5th layer, in twice convolution After the operation, the EOSAM attention module is added as follows: The EC-SAM attention module includes a channel attention mechanism and a spatial attention mechanism; wherein, the channel attention mechanism is specifically: for the feature map output after two convolution operations in the fifth layer, the global average pooling is used to generate the first Channel feature map, and at the same time, for the feature map output after two convolution operations of the fifth layer, global maximum pooling is used to generate the second channel feature map, and the first channel feature map and the second channel feature map are fused using the add operation. , and then use the activation function to combine with the feature map output after two convolution operations of the fifth layer to obtain the channel attention feature map; the spatial attention mechanism is specifically: the channel attention feature map is averaged over the channel latitude Pooling is to add and average the spatial features of all channels to obtain a two-dimensional feature. The maximum pooling of the channel attention feature map on the channel latitude is to select the spatial feature of the channel with the largest feature value, and obtain another two-dimensional feature. dimensional features, splicing the above two two-dimensional features into a feature map with a channel number of 2, and using a two-dimensional convolution kernel to perform a convolution operation on the feature map to obtain the spatial unit corresponding to the crack on the feature map. The weights are combined with the channel attention feature map to obtain a new feature map.

title: HEXAHEDRON DEFECT DETECTION METHOD AND MEDIUM BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 基于深度学习的六面体缺陷检测方法及介质
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于深度学习的六面体缺陷检测方法及介质的技术方案，包括：采集电子元器件的图像数据，将图像数据转化为深度学习的图像矩阵，并归一化保存于队列中；队列中的图片数据满足深度学习处理时，将图片数据进行打包发送至已训练的Unet模型；通过Unet模型输出语义分割结果，根据语义分割结果执行形状判断；根据判断结果，通过检测设备对电子元器件的对应部位进行检测。本发明的有益效果为：深度学习的训练方式代替传统算法，降低了开发周期；深度学习运算在GPU上，不受CPU的限制，节省了设备成本；深度学习的所圈即所检，无需调参数，无需专业人员，操作简单；在优质的数据标签下，复杂背景可轻易挑选出来，能够更加精确的进行缺陷检测。

The invention relates to a hexahedral defect detection method based on deep learning and a technical solution for a medium, including: collecting image data of electronic components, converting the image data into a deep learning image matrix, and storing it in a queue in a normalized manner; When the image data in the image meets the deep learning processing, the image data is packaged and sent to the trained Unet model; the semantic segmentation result is output through the Unet model, and the shape judgment is performed according to the semantic segmentation result; according to the judgment result, the electronic components are checked by the inspection equipment The corresponding part of the test. The beneficial effects of the present invention are: the training method of deep learning replaces the traditional algorithm, which reduces the development cycle; the deep learning operation is on the GPU without being restricted by the CPU, and the equipment cost is saved; Parameters, no need for professionals, simple operation; under high-quality data labels, complex backgrounds can be easily selected, enabling more accurate defect detection.
claims:
1 .一种基于深度学习的六面体缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，该方法包括： S100,通过摄像装置采集电子元器件的图像数据，将图像数据转化为深度学习的图像 矩阵，并归一化保存于队列中；其特征在于，所述将图像数据转化为深度学习的图像矩阵包 括:对不同摄像装置所采集的图像的原始数据进行多样化处理，并通过统一接口转换为深 度学习的矩阵结构数据； S200，将图片数据加入批次缓冲，深度学习模块检测批次达到检测个数并触发检测； Unet模型的训练包括:S210，将待检测产品经过六面体机器采集图片，将图片按照掩膜的方 式标注图像区域，并进行区域分类;S220，对图片进行数据扩增和数据增强，得到图片集； S230，将图片集按照设定比例划分为训练集和测试集；S240，获取标签数据的区域分类面 积，计算区域分类面积与分类区域的总面积的比例；S250，通过随机梯度下降执行收敛处 理；S260，基于4层下采样及4层上采样的Unet模型，对每层相同维度之间进行特征融合，所 述Unet模型主体运用了BN层；S270，收敛采用增加权重的sof tmax交叉熵，其中总10ss=权 重*分类loss；S280，对Unet模型生成的热度图采用softmax和argmax的结合进行分类汇总， 计算每个像素点属于对应分类的概率； S300，通过Unet模型输出语义分割结果，根据语义分割结果执行形状判断； S400，根据判断结果，通过检测设备对电子元器件的对应部位进行检测。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的基于深度学习的六面体缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，所述数据 增强包括旋转角度、增加噪点及动态生成缺陷图片。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的基于深度学习的六面体缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，所述随机 梯度下降通过ADAM或者NADAM优化算法实现。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的基于深度学习的六面体缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，该方法还 包括:通过增加批次执行多次训练。 5 .根据权利要求1所述的基于深度学习的六面体缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，该方法还 包括: 基于mxnet深度学习框架，通过.net封装mxnet深度学习框架的C接口，执行深度学习训 练模型静态图的构建。 6 .一种计算机可读存储介质，所述计算机可读存储介质存储有计算机程序，其特征在 于，所述计算机程序被处理器执行时实现如权利要求1-5任一所述的方法步骤。

1 A hexahedral defect detection method based on deep learning, characterized in that the method includes: S100: Collect image data of electronic components through a camera device, convert the image data into an image matrix for deep learning, and store the normalized image matrix in a queue; characterized in that, the image matrix for converting image data into deep learning includes : Perform diversified processing of the original data of images collected by different camera devices, and convert them into deep learning matrix structure data through a unified interface; S200, add the image data to the batch buffer, the deep learning module detects that the batch reaches the number of detections and triggers the detection; the training of the Unet model includes: S210, the product to be detected is collected by a hexahedron machine, and the image is labeled according to the mask Image area, and perform area classification; S220, perform data amplification and data enhancement on the image to obtain a picture set; S230, divide the picture set into a training set and a test set according to a set ratio; S240, obtain the area classification area of the label data , Calculate the ratio of the area classification area to the total area of the classification area; S250, perform convergence processing through stochastic gradient descent; S260, based on the Unet model of 4-layer downsampling and 4-layer upsampling, perform feature fusion between the same dimensions of each layer , The main body of the Unet model uses the BN layer; S270, the convergence adopts the weighted sof tmax cross-entropy, where the total 10ss = weight * classification loss; S280, the heat map generated by the Unet model uses a combination of softmax and argmax for classification and summary Calculate the probability that each pixel belongs to the corresponding category; S300: Output the semantic segmentation result through the Unet model, and perform shape judgment according to the semantic segmentation result; S400: According to the judgment result, the corresponding parts of the electronic components are detected by the detection equipment. 2 The hexahedral defect detection method based on deep learning according to claim 1, wherein the data enhancement includes rotation angle, increasing noise, and dynamically generating defect pictures. 3 The method for detecting hexahedral defects based on deep learning according to claim 1, wherein the stochastic gradient descent is implemented by an ADAM or NADAM optimization algorithm. 4 The hexahedral defect detection method based on deep learning according to claim 1, wherein the method further comprises: performing multiple trainings by adding batches. 5 The hexahedral defect detection method based on deep learning according to claim 1, wherein the method further comprises: Based on the mxnet deep learning framework, the C interface of the mxnet deep learning framework is encapsulated through .net to execute the construction of the static graph of the deep learning training model. 6 A computer-readable storage medium storing a computer program, wherein the computer program implements the method steps according to any one of claims 1 to 5 when the computer program is executed by a processor.

title: A METHOD FOR DETECTING SURFACE DEFECTS OF BRIDGE STRUCTURES BASED ON CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORK; 一种基于卷积神经网络的桥梁结构表面缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于卷积神经网络的桥梁结构表面缺陷检测方法，属于结构健康监测领域。该方法包括如下步骤：基于卷积神经网络模型实现裂缝类缺陷、露筋类缺陷的识别分类和初步定位；针对识别出来的裂缝类缺陷，训练U‑net卷积神经网络模型实现桥梁结构的裂缝粗分割，通过形态学方法进一步实现裂缝提取，剔除灰度图像中像素值较低易被误认为缺陷的像素点，从桥梁结构的图像中提取出了完整的裂缝区域和骨架提取结果。基于图像分割结果，能够自动跟踪裂缝类缺陷的位置，刻画出裂缝类缺陷的位置参数信息。本发明既能自动化地实现桥梁结构表面裂缝类、露筋类缺陷的识别及初步定位，又能智能化地排除干扰信息，适应多复杂背景下的裂缝缺陷的像素级别检测。

The invention relates to a method for detecting surface defects of bridge structures based on a convolutional neural network, and belongs to the field of structural health monitoring. The method includes the following steps: realizing the identification, classification and preliminary positioning of crack-like defects and exposed tendon-like defects based on a convolutional neural network model; for the identified crack-like defects, training a U-net convolutional neural network model to realize the cracks of the bridge structure Coarse segmentation, the crack extraction is further realized by morphological methods, and the pixels with low pixel values in the grayscale image that are easily mistaken for defects are removed, and the complete crack area and skeleton extraction results are extracted from the image of the bridge structure. Based on the image segmentation results, the position of crack-like defects can be automatically tracked, and the location parameter information of crack-like defects can be described. The invention can automatically realize the identification and preliminary positioning of cracks and exposed tendon defects on the surface of bridge structures, and can intelligently eliminate interference information, so as to adapt to pixel-level detection of cracks and defects in complex backgrounds.
claims:
1 .一种基于卷积神经网络的桥梁结构表面缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，包括如下步骤： 步骤1 :首先定义桥梁结构的裂缝类缺陷、露筋类缺陷，利用无人机搭载相机设备采集 不同部位、不同光照条件的桥梁结构图像，分别构建裂缝和露筋类缺陷的分类数据集和露 筋类缺陷语义分割的数据集，并利用随机旋转、裁切和尺度变换操作实现数据增强来充数 据集； 步骤2：构建卷积神经网络模型进行256X256尺寸大小桥梁结构图像裂缝类缺陷、露筋 类缺陷的分类； 步骤3：初始化分类模型的超参数，结合缺陷分类数据集进行模型的训练，调整卷积神 经网络模型的卷积核、池化层的参数;训练完成的模型对输入图像具有裂缝类缺陷、露筋类 缺陷和无缺陷三种输出结果； 步骤4：采用步长为64的交叉滑动方法对大于256X256的桥梁结构图像进行分块的裂 缝类缺陷检测，并根据检测结果对缺陷实现初步定位； 步骤5：针对步骤4中检测出的裂缝类缺陷，搭建U-net卷积神经网络模型实现裂缝的粗 分割； 步骤6:初始化U-net卷积神经网络模型超参数，取学习率为0.0001的Adam算法调整网 络参数，不断减小每个像素点处的预测值和目标值的差距;训练完成的U-net卷积神经网络 模型针对桥梁结构裂缝图像的输入，输出裂缝灰度图像的预测结果； 步骤7：采用最大类间差法方法进行图像的二值化，同时利用长为4、宽为4的矩形结构 元素对二值图进行腐蚀操作，表示如下： A0B= {xeE n |x+beA,beB} 其中，A为二值图像,B为结构元素,x为二值图像A中的像素值，b为结构元素B中的尺寸 值,E n 为n维欧式空间,ΑΘΒ为图像A被结构元素B的腐蚀结果； 步骤8：针对腐蚀图像的结果，采用Zhang-Suen并行快速细化算法进行图像骨架的提 取； 步骤9：寻找裂缝的二值图像骨架提取图中轮廓点集的凸包，再求出凸包的最小外接矩 形；以图像的左上顶点作为原点，建立x、y坐标轴;旋转角度θ是与x轴平行的水平线逆时针 旋转与缺陷外接矩形碰到的第一条边的夹角，并且这个边的边长是宽度，另一条边边长是 高度;从而给出裂缝的最小外接矩形定位图，给出缺陷外接矩形的中心点、宽度、高度以及 旋转角度θ特征描述信息。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于卷积神经网络的桥梁结构表面缺陷检测方法，其特 征在于，步骤2中所述卷积神经网络模型总共包含4层，包括前三层的卷积池化操作以及最 后一层的全连接、激活、分类操作。 3 .根据权利要求2所述的一种基于卷积神经网络的桥梁结构表面缺陷检测方法，其特 征在于,所述卷积池化操作采用最大池化方法，同时使用了BN以及Dropout操作，并将ReLU 函数作为激活函数和Softmax函数作为分类函数。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于卷积神经网络的桥梁结构表面缺陷检测方法，其特 征在于，步骤5中所述U-net卷积神经网络模型的具体内容如下： 图像数据先经过压缩路径进行下采样提取图像特征编码为特征图，然后再经过扩展路 径上采样将提取的特征反向解码，利用最后一层特征图进行像素级别的分类，完成图像的 分割;将最后一层特征图经过Sigmoid分类单元将每个像素进行分类获得预测的值。 5 .根据权利要求4所述的一种基于卷积神经网络的桥梁结构表面缺陷检测方法，其特 征在于，所述压缩路径中由4层的两次3 X 3的卷积、一次3 X 3的最大池化操作组成;所述扩 展路径由4层2 X 2上卷积、通道特征融合、两次3 X 3的最大池化操作组成。

1 . a kind of bridge structure surface defect detection method based on convolutional neural network, is characterized in that, comprises the following steps: Step 1: first define the crack class defect, exposed tendon class defect of the bridge structure, utilize the unmanned aerial vehicle to carry the camera equipment to collect different The bridge structure images of different parts and different lighting conditions are used to construct a classification dataset of cracks and exposed tendon defects and a dataset of semantic segmentation of exposed tendon defects, and use random rotation, cropping and scale transformation operations to achieve data augmentation to fill the data. Step 2: Build a convolutional neural network model to classify crack-like defects and exposed tendon-like defects in bridge structure images with a size of 256X256; Step 3: Initialize the hyperparameters of the classification model, and combine the defect classification data set to train the model and adjust The parameters of the convolution kernel and the pooling layer of the convolutional neural network model; the trained model has three output results of crack-like defects, exposed tendon-like defects and no defects for the input image; Step 4: Use a crossover with a step size of 64 The sliding method performs block-based crack-like defect detection on bridge structural images larger than 256X256, and initially locates the defects according to the detection results; Step 5: For the crack-like defects detected in step 4, build a U-net convolutional neural network The model realizes the rough segmentation of cracks; Step 6: Initialize the hyperparameters of the U-net convolutional neural network model, and take the Adam algorithm with a learning rate of 0.0001 to adjust the network network parameters, and continuously reduce the gap between the predicted value and the target value at each pixel point; the trained U-net convolutional neural network model outputs the prediction result of the crack grayscale image for the input of the crack image of the bridge structure; Step 7 : The maximum inter-class difference method is used to binarize the image, and the rectangular structure element with a length of 4 and a width of 4 is used to erode the binary image, which is expressed as follows: A0B= {xeE n |x+beA,beB} Among them, A is the binary image, B is the structuring element, x is the pixel value in the binary image A, b is the size value in the structuring element B, E n is the n-dimensional Euclidean space, and ΑΘΒ is the corrosion result of the image A by the structural element B; Step 8: For the result of the corrosion image, use the Zhang-Suen parallel fast refinement algorithm to extract the image skeleton; Step 9: Find the binary value of the crack The image skeleton extracts the convex hull of the contour point set in the figure, and then finds the minimum circumscribed rectangle of the convex hull; takes the upper left vertex of the image as the origin, and establishes the x and y coordinate axes; the rotation angle θ is the horizontal line parallel to the x-axis. The horizontal line rotates counterclockwise The included angle of the first side that touches the circumscribed rectangle of the defect, and the side length of this side is the width, and the length of the other side is the height; thus the minimum circumscribed rectangle location map of the crack is given, and the center of the defect circumscribed rectangle is given. Point, width, height and rotation angle θ feature description information. 2 . a kind of bridge structure surface defect detection method based on convolutional neural network according to claim 1, is characterized in that, described in step 2, the convolutional neural network model comprises 4 layers in total, including the convolution pool of the first three layers operation and the last layer of full connection, activation, and classification operations. 3 . a kind of bridge structure surface defect detection method based on convolutional neural network according to claim 2, is characterized in that, described convolution pooling operation adopts maximum pooling method, used BN and Dropout operation simultaneously, and ReLU function as activation function and Softmax function as classification function. 4 . a kind of bridge structure surface defect detection method based on convolutional neural network according to claim 1, is characterized in that, the concrete content of U-net convolutional neural network model described in step 5 is as follows: Image data is compressed first The path is down-sampled to extract image features and encoded into feature maps, and then the extracted features are decoded in reverse through up-sampling on the extended path, and the last layer of feature maps is used to perform pixel-level classification to complete the image classification. Segmentation: The last layer of feature map is subjected to the Sigmoid classification unit to classify each pixel to obtain the predicted value. 5 . a kind of bridge structure surface defect detection method based on convolutional neural network according to claim 4, it is characterized in that, in described compression path, by 4 layers of twice 3 × 3 convolution, once 3 × 3 It consists of max pooling operations; the expansion path consists of 4 layers of 2×2 up-convolution, channel feature fusion, and two max pooling operations of 3×3.

title: A METHOD FOR DETECTING DEFECTS IN CIRCULAR PARTS; 一种圆形零件缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本申请公开了一种圆形零件缺陷检测方法，其包括：获取待检测产品的图像，待检测产品中包含圆形零件；采用经训练的U‑Net图像分割模型对所述图像进行分割，获得对应于圆形零件的目标区域的二值化图形；提取二值化图形的边缘；基于二值化图形的边缘提取特征数据；以及基于特征数据采用经训练的SVM分类器进行分类，从而判别圆形零件是否有缺陷。根据本发明实施例，可以提高圆形零件图像分割的精确度和鲁棒性，并且有助于实现既准确又快速的检测。

This application discloses a round part defect detection method, which includes: obtaining an image of a product to be detected, which contains round parts; using a trained UNet image segmentation model to segment the image, and obtain Binarized graphics corresponding to the target area of the circular part; extracting the edges of the binary graphics; extracting feature data based on the edges of the binarized graphics; and using a trained SVM classifier based on the feature data to classify, thereby identifying circles Whether the shape parts are defective. According to the embodiments of the present invention, the accuracy and robustness of image segmentation of circular parts can be improved, and it is helpful to achieve both accurate and fast detection.

title: AA-GATE-UNET-BASED OFFSHORE WIND TURBINE TOWER COATING DEFECT DETECTION METHOD; 基于AA-GATE-UNET的海上风电塔筒涂层缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于AA‑gate‑Unet的海上风电塔筒涂层缺陷检测方法，包括：接收系统传达的海上风电塔筒涂层缺陷检测请求，获取所述请求对应的风电塔筒涂层无人机检测视频信息；提取视频信息中的塔筒涂层图像关键帧；将塔筒涂层图像关键帧的图像上传至系统云端；将上传系统云端的所述海上风电塔筒涂层检测图像关键帧的图像，采用基于HMM和基于Winters三参数指数平滑的预测算法进行预测，获得海上风电塔筒涂层缺陷的检测结果；在海上风电塔筒涂层检测结果为异常状态时，将所述海上风电塔筒缺陷涂层图像上传至系统，并进行相应的海上风电塔筒涂层维护工作。本发明利用无人机平台采集海上风机塔筒图像，利用改进型深度学习模型AA‑gate‑Unet进行塔筒缺陷的分割；通过准确分割后，可以计算出各种缺陷的面积值数据，从而实现对风机后期维护的精准预算与现场检测。

The invention discloses an AA-gate-Unet-based offshore wind turbine tower coating defect detection method, which includes: receiving an offshore wind turbine tower coating defect detection request transmitted by a system, and obtaining the wind turbine tower coating corresponding to the request UAV detects video information; extracts the key frame of the tower coating image in the video information; uploads the image of the key frame of the tower coating image to the system cloud; uploads the detection image of the offshore wind turbine tower coating in the system cloud The key frame image is predicted by the prediction algorithm based on HMM and Winters three-parameter exponential smoothing to obtain the detection result of the coating defect of the offshore wind turbine tower; when the coating detection result of the offshore wind turbine tower is abnormal, the said The defective coating image of offshore wind power tower is uploaded to the system, and the corresponding maintenance of offshore wind power tower coating is carried out. The invention uses the UAV platform to collect the image of the offshore wind turbine tower, and uses the improved deep learning model AA-gate-Unet to segment the tower defects; after accurate segmentation, the area value data of various defects can be calculated, thereby achieving Precise budget and on-site inspection for the subsequent maintenance of the wind turbine.

title: AN INFRARED THERMAL IMAGE DEFECT DETECTION AND QUANTIFICATION METHOD BASED ON SPATIOTEMPORAL FEATURE EXTRACTION; 一种时空特征提取的红外热图像缺陷检测及量化方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种时空特征提取的红外热图像缺陷检测及量化方法，通过三维时空特征提取及融合模型提取热图像序列的空间和时间特征，并对提取到的特征加权融合，再与序列化主成分分析层提取得到的特征进行融合，根据训练好的权重预测出每一个像素点所属类别的概率，构成概率二值输出图，最终实现缺陷位置的自动检测及量化。

The invention discloses an infrared thermal image defect detection and quantification method for spatiotemporal feature extraction. The spatial and temporal features of a thermal image sequence are extracted through a three-dimensional spatiotemporal feature extraction and fusion model, the extracted features are weighted and fused, and then serialized The features extracted by the principal component analysis layer are fused, and the probability of the category of each pixel point is predicted according to the trained weight to form a probability binary output map, and finally realize the automatic detection and quantification of defect positions.

title: AN INFRARED THERMAL IMAGE DEFECT DETECTION AND QUANTIFICATION METHOD BASED ON SPATIO-TEMPORAL FEATURE EXTRACTION; 一种时空特征提取的红外热图像缺陷检测及量化方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种时空特征提取的红外热图像缺陷检测及量化方法，通过三维时空特征提取及融合模型提取热图像序列的空间和时间特征，并对提取到的特征加权融合，再与序列化主成分分析层提取得到的特征进行融合，根据训练好的权重预测出每一个像素点所属类别的概率，构成概率二值输出图，最终实现缺陷位置的自动检测及量化。

The invention discloses an infrared thermal image defect detection and quantification method for spatiotemporal feature extraction. The spatial and temporal characteristics of a thermal image sequence are extracted through a three-dimensional spatiotemporal feature extraction and fusion model, and the extracted features are weighted and fused, and then serialized The features extracted by the principal component analysis layer are fused, and the probability of each pixel belonging to the category is predicted based on the trained weights, forming a probability binary output map, and finally realizing automatic detection and quantification of defect positions.

title: METHOD FOR DETECTING DEFECTS OF INSULATOR STRING IN POWER SYSTEM; 一种电力系统绝缘子串缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明涉及工业物联网与边缘计算领域，具体涉及一种电力系统绝缘子串缺陷检测方法。包括以下步骤：无人机获取场景的图像信息，并将含有绝缘子串的图像发回地面服务器并通过U‑Net网络对图像进行分割，得到结果图像SE；当SE中只包含单一的绝缘子串时，利用缺陷检测算法得到缺失位置；当SE中包含一对或多对绝缘子串时，将SE输入到缺陷检测算法中，把SE中每对绝缘子串划分成两部分图像，并分别对两部分图像进行峰值点或谷值点检测，得到峰值点和谷值点列表P；对P位置分布进行分析，得到存在缺陷位置的区间并标记出绝缘子串缺失的位置。本发明不仅可以解决单一绝缘子串出现的缺失位置，还可以解决绝缘子串在成对出现，相互遮挡的情况下出现缺失问题。

The invention relates to the field of industrial Internet of Things and edge computing, in particular to a method for detecting defects of insulator strings in a power system. It includes the following steps: the drone obtains the image information of the scene, and sends the image containing the insulator string back to the ground server and segment the image through the U-Net network to obtain the result image SE; when the SE contains only a single insulator string , Use the defect detection algorithm to get the missing position; when the SE contains one or more pairs of insulator strings, enter the SE into the defect detection algorithm, divide each pair of insulator strings in the SE into two parts of the image, and separately compare the two parts of the image Perform peak point or valley point detection to obtain a peak point and valley point list P; analyze the P position distribution to obtain the interval of defective positions and mark the position where the insulator string is missing. The present invention can not only solve the missing position of a single insulator string, but also solve the problem of missing insulator strings when they appear in pairs and shield each other.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR CRACK DETECTION BASED ON RECURSIVE ATTENTION MECHANISM; 一种基于递归注意力机制的裂纹检测的方法及装置
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于递归注意力机制的裂纹检测的方法，包括以下步骤：采集裂纹图片，通过U‑Net的编码部分对裂纹图片进行下采样，得到不同尺度下采样图片的特征信号；将不同尺度下采样图片的特征信号输入到相应的RAM模块中，RAM模块中包含有递归模块，输出相应的下采样特征信号；输入U‑Net的编码部分的l层特征信号和解码部分的l‑1层门控信号；输出U‑Net的编码部分的下采样输出信号和通过门控信号关注得到显著区域的特征信号；构建U‑Net的上采样模块，将RAM模块输出的显著区域的特征信号与通过反卷积得到的上采样的特征信号拼接后进行上采样，得到裂纹检测图片。本发明通过递归残差块和注意力模块，将RAM整合到了裂纹分割的任务中，提高了图像裂纹检测算法的性能。

The invention discloses a method for crack detection based on a recursive attention mechanism, which includes the following steps: collecting crack pictures, down-sampling the crack pictures through the coding part of U-Net, and obtaining characteristic signals of down-sampled pictures at different scales; The characteristic signals of the down-sampled pictures at different scales are input to the corresponding RAM module. The RAM module contains a recursive module to output the corresponding down-sampling characteristic signal; input the l-layer characteristic signal of the encoding part of the U-Net and the l-decoding part of the decoding part. Level 1 gated signal; output the down-sampling output signal of the coding part of U-Net and focus on the characteristic signal of the salient area through the gating signal; construct the U-Net up-sampling module to output the characteristic signal of the salient area from the RAM module After splicing with the up-sampled feature signal obtained by deconvolution, up-sampling is performed to obtain a crack detection picture. The invention integrates RAM into the task of crack segmentation through the recursive residual block and the attention module, and improves the performance of the image crack detection algorithm.

title: AN AUTOMATIC DETECTION METHOD FOR CRACK DAMAGE OF HIGH-SPEED RAILWAY CATENARY POWER SUPPLY EQUIPMENT; 一种高铁接触网供电设备裂损自动检测方法
abstract:
一种高铁接触网供电设备裂损自动检测方法，包括：建立数据样本库、训练两个深度卷积神经网络进行数据学习和训练。本发明针对现有设备外观异常检测方法单一或者数据量较少等缺陷，本发明利用基于深度学习的特征识别模型，集合正常样本实现对外观异常设备的准确检测。

An automatic detection method for crack damage of high-speed railway catenary power supply equipment, including: establishing a data sample database, and training two deep convolutional neural networks for data learning and training. The present invention aims at defects such as a single method for detecting abnormal appearance of existing equipment or a small amount of data. The present invention uses a feature recognition model based on deep learning to collect normal samples to realize accurate detection of abnormal appearance equipment.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR DETECTING PRODUCT DEFECTS; 一种产品缺陷检测方法和装置
abstract:
本申请公开了一种产品缺陷检测方法和装置。其中方法包括：利用Unet网络生成产品图像的掩模图像；根据掩模图像中指定像素值的分布情况确定产品特征；设置与产品特征相对应的缺陷条件；将产品特征与缺陷条件进行匹配，若匹配成功，则产品中存在缺陷。该技术方案的有益效果在于，将轻量的Unet网络应用于产品检测场景来生成mask，能够在几十张图的少量训练样本情况下完成图像缺陷区域的拟合与图像提取任务，生成的mask能够较为准确地描述有关缺陷的信息，可以在未能够获得大量训练样本的情况下有效地进行产品缺陷的检测。

This application discloses a product defect detection method and device. The methods include: using Unet network to generate a mask image of a product image; determining product features according to the distribution of specified pixel values in the mask image; setting defect conditions corresponding to product features; matching product features with defect conditions, if If the match is successful, there are defects in the product. The beneficial effect of this technical solution is that the lightweight Unet network is applied to the product inspection scene to generate the mask, which can complete the image defect area fitting and image extraction tasks in the case of a small number of training samples of dozens of images, and the generated mask It can describe information about defects more accurately, and can effectively detect product defects without obtaining a large number of training samples.
claims:
1 .一种产品缺陷检测方法，包括： 利用Unet网络生成产品图像的掩模图像； 根据所述掩模图像中指定像素值的分布情况确定产品特征； 设置与所述产品特征相对应的缺陷条件； 将所述产品特征与缺陷条件进行匹配，若匹配成功，则所述产品中存在缺陷。 2 .如权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述根据所述掩模图像中指定像素值的分布 情况确定产品特征包括： 确定能够涵盖所述掩模图像中连通的指定像素值的定位框，将所述定位框的几何特征 作为产品特征； 所述缺陷条件为:所述几何特征的特征值大于预设阈值。 3 .如权利要求2所述的方法，其特征在于，所述缺陷特征条件中的预设阈值是根据各训 练样本图像中的缺陷大小确定的，从而使预设比例数量的训练样本图像的产品特征能够与 所述缺陷特征条件相匹配。 4 .如权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述Unet网络是通过如下方式训练的： 根据训练样本图像的缺陷标注信息，为训练样本图像生成第一掩模图像作为样本真实 值，所述第一掩模图像的所述指定像素值与所述缺陷标注信息相对应； 将所述训练样本图像输入到所述Unet网络中，得到所述Unet网络输出的第二掩模图像 作为样本预测值； 根据所述样本真实值和所述样本预测值计算训练损失值，根据所述训练损失值进行所 述Unet网络的优化。 5 .如权利要求4所述的方法，其特征在于，所述根据所述样本真实值和所述样本预测值 计算训练损失值包括： 将所述样本真实值和所述样本预测值代入Dice-coefficient损失函数计算训练损失 值。 6 .如权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述方法还包括： 基于DenseNet网络搭建分类网络，所述分类网络包括初始模块、主干网络和分类模块； 若确定所述产品中存在缺陷，则将所述掩模图像输入到所述分类网络中，得到所述分 类网络输出的缺陷分类结果。 7 .如权利要求6所述的方法，其特征在于，所述将所述掩模图像输入到分类网络中，得 到所述分类网络输出的缺陷分类结果包括： 利用所述初始模块得到掩模图像的初始特征图，所述初始模块包括卷积层和最大池化 层； 利用所述主干网络对所述初始特征图进行稠密化处理，得到稠密特征图；所述主干网 络包括级联的DenseX模块、卷积层和平均池化层，所述DenseX模块包括X个级联的Dense模 块，X为正整数； 利用所述分类模块输出根据所述稠密特征图确定的缺陷分类结果，所述分类模块包括 全连接层和softmax层。 8 .如权利要求7所述的方法，其特征在于，所述分类网络在训练时使用交叉熵和L2正则 化项组合形成的损失函数。 9 .如权利要求7所述的方法，其特征在于，所述分类网络在训练时利用Momentum优化器 进行参数优化。 10 .一种产品缺陷检测装置，其特征在于，所述产品缺陷检测装置用于实现权利要求1 〜9之任一所述产品缺陷检测方法。

1 A product defect detection method, comprising: generating a mask image of a product image using Unet network; determining product features according to the distribution of designated pixel values in the mask image; setting defect conditions corresponding to the product features; The product feature is matched with the defect condition, and if the matching is successful, there is a defect in the product. 2 The method of claim 1, wherein the determining the product feature according to the distribution of the specified pixel value in the mask image comprises: determining a location that can cover the connected specified pixel value in the mask image Frame, the geometric feature of the positioning frame is used as a product feature; the defect condition is: the feature value of the geometric feature is greater than a preset threshold. 3 The method of claim 2, wherein the preset threshold value in the defect feature condition is determined according to the size of the defect in each training sample image, so that the product feature of the training sample image of the preset proportion is It can be matched with the defect characteristic condition. 4 The method of claim 1, wherein the Unet network is trained in the following manner: according to the defect annotation information of the training sample image, a first mask image is generated for the training sample image as the true value of the sample, so The designated pixel value of the first mask image corresponds to the defect annotation information; the training sample image is input into the Unet network, and the second mask image output by the Unet network is obtained as a sample prediction Value; Calculate a training loss value according to the true value of the sample and the predicted value of the sample, and perform the optimization of the Unet network according to the training loss value. 5 The method of claim 4, wherein the calculating a training loss value according to the true value of the sample and the predicted value of the sample comprises: substituting the true value of the sample and the predicted value of the sample into a Dice-coefficient The loss function calculates the training loss value. 6 The method of claim 1, wherein the method further comprises: building a classification network based on the DenseNet network, the classification network including an initial module, a backbone network, and a classification module; if it is determined that there are defects in the product, Then, the mask image is input into the classification network, and the defect classification result output by the classification network is obtained. 7 The method of claim 6, wherein the inputting the mask image into a classification network to obtain the defect classification result output by the classification network comprises: obtaining the mask image by using the initial module The initial feature map, the initial module includes a convolutional layer and a maximum pooling layer; the backbone network is used to densify the initial feature map to obtain a dense feature map; the backbone network includes cascaded DenseX modules, Convolutional layer and average pooling layer. The DenseX module includes X cascaded Dense modules, where X is a positive integer; the classification module is used to output the defect classification result determined according to the dense feature map, and the classification module includes Fully connected layer and softmax layer. 8 The method of claim 7, wherein the classification network uses a loss function formed by a combination of cross entropy and L2 regularization term during training. 9 The method of claim 7, wherein the classification network uses a Momentum optimizer for parameter optimization during training. 10 A product defect detection device, characterized in that the product defect detection device is used to implement the product defect detection method of any one of claims 1-9.

title: A STRIP STEEL DEFECT DETECTION METHOD BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 一种基于深度学习的带钢缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于深度学习的带钢缺陷检测方法，基于U‑Net的编码器，编码器通过反复的卷积操作提取图像中的特征，并进行五次下采样操作，提取不同尺度的特征。解码器部分与编码器对称，接受了编码器的输出，进行五次上采样，并且每次上采样得到的结果会与编码器同尺度的特征图进行拼接。下采样前使用高斯低通滤波器，去除其中的高频信息，防止因特征图原频率过高，出现混叠现象，导致特征图出现偏差。被去除的高频信息中蕴含了原图的细节信息，这些细节信息对带钢小型缺陷的检测至关重要，直接舍弃会影响效果。本方法将这些高频信息进一步加回到模型解码器的特征图上，产生更精细的分割效果。

The present invention discloses a strip defect detection method based on deep learning. The encoder is based on UNet. The encoder extracts features in the image through repeated convolution operations, and performs five downsampling operations to extract features of different scales. The decoder part is symmetrical with the encoder. It receives the output of the encoder and performs five upsampling operations, and the result obtained by each upsampling will be spliced with the feature map of the same scale of the encoder. A Gaussian low-pass filter is used before downsampling to remove high-frequency information therein to prevent aliasing due to the high original frequency of the feature map, which leads to deviation in the feature map. The removed high-frequency information contains detailed information of the original image, which is crucial to the detection of small defects in the strip, and directly discarding it will affect the effect. This method further adds these high-frequency information back to the feature map of the model decoder to produce a more refined segmentation effect.
claims:
1 . 一种基于深度学习的带钢缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，包括如下步骤： 步骤1、收集带钢的图像数据集,并对图像数据集中带钢图像的数据进行清洗； 步骤2、将数据集中的带钢图像随机划分为训练集和测试集，并使用ImageNet数据集的方差与均值进行正则化； 步骤3、仿照U - Net的架构构建模型；编码器使用在ImageNet数据集上预训练好的 ResNet50网络，并在每次下采样之前插入高斯低通滤波器;解码器为5个解码器模块堆叠而成； 步骤4、对步骤3构建的模型进行训练；训练时输入的带钢图像数据会进行随机数据增强；训练结束后，在测试集上进行测试，检测模型的训练结果是否满足要求； 步骤3具体包括以下步骤： 步骤3.1、构建编码器部分;使用在ImageNet数据集上训练好的ResNet50作为模型解码器；在ResNet50的每次下采样操作前插入高斯低通滤波器模块；在该模块中，首先使用高斯低通滤波器降低特征图的频率，使下采样后的特征图更为清晰;之后让高斯低通滤波器处理前的特征图与处理后的特征图做差，计算出损失的高频信息，为解码器部分的输入做准备； 步骤3.2、构建解码器部分；该解码器以U-Net的解码器结构作为主体结构，由五个解码器模块组成;这五个解码器模块会将编码器输出的特征图进行连续的上采样，直到特征图恢复至原图大小，最终输出的结果即为缺陷的识别结果;前四个解码器模块的输入会与编码器的输出特征图进行拼接，综合利用高层级与低层级的语义信息，以获得更好的分割结果；在原U-Net解码器的基础上，前四个解码器模块的输入还会加上编码器中对应高斯低通滤波器去除的高频信息，以避免细节信息的损失;最后一个解码器不接受编码器的输入。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的带钢缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，步骤2 采取以下步骤： 步骤2.1、随机地震图像将数据集划分为训练集和测试集； 步骤2.2、将训练接的每张分辨率为256 X 1600的带钢图像，切分为四张256 X 400的小图像。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的一种基于深度学习的带钢缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，步骤4 具体包括以下步骤： 步骤4.1、对构建好的模型进行训练，使用标准的Adam优化算法对模型进行训练；模型总共训练100个epoch，batch size为10；训练的初始学习率为0.01，随着训练的epoch线性衰减;训练使用的损失函数为FocalLoss损失函数，缓解数据集类别不均衡的问题； 步骤4.2、训练时对输入的数据进行数据增强，以增加数据多样性;数据增强会随机使用以下一种策略进行:不做增强、随机进行竖直方向或水平方向的翻转，顺时针或逆时针在 5。范围内的随机旋转，随机的高斯噪声，直方图均衡、图像锐化;之后使用数据集的均值与标准差，对图像进行标准化处理； 步骤4.3、在训练到80个epoch后，每个epoch训练完毕后，会使用五折交叉验证的方法测试模型精度;选择其中精度最高的模型作为结果； 步骤4.4、训练结束后，在测试集上验证模型是否有效。

1 . A strip defect detection method based on deep learning, characterized in that it comprises the following steps: Step 1, collecting an image data set of strip steel, and cleaning the data of the strip steel images in the image data set; Step 2, randomly dividing the strip steel images in the data set into a training set and a test set, and regularizing them using the variance and mean of the ImageNet data set; Step 3, constructing a model based on the architecture of U-Net; the encoder uses a ResNet50 network pre-trained on the ImageNet data set, and inserts a Gaussian low-pass filter before each downsampling; the decoder is composed of 5 decoder modules stacked; Step 4, training the model constructed in step 3; the strip steel image data input during training will be subjected to random data enhancement; after the training is completed, testing is performed on the test set to detect whether the training results of the model meet the requirements; Step 3 specifically comprises the following steps: Step 3.1, build the encoder part; use the ResNet50 trained on the ImageNet dataset as the model decoder; insert a Gaussian low-pass filter module before each downsampling operation of ResNet50; in this module, first use the Gaussian low-pass filter to reduce the frequency of the feature map to make the downsampled feature map clearer; then make the difference between the feature map before and after the Gaussian low-pass filter processing, calculate the lost high-frequency information, and prepare for the input of the decoder part; Step 3.2, construct the decoder part; the decoder uses the U-Net decoder structure as the main structure and consists of five decoder modules; these five decoder modules will continuously upsample the feature map output by the encoder until the feature map is restored to the original image size, and the final output result is the defect recognition result; the input of the first four decoder modules will be spliced with the output feature map of the encoder, and the high-level and low-level semantic information will be comprehensively utilized to obtain better segmentation results; on the basis of the original U-Net decoder, the input of the first four decoder modules will also be added with the high-frequency information removed by the corresponding Gaussian low-pass filter in the encoder to avoid the loss of detail information; the last decoder does not accept the input of the encoder. 2 .A strip defect detection method based on deep learning according to claim 1 is characterized in that step 2 takes the following steps: step 2.1, randomly divides the data set into a training set and a test set by using seismic images; step 2.2, divides each strip image with a resolution of 256 X 1600 used in training into four small images of 256 X 400. 3 . According to the deep learning-based strip defect detection method described in claim 1, it is characterized in that step 4 specifically includes the following steps: Step 4.1, train the constructed model, and use the standard Adam optimization algorithm to train the model; the model is trained for a total of 100 epochs, and the batch size is 10; the initial learning rate of the training is 0.01, which decays linearly with the epoch of training; the loss function used in training is the FocalLoss loss function, which alleviates the problem of imbalanced data set categories; Step 4.2, during training, data enhancement is performed on the input data to increase data diversity; data enhancement will randomly use one of the following strategies: no enhancement, random vertical or horizontal flipping, clockwise or counterclockwise at 5. Random rotation within the range, random Gaussian noise, histogram equalization, and image sharpening; then the image is standardized using the mean and standard deviation of the data set; Step 4.3, after training to 80 epochs, after each epoch is trained, the model accuracy will be tested using the five-fold cross-validation method; the model with the highest accuracy will be selected as the result; Step 4.4, after training, verify whether the model is effective on the test set.

title: A STRIP STEEL DEFECT DETECTION METHOD BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 一种基于深度学习的带钢缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于深度学习的带钢缺陷检测方法，基于U‑Net的编码器，编码器通过反复的卷积操作提取图像中的特征，并进行五次下采样操作，提取不同尺度的特征。解码器部分与编码器对称，接受了编码器的输出，进行五次上采样，并且每次上采样得到的结果会与编码器同尺度的特征图进行拼接。下采样前使用高斯低通滤波器，去除其中的高频信息，防止因特征图原频率过高，出现混叠现象，导致特征图出现偏差。被去除的高频信息中蕴含了原图的细节信息，这些细节信息对带钢小型缺陷的检测至关重要，直接舍弃会影响效果。本方法将这些高频信息进一步加回到模型解码器的特征图上，产生更精细的分割效果。

The invention discloses a strip steel defect detection method based on deep learning, an encoder based on U-Net, the encoder extracts features in an image through repeated convolution operations, and performs five downsampling operations to extract different scales feature. The decoder part is symmetrical to the encoder. It receives the output of the encoder and performs five upsampling, and the result of each upsampling will be spliced with the feature map of the same scale of the encoder. Before downsampling, a Gaussian low-pass filter is used to remove the high-frequency information in it to prevent aliasing due to the original frequency of the feature map from being too high, resulting in a deviation of the feature map. The removed high-frequency information contains the detailed information of the original image, which is very important for the detection of small defects in the strip, and the direct rejection will affect the effect. This method further adds these high-frequency information back to the feature map of the model decoder to produce a finer segmentation effect.

1 A strip steel defect detection method based on deep learning, which is characterized in that it comprises the following steps: Step 1. Collect the image data set of the strip steel, and clean the data of the strip steel image in the image data set; Step 2. The data The concentrated strip images are randomly divided into training set and test set, and the variance and mean of the ImageNet data set are used for regularization; Step 3. The model is built following the architecture of U-Net; the encoder is pre-trained on the ImageNet data set ResNet50 network, and insert a Gaussian low-pass filter before each downsampling; the decoder is a stack of 5 decoder modules; step 4. Train the model built in step 3; the strip image data input during training Random data enhancement will be performed; after the training is completed, a test is performed on the test set to check whether the training result of the model meets the requirements. 2 A strip steel defect detection method based on deep learning according to claim 1, characterized in that the following steps are taken in step 2: Step 2.1: Random seismic images divide the data set into training set and test set; Step 2.2, Divide each strip image with a resolution of 256X 1600 from training into four small images of 256X400. 3 A strip steel defect detection method based on deep learning according to claim 1, characterized in that step 3 specifically includes the following steps: Step 3.1, building an encoder part; using ResNet50 trained on the ImageNet data set as Model decoder; insert a Gaussian low-pass filter module before each down-sampling operation of ResNet50; in this module, first use a Gaussian low-pass filter to reduce the frequency of the feature map to make the down-sampling feature map clearer; Then make the difference between the feature map before processing by the Gaussian low-pass filter and the processed feature map, and calculate the lost high-frequency information to prepare for the input of the decoder part; Step 3.2, construct the decoder part; the decoder is based on U-Net's decoder structure is the main structure, composed of five decoder modules; these five decoder modules will continuously up-sample the feature map output by the encoder until the feature map is restored to the original size, and finally output The result of is the defect recognition result; the input of the first four decoder modules will be spliced with the output feature map of the encoder, and the high-level and low-level semantic information are comprehensively used to obtain better segmentation results; in the original U- On the basis of the Net decoder, the input of the first four decoder modules will also add the high frequency information removed by the corresponding Gaussian low-pass filter in the encoder to avoid the loss of detailed information; the last decoder does not accept the encoder's enter. 4. A strip steel defect detection method based on deep learning according to claim 1, characterized in that step 4 specifically includes the following steps: Step 4.1, train the built model, and use the standard Adam optimization algorithm to The model is trained; the model is trained for a total of 100 epochs, and the batch size is 10; the initial learning rate of training is 0.01, and it decays linearly with the training epoch; the loss function used for training is the FocalLoss loss function, which alleviates the problem of uneven data set categories ; Step 4.2. Perform data enhancement on the input data during training to increase data diversity; data enhancement will randomly use one of the following strategies: no enhancement, random vertical or horizontal flips, clockwise or counterclockwise The hour hand is at 5. Random rotation within the range, random Gaussian noise, histogram equalization, image sharpening; then use the mean and standard deviation of the data set to standardize the image; step 4.3, after training to 80 epochs, each epoch training After completion, the five-fold cross-validation method will be used to test the accuracy of the model; the model with the highest accuracy is selected as the result; Step 4.4. After the training is completed, verify whether the model is effective on the test set.

title: PHOTOLUMINESCENCE BATTERY CHIP DEFECT DETECTION METHOD BASED ON LED LIGHT SOURCE; 基于LED光源的光致发光电池片缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明提出一种基于LED光源的光致发光电池片缺陷检测方法，包括：S1在流水线履带上方安装LED光源和红外相机；S2红外相机拍摄电池片图像，并传输给工业计算机；S3收集图像进行标注，并进行离线训练深度学习模型；S4深度学习算法在线检测电池片缺陷。该检测方法利用电池片光致发光技术，并采用深度学习CNN分类模型对电池片进行分类，以及采用U‑Net模型对电池片缺陷进行检测和定位，实现了电池片缺陷检测的自动化，并提高了电池片缺陷检测的速度和精准度。

The present invention proposes a photoluminescence cell defect detection method based on an LED light source, including: S1 installs an LED light source and an infrared camera above the assembly line crawler; S2 an infrared camera captures battery cell images and transmits them to an industrial computer; S3 collects images for processing Label and train the deep learning model offline; S4 deep learning algorithm detects cell defects online. This detection method uses cell photoluminescence technology, and uses deep learning CNN classification model to classify cells, and uses U-Net model to detect and locate cell defects, which realizes the automation of cell defect detection and improves Improved the speed and accuracy of cell defect detection.
claims:
1.基于LED光源的光致发光电池片缺陷检测方法，其特征在于，包括： S1：在流水线履带上方安装LED光源和红外相机； S2:红外相机拍摄电池片图像，并传输给工业计算机； S3：收集图像进行标注，并进行离线训练深度学习模型； S4:深度学习算法在线检测电池片缺陷。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的检测方法，其特征在于，所述LED光源前安装聚焦用透镜。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的检测方法，其特征在于，所述红外相机前安装滤光片，并通过 网线连接所述工业计算机。 4.根据权利要求1所述的检测方法，其特征在于，所述步骤S3具体包括： S31：收集不同种类的电池片，并分别收集不同种类的缺陷，对电池片上的缺陷位置进 行标注； S32:构建CNN分类模型，区分不同种类的电池片； S33:构建多尺度语义分割网络U-Net，对缺陷位置进行定位； S34：采用分类交叉熵作为损失函数，NADAM作为优化器，对模型进行优化。 5 .根据权利要求4所述的检测方法，其特征在于，所述深度学习模型采用谷歌深度学习 框架Tensorflow开发，并采用英伟达CUDA计算框架进行加速。 6 .根据权利要求5所述的检测方法，其特征在于，所述步骤S4包括： 现场通过所述红外相机获取电池片图像，电池片图像经处理后输入深度学习程序中， 通过深度学习算法获得缺陷的位置图。

1. A method for detecting defects of photoluminescence cell based on LED light source, which is characterized in that it includes: S1: Install LED light source and infrared camera above the assembly line crawler; S2: The infrared camera takes images of the battery and transmits them to the industrial computer; S3: Collect images for annotation, and train deep learning models offline; S4: Deep learning algorithm detects cell defects online. 2 The detection method according to claim 1, wherein a focusing lens is installed in front of the LED light source. 3 The detection method according to claim 1, wherein a filter is installed in front of the infrared camera, and the industrial computer is connected through a network cable. 4. The detection method according to claim 1, wherein the step S3 specifically comprises: S31: Collect different types of battery slices, and collect different types of defects respectively, and mark the defect positions on the battery slices; S32: Build a CNN classification model to distinguish different types of cells; S33: Construct a multi-scale semantic segmentation network U-Net to locate the defect location; S34: Use classification cross entropy as the loss function and NADAM as the optimizer to optimize the model. 5 The detection method according to claim 4, wherein the deep learning model is developed using Google's deep learning framework Tensorflow, and is accelerated by using the NVIDIA CUDA computing framework. 6 The detection method according to claim 5, wherein the step S4 comprises: acquiring a battery slice image through the infrared camera on site, and the battery slice image is processed and input into a deep learning program, and the defect is obtained through a deep learning algorithm Location map.

title: SCREEN APPEARANCE DEFECT DETECTION METHOD AND DEVICE; 屏幕外观瑕疵检测方法及设备; PROCÉDÉ ET DISPOSITIF DE DÉTECTION DE DÉFAUT D'APPARENCE D'ÉCRAN
abstract:
The purpose of the present invention is to provide a screen appearance defect detection method and device, the method comprising: obtaining an appearance image of an electronic device; extracting an image of the screen appearance area of the electronic device from the appearance image of the electronic device; inputting the image of the screen appearance area into a trained FPN network-backbone network combined model; and receiving an output defect detection result for the screen appearance area of the electronic device from the FPN network-backbone network combined model, the defect detection result comprising the defect type of the screen of the electronic device, the position of the defect on the screen of the electronic device, and the confidence level of the defect detection result, so that the defeat differences in the appearance of second-hand electronic devices such as mobile phones can be accurately recognized.

La présente invention concerne un procédé et un dispositif de détection de défaut d'apparence d'écran, le procédé consistant : à obtenir une image d'apparence d'un dispositif électronique ; à extraire de l'image d'apparence du dispositif électronique une image de la zone d'apparence d'écran du dispositif électronique ; à entrer l'image de la zone d'apparence d'écran dans un modèle combiné de réseau FPN-réseau fédérateur formé ; à recevoir un résultat de détection de défaut de sortie concernant la zone d'apparence d'écran du dispositif électronique provenant du modèle combiné de réseau FPN-réseau fédérateur, le résultat de détection de défaut comprenant le type de défaut de l'écran du dispositif électronique, la position du défaut sur l'écran du dispositif électronique, et le niveau de confiance du résultat de détection de défaut, de telle sorte que les différences de défaut dans l'apparence de dispositifs électroniques d'occasion, tels que des téléphones mobiles, peuvent être reconnues avec précision.

本发明的目的是提供一种屏幕外观瑕疵检测方法及设备,本发明通过获取电子设备的外观图像;从所述电子设备的外观图像中提取该电子设备的屏幕外观区域图像;将所述屏幕外观区域图像输入训练结束后的FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型;从所述FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型接收输出的电子设备的屏幕外观区域的瑕疵检测结果,所述瑕疵检测结果包括:电子设备的屏幕的瑕疵种类、瑕疵在电子设备的屏幕中的位置和瑕疵检测结果的置信度,能够准确地识别二手电子设备如手机的屏幕外观的瑕疵差异。
claims:
一种屏幕外观瑕疵检测方法,其中,该方法包括: 获取电子设备的外观图像; 从所述电子设备的外观图像中提取该电子设备的屏幕外观区域图像; 将所述屏幕外观区域图像输入训练结束后的FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型; 从所述FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型接收输出的电子设备的屏幕外观区域的瑕疵检测结果,所述瑕疵检测结果包括:电子设备的屏幕的瑕疵种类、瑕疵在电子设备的屏幕中的位置和瑕疵检测结果的置信度。 根据权利要求1所述的方法,其中,从所述电子设备的外观图像中提取该电子设备的屏幕外观区域图像,包括: 采用Unet实例分割的方式,从所述电子设备的外观图像中提取该电子设备的屏幕外观区域图像。 根据权利要求1所述的方法,其中,所述backbone网络的前2层采用res结构,网络的后2层采用inception结构。 根据权利要求1所述的方法,其中,从所述FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型接收输出的电子设备的屏幕外观区域的瑕疵检测结果之后,还包括: 识别所述瑕疵检测结果的置信度是否大于第一预设阈值,若大于所述第一预设阈值,则输出包括电子设备的屏幕的瑕疵种类、瑕疵在电子设备的屏幕中的位置的结果信息。 根据权利要求1所述的方法,其中,将所述屏幕外观区域图像输入FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型之前,还包括: 步骤一,预设FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型及其初始的模型参数; 步骤二,将样本电子设备的屏幕外观区域图像输入带有当前的模型参数的FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型,得到样本电子设备的屏幕的瑕疵预测结果,所述瑕疵预测结果包括:样本电子设备的屏幕的瑕疵种类、瑕疵在样本电子设备的屏幕中的位置和瑕疵检测结果的置信度; 步骤三,基于预设目标函数计算所述瑕疵预测结果与样本电子设备的真实瑕疵结果之间的差值,识别所述差值是否大于第二预设阈,若所述差值大于第二预设阈值,则步骤四,基于所述差值更新所述FPN网络结合backbone网络的模型参数后,重新从步骤二开始执行;
